review_text: "Great stay"

"Das Hotel ist einfach klasse – es fehlt einem wirklich an nichts. Jeder Wunsch wird einem quasi von den Lippen abgelesen. Die Getränke und das Essen sind ein absoluter Traum: vielfältig, frisch und qualitativ hochwertig. Auch am Strand ist alles perfekt organisiert, zu jeder Zeit stehen genügend Liegen bereit. Rundum ein erholsamer Urlaub, den ich nur weiterempfehlen kann!"

"Beautiful resort, clean and spacious. Food was excellent, services were outstanding, right on the beach. Shows were beautiful, polls were clean and never crowded. Very family friendly, waterpark was excellent for kids. We plan to go back and to recommend this resort to anybody, especially families."
"Lovely family hotel"

"The Lara Barut resort is pure perfection — a playground of endless amenities and culinary delights from every corner of the globe to tempt every palate. The staff are highly motivated, warm and welcoming. Effortlessly professional, they anticipate your needs before you even think of them. A cut above Five-star for sure!"
"Very enjoyable and family orientated"
"Super friendly staff, very clean and luxurious property! Would highly recommend and will be coming back myself too!"
"Excellent food - some of the best we have ever had. I highly recommend non-smoking pool sections for non-smokers"
"Every thing was good"

"Wonderful location and the amenities were second to none. Great room, the hotel is super clean everywhere, fabulous pool, superb beach and an amazing animation team, including Martin, Harley, Amigo, Aykut and Sara to mention a few. Activities planned really well throughout the day allowing time away from just lying on the beach - games, darts, archery, bools, yoga, padel tennis, pool and sea gym and more! We will definitely come back."

"The food is top at this hotel, the buffet always has varieties at dinner and lunch, you cannot get bored of the options. Also the restaurants that are distributed around the resort are really good and convenient. The room service is fast and very responsive when you call for specific things like robes and water bottles. The pool activities are really fun and entertaining. Air conditioning is awesome and that was noted especially at the 40 degrees days. I would definitely come back and book again!"
"My family really enjoyed our experience there. Will definitely be coming back next summer"
"Lovely location, good food, great service and grounds!"

"Staff were fabulous: courteous, relaxed, helpful. The room was v comfortable, blackput curtains, great lighting options, coffee, bathroom. comfortable bed, quiet for sleep Food was plentiful, huge variety. You have to be organised to book the a-la-carte options, but the one we did was great (Arkdeniz) but the buffet and other options are great too. There are lots of activities, but we were in chill mode."
"Alles Top ??"

"Excellent facilities with a wide range of activities for all ages and interests. Our kids had a blast at the water slides, pools, and the beach. Every evening there was a great show. The food is great and diverse, both in the buffet and restaurants. Everyone was helpful and friendly. We were able to relax and enjoy the precious time with our kids without thinking of logistics and schedule."

"Skip this place. I really wanted to like this resort, but so much was amiss. Reception on arrival was barely welcoming and told us little about the hotel. The room was lovely (we had a penthouse). It was impossible to book a restaurant on day 1. The next couple of days were booked up; they eventually found us one “due to a cancellation.” Yet half the dining room was empty, so something didn’t add up. We had a truly disturbing experience in the spa—one I’ve never encountered in my life. It’s not suitable to print the details. The hotel tried to make amends and the team member was asked to leave, but it left a bad taste over the rest of the holiday. I later discovered they only refunded £129 of the £258 they’d agreed to—disingenuous, given what happened. The restaurants (when you could get into them) were excellent. Yet other details were hit and miss—an announcement that children had to wear water diapers played on repeat all afternoon at one pool. When we left, the receptionist didn’t ask how our stay was, didn’t thank us, didn’t offer transport. Just three words: a flat, disinterested “OK that’s it.” These odd lapses—endless announcements, sullen reception, phantom bookings, and the spa issue—made the place feel more Jekyll than Hyde. For the first time after a holiday, I sat in the pickup car glad to be going home. With so many other resorts nearby, choose literally any of them instead."

"For a short break with my daughter. This was the perfect location . The resort has plenty of restaurants and friendly staff. There is plenty of entertainment if that’s your thing. The beach party was a highlight! We stayed in a lagoon swim up room near the swim up bar. Perfect !"
"It was a fabulous stay. Probably the best hotel I have ever stayed at. Amazing food options."
"Service und Essen top. Anlage etwas in die Jahre gekommen aber dennoch sehr empfehlenswert"
"Food and service was amazing . Helpful staff with what’s app . Very clean for being all inclusive . We enjoyed our stay and we definitely go back ."

"Awful check in experience with an ornery salesy man who tried to upsell me while I was tired and hungry, but the hotel guest services staff were extraordinarily responsive and helped us have a lovely holiday"
"Amazing property. Super kid friendly. Very helpful staff especially the personal assistance team."
"Excellent food options, including for vegetarians. Good overall facilities. Service is a bit slow, or the staff are sometimes less attentive, but always very nice and approachable."

"A Perfect Stay at Barout Antalya Bayou Villa – Truly Exceptional! Our experience at Barout Antalya Bayou Villa was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with warm smiles and outstanding hospitality that made us feel right at home. Every detail of our stay was perfect — the villa was spotless, thanks to the wonderful housekeeping team who made sure everything was immaculate every day. The beach was pristine, calm, and simply breathtaking — a peaceful slice of paradise. The food was absolutely divine, crafted with care by the talented chefs whose creativity and flavors impressed us with every meal. Many thanks to the amazing culinary team — you made every bite memorable. A heartfelt thank you to Enes, who went above and beyond to make our stay smooth and enjoyable. Also, deep appreciation to Ersen, Doğan, and the entire team — your kindness and professionalism made all the difference. You truly created a five-star experience that we will always cherish. We’ve never experienced this level of luxury and top service before — it was by far the best vacation experience we’ve ever had. We’ll definitely be back as soon as possible! To everyone at Barout Antalya — thank you for your warmth, care, and unforgettable hospitality. We highly recommend this magical place to anyone looking for an exceptional getaway."
"Excellent customer service"
"Personal und gastfreundlich"
"cok iyiydi.. temizlik mükemmel. oda konforu mükemmel ..içecekler mükemmel. yiyecekler lezzetli"

"Super Hotel. Es gibt nichts zu meckern. Mir fällt wirklich nichts ein. Alles ist top. Service und Personal sind hervorragend. Essen ist unglaublich gut. Wer ein guten Urlaub möchte, ist hier richtig. Keine einzige Minute bereut."
"This was the second time we visited Lara B and we loved it, highly recommend it."
"So clean and modern. Food was good, not amazing. Loved all the activities for the kids"
"Everything was great; the only issue is you can’t reserve any of their restaurants if you don’t download their app, and their app is kind of complicated!"

"That was my second time and I would return soon in a heart beat ❤️
"

"Amazing Service, one of the best we have had! The food is beyond delicious and tasty. Everything was great and so many activities to do for both adults and kids. Special thanks to Martin and Ali from the entertainment. Again, the service is beyond what we have seen anywhere else. Keep it up and hope to visit you soon. Only comment: the market is super expensive and has some unreasonably priced items."

"Amazing place that exceeds your expectations in every way. Almost everything was 5/5 in my view but what stands out most is the staff. They deserve a 5 /5. They truly go above and beyond to make your trip enjoyable. Super polite and accommodating. Hotel is super clean and very well looked after. Dining options? Imagine waking up in an episode of the Bear tv series. Endless options accommodating all sorts of diets with the best options. There are numerous bars and restaurants around the hotel with great offerings. Place is very family oriented. We were a family of 3; spouses and a 5-year old. My daughter had a blast. Water activity options are limited - 4 different types of big slides e.g. - but we didn't need more than that. My daughter was too young even for those 4 options. But, we enjoyed the kids club, playgrounds, nightly kids discos, numerous kids-friendly shows at the amphitheater etc. So, for a family like ours it was perfect. If you want to try jet ski or parachutes e.g. you can walk to the beach and leverage the neighboring hotel's offerings; very pricey though. 15 mins of jet ski costs you 100 Euros and a parachute ride (around 10 mins) costs the same; prices valid as of Aug 2024. The only thing we didn't enjoy (but I am not dropping a star off my review for it) was the drug store at the hotel. It basically is a super market that sells everything you need from toys, inflatables, sunscreen etc. But, everything is priced 3-4 times what you would pay in the UK."

"This is an amazing resort with incredible service, most glorious pools and beach and freshest food. Rooms were tasteful and we had an ocean view which was to die for. Poolside bar great with server in roller skates. Beach loungers kept very clean. Clean towels available in multiple points around the resort. Super fun waterslides too for all ages. Also the spa services are reasonably priced and great service there too. I cannot recommend Lara Barut enough. One small thing, the Cay bar and other dining in the main building - excluding Zestful Bazaar (main restaurant - decoration is a bit dated and dark. Could be modernised."

"Prior to going download the app for this property reservations for meals need to be made 48 hours in advance. If you don't have a reservation you will eat at the buffet the whole time. You need to remind staff of extra’s that were promised at booking"

"The hotel is great, with several options for children, several restaurants, clean, organized, but like everything else it is not perfect, in the main hotel there are only 3 lifts, it takes a while and the lofts, are small, sometimes you have to wait a long time to get in, the lifeguards are not friendly, they are on the phone, they do not pay attention to the children, my son tried twice to talk to one and he simply ignored him, the larger pool was closed 3 times during our stay because some child had an accident (poop). I think the management should be a little firmer in terms of nappy’s or maybe have a pool for children. Otherwise everything was okay. Maybe we will come back."
"Fantastic resort. My kids had a great time. One suggestion would be good if they did free shuttle bus to the main town. Lots to see and explore"

"I cannot fault the hotel. Just a couple of small points they could have more towel tower points in swimming area. Oh I wish I had known before Lara Beach is not a golden beach. It’s stoney and pebbley, not one for sand castles. Handy 20 mins away from airport, although it’s a touristy area and majority of guests were English. English is not well spoken in the area or by taxi drivers but the hotel staff were efficient and helpful. I loved how the hotel has a small kiddy restaurant area for them kids to eat (of course with adult tables) for you to also sit next to the child. MJ show was a great show! Their desserts were amazing! The bazaar down the roads are rip off for baklava and Turkish delight. You get better rate (half the price) in shopping mall such as terra city."
"Excellent property"
"Overall, a good hotel for families"

"Our family, including our 7 year old daughter, loved Lara Barut and we would like to visit again. Loved the water park, swimming pools and the entertainment. Specila call out to the very polite staff and also the animation team. Great food and desserts. We had a lot of vegetarian options, which was very very good. The quality of cocktails was also very good."

"Amazing stay, the hotel was great food was good. They could cater more for vegetarian and possibly offer more choice however we still had a good variety most night it was repetitive. Overall the staff were amazing and very friendly they set up a lovely restaurant setting for my husband’s birthday."

"Nice hotel and staff and cleanliness. Restaurant booking a nightmare. Poolside bar service mixed (both in terms of whether the drink would arrive at all and the quality). But these are small(ish) niggles. If you just want sunshine with your family and a happy time Lara B is the place for you!"
"The service and staff are excellent. Food and beverage options are outstanding. Entertainment and leisure facilities are excellent. Highly recommended for both families and couples."

"We stayed here at the beginning of June for 7 nights. Honestly couldn't fault it and it's on par with our trips to dubai. Highly recommend this hotel if you have a small family. It was the three of us and our child is 4. She was entertained all throughout the day with kids clubs activities that you can easily join. The food and drinks were faultless. A special mention to Bekir who looked after us from day one and was so friendly and accommodating. Honestly, I could not recommend this hotel enough. Two of my friends have since booked a stay here. I would happily come back again."

"This resort holds 1st place on our vacation list as I have traveled quite a bit around the world. Even though we stayed 7 days we still did not discover everything this place had to offer. We will be back for sure!"
"El personal muy amable, muchas cosas para hacer tanto para adultos como niños, excelente comida y excelente restaurantes, definitivamente volveremos"

"Yemekler çok kaliteli, taze ve çok çeşitli. Açık büfede ne ararsanız mevcut. Personel çok ilgili ve çok güleryüzlü. Hotele adım attığınız an itibaren sizinle çok ilgileniyorlar. Pastanesi ayrıca iılmaz lezzetli ve her şeyi taze."

"Our 2nd stay in a hotel in the Barut group and this one didn't disappoint. Exceptional customer service from every member of staff and the facilities and food were outstanding. Will definitely return to a Barut hotel again - fantastic all-inclusive for our family."
"Awesome"

"I am very picky when it comes to cleanliness. This resort was very clean at all times! My family and I have traveled all over the world including all inclusive resorts in Mexico, so I was alittle skeptical coming here, but it definitely met my expectations. Everything was wonderful!"
"Great property and the food is really delicious"
"Beautiful"
"Amazing hotel and really friendly staff especially in the restaurants. I would come back again"
"Wery good for children"

"The staff were very attentive and helpful. The hotel has magnificent facilities. The entertainment programme is thoughtful. The quality of the food is first class. The rooms are spacious and always kept in tip top condition."
"Excellent - we will be back."

"From the first day to the last day, everything was perfect! Food brilliant, especially being vegetarian, plenty of choices and different for the 7 days we stayed. The two onsite restaurants we ate at were really good too! My 4 year old daughter had a fantastic time, especially at the kids club, the team was so much fun and caring, giving us that peace of mind. all the staff were so accommodating and polite. Kids disco and evening entertainment was also a great way to end our day. The shows were great! To all the bar staff, thank you for looking after us and hydrated, the service was brilliant. The grounds were kept beautiful and clean everyday, not a spec of rubbish! Lara Berut exceeded all expectations and will definitely return."
"Everything abt the resort was great. I would definitely go back"

"Best resort hands down, and I've been to many all-inclusive. Staff, service, entertainment, grounds, amenities, including beautiful rooms, night-life, waterpark, delicious food, beach and seating/umbrellas, spa....on and on and on! All absolutely amazing! Will definitely return! Thank you Lara Barut for the best vacation!"
"Amazing and beautiful location with plenty of amenities for the kids and great dining options for everyone"
"Loved our stay at the Lara Barut, the best service I’ve ever experienced abroad from the staff really made this special. 10/10 would recommend!"
"Amazing food, entertainment and an overall excellent all inclusive."
"Amazing! Everything was excellent. Will be back!"
"Lara Barut is an amazing place for every age. I very recommend this hotel."
"Amazing facility, great staff and wonderful food. Would never go anywhere else."
"Great food"
"Fabulous hotel. Wonderful service!"

"The property had many options for the little one to enjoy. From the baby water slide to the aqua park, to the kids club, it had a lot, the entertainment went throughout the day. The only negative thing I could say is that bookings for dinner were tricky"
"5th time and as good as ever. We always say that it will be our last time, but we are considering booking again. Kids and adults love it! Something for everyone"
"Food options"
"perfect resort"

"Lovely hotel with fun waterpark. Buffet has lovely food. A bit tricky to book the restaurants as there are not many tables. What is annoying about this hotel is people reserving lounge chair by 8am even though it is not allowed. When you arrive with your kids after breakfast there are no seats available but nobody on them, only towels and personnal belongings."
"Service d'une grande qualité. Resort très beau. L'hébergement très luxueux. Une diversité de choix de restauration jamais vue ailleurs."
"Lara Barut Collection..is probably the best hotel I’d ever stayed at. Food staff service cleanliness, there is nothing negative that I could think of."
"The hotel was amazing!"

"Beautiful resort with exceedingly friendly and helpful staff. Fabulous food and drink options. Super clean and well maintained rooms, great pool areas, fantastic beach, great shows and excellent night-life options."
"Best resort ever Amazing"

"This hotel property is truly outstanding! We enjoyed our stay at Lara Barut Collection more than at any other hotel we have stayed at. The food was incredible at all of the a la carte restaurants and also at the buffet! The entire property is extremely well-maintained and spotlessly clean! We had a garden area room with a swim-up terrace and it was very nice. Most of the time we had the entire pool to ourselves! The room itself was very comfortable. There is a wide variety of fun activities and also quiet areas for relaxing. The hotel staff provided outstanding service in all areas throughout our stay. Anything we needed was provided immediately. The app and the ability to use WhatsApp to communicate with Guest Relations made it very easy to have our questions answered and to have our requests fulfilled. Everything is of the highest quality. We look forward to returning!"

"Title: A Luxurious Haven of Hospitality and Comfort! Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Review: I recently had the pleasure of staying at the magnificent Lara Barut Hotel Collection, and I must say, it exceeded all my expectations. From the moment I stepped into the grand lobby until the day of my departure, every aspect of my stay was absolutely delightful. The hotel's location is truly remarkable, nestled in the beautiful Lara Beach area. The pristine golden sands and the crystal-clear waters provided a mesmerizing backdrop for a truly unforgettable vacation. The stunning views from my room were simply breathtaking, and I couldn't have asked for a better place to unwind and soak up the natural beauty of the Turkish Riviera. The staff at Lara Barut Hotel Collection are the epitome of professionalism and warmth. From the friendly receptionists to the attentive waitstaff, every member of the team made me feel like a valued guest throughout my stay. They were always ready to assist with a smile, offering excellent service and going above and beyond to ensure my comfort. Their attention to detail and genuine care for their guests truly set this hotel apart. Speaking of comfort, the accommodations at Lara Barut are simply outstanding. My room was spacious, elegantly furnished, and meticulously maintained. The plush bed provided a restful sleep, and the luxurious bathroom with its modern amenities was a true indulgence. The housekeeping staff deserves special commendation for their work!"
"Magnifique hôtel"

"The penthouse room was of spectacular opulence. Spacious, exquisitely equipped, absolute indulgence. The staff, second to none, pride in their craft, service with a smile. Special mention to Tuna at check-in, Hasan (Turunc, Secret Grill), Kadir (main restaurant- breakfast) and Yusuf at the Archery. The SA Band were brilliant, incredible voices, excellent song choices. Their emphasis on audience participation made it the standout performance. We’ll be back later in the year, hopefully they’ll be performing again. Highly recommend staying here and seeing this band is a MUST."
"Excellent Family Destination."

"Guest service were accommodating on our arrival, as we arrived 4am into the hotel. However, dining options were limited, the all day buffet, wasn’t the best in terms of variations from each day. Not eating beef, the meat options were limited. The pool areas and kids club (inc night time entertainment) we’re brilliant and the kids enjoyed themselves. Overall, it was ok, not the worst, but not the best."
"Awesome vacation"

"Balayı çifti olarak otelinizde toplam 4 gece 5 gün konakladık. Temizlik dans şovları personellerin güler yüzü ve ilgisi harikaydı. İkimiz için de unutulmaz ve huzur dolu bir tatil oldu. Sadece restaurant iılmaz yoğun bir ızgara kokusu altındaydı, yemekler de bana göre oldukça yağlı ve ağırdı tabi bu kişisel bir tercih eşim bayılarak yedi. Bense özellikle tatlılarınızı çok beğendim. Emeğinize ve ilginize sağlık ??"
"Good experience in overall."

"This all inclusive was amazing compared to many others I’ve stayed in. Most importantly, the food was great! There were plenty of options every night and they even have a late option for breakfast for the people who like to sleep in on vacation. Most of the staff spoke English as well as Russian. The beach was great and there were plenty of chairs. The cabanas are beautiful and a great option to reserve if traveling with a group. Hotel room was clean, had a beautiful view of the beach, and anything you may need while vacationing. The only downside is there wasn’t too much to do at night besides hang out on the pier where they had a DJ until midnight."
"Sehr sehr laut für Familien. Sonst gutes ultra Al-Inkl Konzept, schöner Strandabschnitt. Tolle Animation."

"The management is very weak and very dictatorial and threatening in such a way that they called me and threatened me. Why did you ask a question about this issue, what if another guest wants to come? You are very uneducated."

"Overall, the property was good. A couple of deficiencies I noticed. 1. The A/C throughout the resort was inadequate. 2. The staff at the food court couldn’t get their act together with correct order details. Excuses could be made but in the end, that’s all they are. Just excuses. The a/c systems need to be updated. For the amount the resort charges, one doesn’t expect there to be problems."

"Belle plage privee , personel aux services des clients , nourriture excellente avec beaucoup de variétés, chambre moderne tres propre , rien a dire , hate a ce que je retourne , confortable avec vue sur mer et"
"Yders tilfreds Mellem str hotel med komfort tilstand i top"

"Had one week vacation with my family at the resort. Pros: 1. Excellent food: Stuff at the kitchen was doing very well. Variety and quality was above excellence. 2. Friendly Stuff: Every stuff was welcoming and making sure that we are having good time. 3. Entertainment: This is the best part. This hotel attracts all kind of tourists: from families with bunch of kids to young single active fellas. Every disco or dancing show was suitable for everybody. Everyday different program. Very modern and energising 6 out of 5 to entertainment department💪 Cons. I wish management would invest more in hotel rooms and plumbing. You can tell that its newly remodelled facility but in a cheap way. 1. Drain is smelly: if you keep bathroom open and balcony closed, entire room will have weird smell. Might bother people with sensitive nose. 2. Mattresses and pillows are poor quality. If you sensitive to this things you may have sleep issues. I guess you can't have everything. And In my opinion this hotel has very good price/quality ratio. Thank you to all hotel stuff for wonderfull stay. I'm definitely consider to come back some time."
"Food, events and staff dealing was amazing."
"Muhteşem bir tatildi.."

"Uzun sıralar, alamadığınız hizmet Adil bir değerlendirme yapacağım. Resepsiyon çok kalabalık olmasına rağmen ilgiliydi. Girişte sorun yaşamadık. Deniz taş ama temiz ve güzel. Sahilde bar yok. Bir tane çıkınca var onda da sadece akşam kokteyl var. Diğer barlarda, snack alanında ve restaurantta heryerde sıralar var. Bitmek bilmiyor sıra beklemekten yıldık. Bir de masa ve şezlong bulma sorun tabi. Sürekli dolaşmak gerek. Iılmaz kalabalıktı. Ama esas sorun birincisi temizlik hizmetlerinde. Sabah 8 de birbirlerine bağırarak seslenmeleri, 8.37 de kapıyı çalıp girmeleri (tatile gelmemişiz gibi) odayı temizleyip almaları gereken çöpümüzü poşetiyle konsolda unutmaları başımıza ilk defa bir otelde geldi. Ikincisi ise restaurantta içecek bulmak. Sıralar bitmiyor garsonlar getirmiyor hatta kahvaltıda bardak kalmadığını soylediğim kadın türk garson bana ileriyi gösterip oradan alabilirsiniz diyor. Kamu kampına gelsek daha az iş yapardık. Kesinlikle bir daha gelmeyiz tavsiye de edemiyoruz ama kendi işimi hallederim diyorsanız mutlaka tercih edin."
"Amazing best service"

"⭐ 1 out of 5 stars There's so much I want to say and give more detail there just isnt enough characters. Our stay at Spice Hotel and Spa was extremely stressful. On arrival, our room was dirty, furniture old and broken, walls peeling, and the toilet flush broken. On the first night, we found a bug on my sister’s pillow that bit her hand. Staff refused to identify it, and we later discovered it was head lice. Despite this, we were not moved, and guest services failed to act. Housekeeping was unprofessional, sometimes ignoring requests, laughing at us, or walking away. I was reduced to tears before a manager finally intervened, and only then did the head of housekeeping take the matter seriously. Communication with staff was very poor. Simple requests like water or towels were often ignored, and basic questions about entertainment could not be answered. While the pool, beach, and some waiters were fine, the lack of professionalism, repeated dismissals, and failure to address hygiene issues made this the worst hotel experience I have had. This hotel is not five-star, and I would never return"
"Pool"

"Service is terrible, no one speaks English, everyone is moody and not willing to help, on top of that number of staff is far from enough for resort if this size. Guests need to wander around for 10-15 min to find someone to help them or ask a question, and the probability of them understanding you is 1%, because they don’t even know words such as “glass of water”. The resort amentities are ok. But the rooms smell terrible and super outdated. Water in the bathroom rarely gets warm and some of the days was brown/ yellow colour as on the pictures below.
"I recommend this property 👌"

"Es war eigentlich ein sehr guter Urlaub und alles war exzellent schade ist das man langsam merkt das, dass Hotel in die Jahre gekommen ist. Die Matratzen sind durch, Fernseher alt minibar alt, bei uns im Zimmer war sogar die LED Beleuchtung alt man hat durch getrennte Stromkabeln mit band zusammengeflickt und das hat die ganze Nacht durch gesummt. Aber naja alles nicht so schlimm ich kann da drüber hinweg sehen auch wenn das Hotel teuer ist aberrrr ich hatte die ganze Zeit Durchfall weil kein Glas was ich in die Hand gedrückt bekommen habe sauber war! In allen konnte ich was entdecken machmal Lippenstift manchmal Pfefferminzblatt Reste vom mojito das hat mich sehr geärgert. Der Pool ist leider auch selten sauber und vieeeel zu warm! Es ist keine Erfrischung mehr. Die nächtlichen Partys an der poolbar sind übertrieben laut also ich bin selber DJ gewesen und war in ganz süddeutschland unterwegs ich weiß was ich sage. Aber das ist ein ganz normales Problem bei den türkischen djs! Die denken alle die Party wird besser wenn die Musik laut ist…auch mit scheiss Musikauswahl. Ansonsten war es aber trotzdem schön und wir waren zufrieden"
"Manifique hôtel"

"Coup de cœur pour le Palazzo Lounge
C’était notre quatrième séjour au Kaya Palazzo, et le service est toujours à la hauteur. Le nouveau restaurant Palazzo Lounge est une belle découverte, aussi bien pour la qualité de sa cuisine que pour l’élégance de son cadre"
"Sehr zu empfehlen"

"Swim up suite sind ihr Geld nicht wert, hellhörig und nie sauber. Essen ist Kantine, überall steht Geschirr und Abfall und immer das gleiche, Publikum nur 4 -Sterne. Zusatzleistungen sind unfassbar überteuert."
"Essensbuffet sehr chaotisch."

"An amazing place. The beauty of the beach and scenery is matched with amazing amenities and architecture at the resort. Starting with the Quality of rooms, and cleanliness to the staff. One in particular that made every guests experience more fun is the manager Rida. This gentleman went out of his way to interact with us, and every other guest. Can’t say enough about how welcoming he is."
"Best stay at Kaya palazzo! Amazing dishes amazing staff and most importantly amazing host Aycan & Ecem! We will definitely be back:)"
"Excellent customer service. Impressed with the hotel, nothing to fault at all. Will definitely be coming back again"
"Was so good hotel"

"I had a wonderful stay — everything was smooth, comfortable, and exceeded expectations. A special shoutout to Daria and Taha for their exceptional customer service — they went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect. Truly grateful for their kindness and professionalism. Highly recommend!"

"We stayed for five nights in a luxury suite. The room was terrible — damp and musty. When we checked in, the bed was dirty. The service was awful; we had to ask for everything multiple times. The waiters were unmotivated and indifferent. We are very disappointed with our trip. We paid a lot of money but received the lowest level of service. I strongly recommend that you check carefully before going to this resort."
"Everything was nice. Taha and Rose were phenomenal."

Dining areas were worse it was utter carnage , should be a one way system in place people barging around pushing and shoving ! Booked the cabana bed for a birthday was informed they would decorate the cabana bed …nothing ballon’s a few hours later was told we bring champagne and cake nothing …. We heard still asking guests for good reviews , there was around 3 members staff that we spoke to were good that was Pablo, Jimmy and the guy on Rollar skates all polite and well mannered.All the staff looked to be working very hard all the time , All in all if you looking for 3 to 5 star with the money you pay don’t go there"

"Pros: The hotel entertainment by the pool is really nice, super fun, the staff bring the energy! Rose (one of the ladies super sweet lady) and love the DJ at the main pool! Cons: The female staff at the reception have a very unnerving (false) smile and greeting. Did not feel like female staff at reception were genuine and had good hospitality skills. First night we were booked into the same room even though we had separate rooms - but we were offered a complimentary Cabana and A la carte. But have not experienced Overbooking in a hotel before which was a bit of an inconvenience and not something you would expect from a 5* resort - nevertheless we agreed to stay in the same room for night 1 and were given two separate pool view rooms. We were happy with the Cabana and A La Carte so this was a nice gesture on the hotels part. Overall, was a lovely resort and happy to have experienced Aska Lara but would stay elsewhere if I were to visit Antalya in future."

"*** AVOID HOTEL*** THIS IS NOT A 5* HOTEL***.On arrival at 5am – reception staff not very friendly, didn’t explain anything to us; For example there is a shuttle that can take you to the beach or you can walk there approx. 5 mins across the road. Before we could put our clothes in the wardrobe, the floors were dirty and dusty – walking around in bare foot; your feet shouldn’t be coated in dust!!! Bedside table – 7 nights in we happen to run our hand over it and it was thick dust!! This was also the case when checking the sides of the sink/vanity area in bathroom – this is not 5*standard!! Balcony – very dirty, glass not cleaned at all – this was never cleaned the whole entire time we were there!! There was also construction working going on across the road, what we didn’t expect to hear/see about 10 strays dogs barking, especially at night / early morning. We did complain 3 times – no one seem bothered and no apology, even took the video footage to customer service – looked very uninterested and no apology. Food: Was very samey the whole time we were there, on some of the food on the hot food section, the lids were left constantly up – food was cold!!! My friend had food poisoning on the last afternoon from the lunch she ate and was very ill on the flight on the way home!! spa - would recommend Emer and Baki very good and professional A lot of activities not included all an extra charge

"Der Pool sehr dreckig haben am ersten Tag erlebt, wie Pool abgesperrt haben, wegen kot Am nächsten Tag war das Kinder Pool gesperrt auch wegen kot!!! Haben auch nicht richtig gesehen ob die den Pool sauber machen, ich glaube die benutzen auch kein Chlor!! Haben uns so geäckelt das wir nur am Strand waren. Det Strand war das schlimmste, wo Ich bisher war!!! Im Wasser waren lauter weißer Schaum!!!!!! Es ist kein Getränke Service!!!!! Der Personal ist nur beschäftigt mit einem sehr dreckigen Wagen das Geschirr abzuräumen, wenn Mann die Wagen sieht wo das schmutzige Geschirr reinkommt, ist der Appetit weg Das ist auf keinen Fall ein 5 Sterne Hotel!!!! Die Bewertungen sind falsch oder auch gefälscht. Ein Morgen waren wir um 10.15 Uhr frühstücken, das Frühstücksbuffet war 10.30 Uhr haben es noch geschafft und Kleinigkeiten zu nehmen, es saßen auch noch viele Gäste im Restaurant, als es 10.40 Uhr war, ging die Lichter und die Klimaanlage aus und Mann konnte nicht mehr im Restaurant sitzen, weil Mann richtig geschwitzt hat. Was ich sagen möchte, der Personal ist fixiert zum abräumen, und versuchen sauber zu mach was sie auch nicht richtig schaffen. Die Toiletten sind sowas dreckig, in der Lobby und auch draußen. Wir mussten immer ins Zimmer laufen. Trotz das wir aufgepasst hatten, haben meine 2 Kinder und ich Magendarm mit Durchfall gehabt.!!!!! Vor ist ein Arztraum aber kein Arzt da, da saß ein Pfleger und sagte ich soll ins Krankenhaus Zum Glück hatte ich Medikamente dabei!"

"Worst Vacation Ever – Avoid This Resort! My experience at Orange County Belek was absolutely terrible from start to finish. The staff were extremely rude and arrogant, starting from the check-in desk and continuing with every other member of the team I encountered. The food was awful — no variety whatsoever, with the same low-quality options served every single day. The rooms were not properly cleaned; they would only change the towels and leave everything else untouched. This place completely ruined my holiday. It was by far the worst vacation I have ever had. I would not recommend this resort to anyone."

"I booked this property expecting a quality experience, especially with VIP Access, but it was completely unacknowledged and offered no benefit at all. The overall service was shockingly poor — most of the staff were rude and unhelpful, with the exception of three individuals who at least tried to make a difference: the relationship manager, Mellissa the waitress, and Selim the maître d’ on the night shift. Cleanliness was questionable, and the food was both repetitive and terrible. Breakfast, lunch, and dinner were essentially the same uninspired, low-quality options every day. Presentation and taste were equally disappointing. The lack of variety and freshness was unacceptable for a property of this supposed standard. Overall, this was one of the worst hotel experiences I’ve had. I would not recommend this property unless significant changes are made to service, cleanliness, and dining."

Das Zimmer wurde täglich sehr gut gereinigt. Leider gab es einen ständigen Tropfgeräusch in der Toilette, was Nachts gestört hat. "Die Unterkunft hat einige positive Aspekte, aber auch einige Mängel. Die Lage in der Altstadt ist wirklich toll und bietet viele Möglichkeiten zur Erkundung. Das Frühstück war in Ordnung und es wurde sich bemüht: Es gab jeden Morgen einen Korb mit Semmeln und für jeden einen Teller mit verschiedenen süßen und herzhaften Sachen. Tee und Insantkaffee konnte man sich selbst nehmen. Leider war die Sauberkeit nicht zufriedenstellend. Unter dem Bett fand sich eine fremde Flasche, was nicht gerade ein gutes Gefühl vermittelt. Zudem funktionierte der Ablauf der Dusche nicht richtig, was den Komfort beeinträchtigt hat. Auch die Lautstärke war ein Problem, da es oft recht laut war. Insgesamt gibt es Raum für Verbesserungen, insbesondere in Bezug auf Sauberkeit und Lärmschutz."

Jedenfalls sind die Zimmer nicht dem Preis entsprechend, der hohe Preis lässt sich wohl auf Grund der zentralen Lage erklären. Kurz gesagt, ich habe mich wegen der unverständlich hohen Anzahl von positiven Bewertungen wohl blenden lassen, die ich ehrlich gesagt auch nicht ganz nachvollziehen kann. Ich würde hier nie wieder buchen, wünsche der Familie dieser Pension aber alles erdenklich Gute und weiterhin viel Erfolg."

"Nous avons séjourné 2 nuits courant Août en chambre 404. Chambre au calme ne dont pas sur la rue donc idéale pour se reposer tout en gardant une proximité sur la vieille ville. La chambre dispose d’une bonne Clim! L’hôtel est idéalement situé : en plein cœur du centre. Accueil sympathique, nous sommes arrivés à 8h du matin et nous avons eut le droit au petit déjeuner gratuitement. Le petit déjeuner est simple et toujours similaire donc pas de surprise, pas déçu pas conquis. Piscine qui pourrait être entretenu/ nettoyé plus régulièrement : le jet d’eau ne fonctionne pas et il y a du sable et des feuilles. Elle reste idéale pour se rafraîchir. Je recommande tout de même."

Fayda fiyat dengesine baktığımda oldukça başarılı bulduğum otelin kahvaltısı da oldukça iyiydi. Çalışanları oldukça kibar ve güler yüzlü olan otelde özellikle Faruk Bey'in ilgili ve bilgilendirici tavrından dolayı çok teşekkür ederim."

"Klimanın yönlendirme fonksiyonu bozuktu. Gece ses olduğunu bilerek tercih ettik. Fakat bu kadar ses olacağını düşünmezdim. İlk yerleştirdikleri oda ve yatak çok küçüktü sonrasında daha normal bir oda verdiler. F/p olarak tercih edilebilir."
"Super bien !.Hôtel très sympathique, personnel gentil, chambre confortable, propre, nous recomendons."

"Excelente.Hôtel bien situé, à 3 min de la vielle ville, à 30 min à pie de la plage, tranquille, rue calme, personnel sympa, attentionné, chambre propre, lit confortable, bonne climatisation. Petit détail: manque un torchon pour la cuisine, cuisine bien équipée et fonctionnelle."

"El personal en general es amable, pero el hotel tiene mucho que mejorar, las fotos que aparecen en Expedia, no son para nada lo que encuentras en la propiedad, el cuarto olía a caño y a cigarro, que decir del olor a humedad, las camas están en muy mal estado estado, con marcas y manchas de dudosa procedencia, lo bueno que tiene es que está cerca del casco antiguo y hay muchas ofertas de comida alrededor. Nuevamente, insisto, el personal es amable."

"Das Hotel liegt sehr nah am Schiffhafen und direkt im Zentrum, gute Busverbindung und Straßenbahn in der Umgebung . Unser Zimmer hatte eine Küche , was sehr praktisch war. Das Personal war sehr nett."
"Temizlik oldukça kötüydü. Jakuzinin içi de pisti. Çok konforlu bir otel olacakken hijyene önem gösterilmemesinden bakımsız bir otel olmuş."
"Mükemmel konum.Konum mükemmel. Kahvaltı yok ama çevredeki marketlerden malzeme alabilir mutfakta hazırlayabilirsiniz.otel Çevresinde birçok yeme içme alternatifleri mrvcut."

"Bir daha kalmam ve tavsiye etmem.Öncelikle odada wi-fi çekmiyordu. Sadece "Özel banyo" var demek için odanın içine yapılmış. üstü yarım açık bırakılmış ve dolayısıyla oda ile bağlantısı kesilmemiş bir bölümdü. Bundan dolayı banyo-tuvalet bölümünde oluşan kokular odaya geliyordu. Yine aynı bölümde duşakabin. küvet veya duş teknesi konulmamıştı. Bundan dolayı yerler tamamen su içinde kalıyor, klozeti sulara badarak kullanmak zorunda kalıyorsunuz. Ayrıca bu bölmenin eni 1 m civarında. boyu da belki 3 m. Yani içeride dönmekte zorlanıyorsunız. Lavabosu iki avuç büyüklüğünde ve tam duvar dibine sıfırlanmış, bel değil, bacak hizasında, aynada kendinizi görebilmeniz büyük başarı, kısaca bu da "lavabo var" demek için konulmuş. Bir de lavaboya ulaşabilmek için önce kapıyı tamamen kapatmanız gerekiyor. Ancak o da tam kapanmıyor. Bunların dışında klima aşırı sesli çalışıyor. Ayrıca  aynı kattaki diğer odaların kullandığı ortak banyo hemen bitişik ve sanırım mukavva panelle bölünmüş. Aşırı gürültü geliyor. Tatminkar olan özellik olarak bir tek ortam temizliğini söyleyebilirim. Özet olarak ise alı ücreti hak etmediğini söyleyebilirim. Bir daha kalmam ve kalınmasını da tavsiye etmem."

"Accueil très insatisfisant !
L'hôtelier est pas du tout agréable et a essayer de nous faire payer plus cher en prétextant des frais de change alors que nous payons en TL !!! L'état général laisse à désirer."
"Lovely family run hotel,ALL personnel were friendly and efficient.In the centre of the Old Town and convenient for everything."
"Nice place to stay. Great staff. Great vibes"
"Excellent evironment pure natural, I.e birds, trees shadowing, flowers"
"Ogólnie w porządku.Pobyt udany. Niestety w pokoju pachniało trochę wilgocią, pokój na parterze, ale pokój był czysty bez barier. Bardzo miły właściciel, pomocny."
"Dizilerdeki butik otell.Bir müşteri gibi değil misafir gibi ağırlandık. Çok misafirperverler. Çok keyifli bir bahçesi ve havuzu var."
"Rutubet kokusu vardı , havalandırmak ile gecmiyordu"
"Alles supi"

"Banyo Tuvalet Bir Arada.Otel Antalya merkezdeki tarihi alan içinde olduğu için normalde araçla giriş yasakmış ama bariyerin ordaki güvenlik personeline otelde kalacağınızı söylediğinizde girebiliyormuşsunuz. Ama biz bunu ilk başta bilmediğimiz için uzun yolculuktan sonra boşu boşuna 15 dakika daha trafikte dolandık. Oda rutubet kokuyordu, hava alsın diye kapıyı 4-5 dakika açık bırakınca bu sefer sinekler doluştu. Tuvalet, banyo bir arada ve çok kullanışsızdı. Hijyenik bir görüntü yoktu, böcekler vardı hatta. Etrafta eğlence mekanları olduğu için gece 11-12'ye kadar yüksek sesli müzik oluyor. Kahvaltıda hazır küçük kutu reçel, yağ vs. olan bir tabak veriyorlar. En iyi tarafı çalışan arkadaşlar güleryüzlü ve yardımseverler ama pansiyonun durumu belli. Bir de biz kullanmadık ama havuzu vardı, pansiyonun karşısında bir bahçe içinde.Banyo Tuvalet Bir Arada

"Genel olarak konaklamamızdan mennun kaldık.İşleletenler ilgili ve samimi bir şekilde ilgilendiler.Karşılamada bizimle ilgilendiler.Odada mini bir buzdolabı olsa iyi olurdu.Kahvaltıyı gelişitirlerse iyi olur diye duşunuyorum."
"Very nice to just stay after eventful day. No TV, which was nice not to have. AC worked great. Could use some cutting back on the bushes near the stairs. Very friendly owners."
"Superbe localisation ... dommage que la proprete de la chambre laisse a desiree ....chasse d eau cassee odeur d humidite bcp presente dans la chambre et pomeau de douche que nous avons du reparer"
"Allt i hotellet perfekt. Perfekt personal jag känner bor med min familj och jättebra plats. Jag jätte nöjd och tacksam och jag kommer igen 100% samma hotell varje år och helgen. Tack tack tack"

"A small but cosy, clean and comfortable room with a double bed. Private bathroom was small but had lovely hot water and very clean. Lovely small pansiyon with friendly staff, in the heart of Old Town with plenty of restaurants, bars and shops plus very close to the marina and the small bathing area. The downside is that music is played every night in the area with the weekends being very loud. However it did finish around midnight. Wifi was inconsistent and only one high wall outlet to plug chargers or appliance in. But these are only small defects and it’s a value for money property which was very comfortable for my week stay."
"Personal, piscina y entorno perfecto. Pension bastante vieja, necesita renovacion. Desayuno mejorable. El precio es razonablemente bueno. Personal super amable"
"great hotel.it was an excellent hotel with good location. The owner is very helpful and cooperative and the hotel is excellent with amazing breakfast. we really enjoyed our stay."
"The property itself is far for perfect, but once you experience the turkish hospitality you forget for any flows that this property has. Definitely will come back again."
"Really cozy little family business"

"It’s quite in the end of the busy street. Quite old wooden shape. Rooms are okay. There is no fridge in room. You have to keep items with the admin store. There was issue of shower water flow and no separate glass door was available. On weekend, the music sound in the vicinity may be an issue. Breakfast was somehow okay. Overall, given the price it wasn’t bad."

"First time in Antalya.Really great experience at Lazer Pension in Antalya's Kaleici area. Staff is so friendly and helpful, at all hours. Room was attractive with wood panelling, modern bathroom, comfortable beds and an extra blanket. AC worked efficiently on very hot days/nights in July. A little noisy at night due to music at nearby bars & restaurants, and it didn't bother us, but some may need earplugs for sleeping. Like all pension rooms that we've stayed in across Turkey, this one could use more wall hooks for hanging things. Garden seating area with bird cages and trees was shaded and lovely. Pool in separate garden area is a bonus! All in all, we rate it very highly and would stay there again with no hesitation."
"Sehr gute Lage mitten in der Altstadt von Antalya. Alles fußläufig erreichbar. Sehr nettes Personal."
"Lovely place. Lovely owners. Great location"
"Okay"

"オーナーが（特に日本人には）色々教えてくれたり面倒を見てくれるので快適に滞在できる。 朝食は一応朝8時からということになってるが、だいたい9時くらいから。 中庭ではwifiはバッチリ使えるが、宿泊した部屋では電波が入らなかった点が残念。 これはペンションの評価とは無関係ながら、はす向かいのレストランがライブやベリーダンスショーを夜中？までしていて、気になる人は眠れないかもしれないので、耳栓など持参するとよいかも。"
"Gidilebilir.Tuvalet kapısının kırık olması ve klimanın damlatması dışında çok büyük bir sıkıntı göremedim ama fiyat performans açısından çok iyi bir yer idi."

"
"1 günlük merkezi ve temiz bir oteldi bizim için"

"Fiyat performans.Herşey çok güzeldi, otel görevlisi, güler yüzlü ve oldukça yardımcı birisi ancak duvarlar çok ses geçirdiği için uyumak büyük bir sorun oluyor. (gecenin bir vakti temizlik ve düzenleme gürültülüsü)"
"Sehr freundliches Personal , Zimmer sind gepflegt Check in spätestens ohne Probleme."

"Memnun kalmadığım bir deneyim oldu.Çok daha iyi bir performans beklerken süzün siz ekonomik odayı tercih etmişsiniz diyerek en fazla bu olur size gibicesine bir oda verildi bize. Oda çok küçüktü, klima gürültülü çalıştığından ara dura kapatıp kafamızı dinlendirdik. Odada buz dolabı olmadığından gece canımız soğuk bir şey istese de maalesef ki içemedik. Temizlık konusunda fena değillerdi. Oda merdivenlerin yanında olduğu İçin diğer misafirlerin merdiven çıkarken konuştukları bizim odamızdan komple duyuluyordu. Antalya bölgesinde ve Türkiye’nin genelinde bu ücretlere konaklama yaptım. En memnuniyetsiz kaldığım otellerden biriydi. Bunlar kişisel deneyimimdi. Herkesin kişisel deneyimi ve fikri farklı olabilir tabiki. Konum olarak mükemmel bir konumda çok rahatlıkla her yere ulaşılabilir. Gece geldiğimizde resepsiyon görevlisi uyuyordu çok güvenlik beklemeyin odanızı kitlemeden uyumayın"

"Önceden de konakladığımız otel olduğu için tercih ettik. Otel sahipleri çok ilgili ve her istediğiniz konuda yardımcı oluyor. Ayrıca otelin güzel bir terası ve restoranı var oralarda vakit geçirebilirsiniz. Her şey için teşekkürler"
"Great location and friendly staff."

"Resepsiyondakiler ilgiliydi. Konaklamamızda hiçbir sıkıntı yaşamadık. Sadece minibar olsa daha iyi olurdu. Yan odaların ve koridorun sesi biraz fazla geliyordu. Odalar biraz küçüktü. Onun haricinde her şey mükemmeldi."
"Debería mejorar las camas, se sienten los resortes. Las toallas son muy ásperas, un poco de suavizante haría la diferencia. En general muy buena ubicación y por el precio el hotel es adecuado."

"2nachten verbleven ,goed onthaal,redelijke ontbijt(redelijke plateau da ze direkt klaarmaken als je aan tafel gaat) ,loopafstand van winkels,restaurants,strand,etc.kaer was ruim genoeg miste alleen tafeltje voor koffer op te zetten. Voor die prijs ,goed hotel"

"Temizlik çok iyi, oda dar, ama otantik. ek yatak istedik, sadece baza geldi,üzerine battaniye koyarak yatak yaptılar. 3 kişi için yeterli, 4 değil. Gece geç saatte çevre gürültüsü çok. Daha çok eğlence mekanlarına yakın olmak isteyen genç yada çocuksuz aileler için uygun. Kahvaltı almaya gerek yok, paketli reçel,peynir."

"Bra, du får det du betaler for.Hadde et bra opphold, hyggelige folk som arbeider der. Noe lav standard på bad, litt gammelt og slitt, men rent. God AC som fungerte uten problem. Veldig nær sentrum med klubber i nærheten, kan være en del lyd om natten."

"İyi, memnun oldum, tavsiye ederim.Bu otelde geçtiğimiz hafta 4 gün kaldım. Fiyatına göre çok iyi uygun ekonomik. Hizmet iyi resepsiyon 7/24 açık. İlgililer anlayışlı kibar ve çözüm odaklılar yardımcı oluyorlar. Odaların temizliği günlük yapılıyor, temiz. Odq temizligi Duş malzemeleri, pecete, havlu, çöp günlük kontrol ediliyor. Klima ve mini dolap var çay ve nescafe için kettle var. Havuz var küçük temiz Kahvaltı var başka bir otele bağlı yakın ve güzel Kahvaltı yapabiliyorsunuz önem verilerek hazırlanıyor çesit seçenek çok. Çevre aksamları hareketli kaleiçinde olduğu icin ziyaretci çok müzikli mekanlar var geç saatlere kadar ses oluyor fakat rahatsız etmedi. Merkeze yakın kaleiçi liman, konyaaltı, muratpasa çok yakın tramvaya yakın. Genel olarak fiyatına göre çevredeki otellere göre iyi. Tavsiye ederim."

"Good place for short stay in Antalya.Nice place in the centre, even parking was possible. The advantage is swimming pool and surrounding garden. The breakfast was also exccellent in adjacent hotel. The only problem was really very small size of hotel room."
"Her konuda yardımcı olduğunuz için teşekkür ediyorum"

"Fiyat/Performans Şampiyonu.Çok başarılı bir fiyat/performans oteli. Tek başınıza/grup olarak, kısa süreli ve yalnızca konaklama amaçlı bir otel arayanlar için ideal. Kaleiçi'nde olması nedeniyle hem limana hem de ulaşım araçlarının geçtiği güzergahlara çok yakın. Otobüs ve tramvay kullanarak birçok yere ulaşım mümkün. Otel personeli son derece kibar ve güleryüzlüydü. Odalar oldukça temiz. Tek kişilik yatak konforluydu fakat yastıkların içine biraz daha dolgu eklemek gerekli. Baş içerisine gömüldüğü için neredeyse yokmuş gibi olabiliyor. Odanın günlük temizliği, havluların değişimi zamanında yapıldı. Yakındaki barlardan gelen sesler rahatsız edici olabiliyor fakat bu da yine kişiden kişiye değişebilecek bir etkiye sahip. Kahvaltı aynı otel grubuna ait Puding Otel'de yapılıyor ve harikulade bir çeşitliliğe sahip. Sadece sunulan kahvaltı imkanı bile tercih sebebi olabilir. Konaklama ücretine kıyasla çok iyi. Akdeniz'de olduğunuzu hissettiren zengin bir kahvaltı var. İş, gezi, konaklama amacıyla gelenler için çok iyi bir f/p seçeneği. 'Tatil ve deniz' için gelenlerin alternatif sahil ögelerine bakması önerilir."
"Perfect location.! Great staff.! Nice hotel.!"
"The pool was beautiful, room was clean, and staff was nice and very helpful!"

"Aşırı gürültü. Uykusuz gece.
Bu yorumu okumadan rezervasyon yapmayın. Eğer seyahat amacınız Kaleiçi bölgesinde gezmek saat gece 1'den önce uyumamaksa, otel imkanları önemli değil sadece temizlik yeterli ise. Çalışanlar güleryüzlü, oda yeterli ve temiz, kahvaltı iyi, lokasyon harika. FAKAT bunlar dışında sabaha kadar eğlence mekanlarında iılmaz bir gürültü geliyor ve uyumak mümkün olmuyor. BU ÇOK önemli. Dikkate alınız."

"Mukemmel kaleicinin en iyisi.Genellikle puanlara bakarak rezervasyon yaparim.Dejawu otel temizligiyle ilgisiyle rahatligiyla konumuyla harika bir deneyimdi.Kaleicinde tek acik bufe kahvalti veren yerdir.Ama acık bufe paket bal tereyagi degil.Borekler pogacalar acmalar ve hepsini kendileri yapiyor 5 cesit.meyve sayamadigim kadar.peynir yani oyle bir kahvaltiya gitseniz otel parasi kadar odersiniz ama burda ucrete dahil.puding otel ve dejawu otel ayni kisiye ait ikisinede gonul rahatligiyla tercih edebilirsiniz."
"İşletmedeki çalışanların nazik tutumu, kahvaltı hizmeti ve genel konfor açısından çok beğendiğim bir yer oldu. Birdaha Kaleiçine gitsem yine tercih edeceğim bir otel."

"De ligging in het hartje van de oude stad is natuurlijk heerlijk al brengt dat ook geluids overlast met zich mee. Er zijn diverse clubs in de directe omgeving waar tot laat in de nacht harde muziek gedraaid wordt. Voor mij geen probleem, maar wees je ervan bewust. Super vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel. Alles netjes, schoon en functioneel. Het zwembad is klein maar doet wat moet doen. Jammer dat er geen drankjes verkocht worden, maar om de hoek zit een supermarkt. Hou je van rust, dan is dit overdag een prima plek. In de avond is het andere koek."

"Bu fiyata bu performans oldukça iyi.Personel güler yüzlü ve samimiydi. otelin havuzu sakin ve temizdi havlularda ufak tefek lekeler ve geceleri çevreden gelen şarkı sesleri haricî hiç bir sorun yoktu diyebilirim.sabah kahvaltıları harika . Uygun fiyata kale içerisinde olsun diyorsaniz kesinlikle tavsiye ederim"
"The hotel was basic, but clean and comfy and in a great location for the nightlife"

"Schönes Stadthotel.Schönes kleines Stadthotel in der Altstadt. Sauber und gepflegt. Mein Zimmer war ausreichend Groß mit Queensize Bett, Kühlschrank mit kostenlos Wasser (Nescafe+Tee aus kostenlos), Fernseher welcher nicht benutzt wurde und Klimaanlage. Bad war etwas klein, aber Ok. Draussen Innenhof Terasse mit kleinem Pool und Sonnenliegen und Sitzmöglichkeiten. Mitarbeiter waren sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, haben geholfen wo es ging. Frühstück wurde im Nachbarhotel gegessen, umfangreiches Türkisches Frühstück. Einzig negativ zu erwähnen ist der abendliche Musiklärm vom Umfeld, welches aber nicht auf das Hotel zurückzuführen ist. Ich hatte kein Problem damit und konnte dennoch schlafen. Alles in allem Preis Leistung sehr gut. Ich würde jederzeit wieder buchen."
"Nice property, pool, close to everything. Little noisy but whole area is. Nice city. Great breakfast included."
"Very new, part of the pudding hotel group. Great breakfast around corner at a buffet restaurant. Nice pool."

"Je vous recommande ce magnifique lieu, au cœur de la vieille ville d’Antalya. Je remercie l’ensemble de personnel qui a été très arrangeant et aidant (en terme de conseils pour les activités, les réservations de taxis ou encore mon early check out) pour ce fabuleux ce jour. C’est un lieu très calme en journée et idéalement situé. La nuit, il est à proximité des ruelles festives et avec des restaurants. Grand plus pour la piscine et le petit jardin méditerranéen qui permet de se reposer et relaxer à toutes heures de la journée! À grand merci pour l’accueil et je recommande à 100%"
"Kesinlikle antalyaya yolum tekrar düşünce burda konaklayacağım. Çok güzel ağırlandık. Tavsiye ederim."

"Ses yalıtımı çok kötüydü. Temizlik iyiydi otel çalışanları da güleryüzlüydü."

Also when the cleaning was done "cleaning" she just put the dirty mopp In the swimming pool."

The staff there is really friendly and helpful, we had an issue with our trip to Cappadocia and although we didn't book it through them, they gladly assisted us and swiftly provided an alternate solution at no cost. "The hotel is in a quiet living area, kitchenware is complete, rooms are very clean, well furnished, the staff is very attentive, thank you for every thing"

"Excellent rooms friendly and helpful staff, close to a shopping mall and many restaurants with minutes of walking"

"Nice hotel in a quite neighbourhood.The Nox Suite is a nice hotel in Antalya, near the shops. The room was spacious with cooking facilities (stove), a dishwasher washing machine and full size fridge-freezer. Plenty of storage space for clothes and in the kitchen area, space from groceries and cleaning supplies for the washing machine and dishwasher. An in-room safe was available. The bed was very comfortable. Housekeeping kept the room clean when requested. On site space for parking is available, although limited to a few spaces, that said, I still found a space. Parking is also possible the street outside. The air-conditioning worked well. Continental breakfast is available. Lastly, there is a pool with a patio area. The property is in a quiet neighbourhood. I recommend this property, the staff were friendly and helpful. The hotel is not far from Antalya Airport (AYT). Time to travel by car to and from the airport varies depending on the time of day, it took me about 25 minutes around 5.45am. On another occasion it took me longer due to traffic around the airport. Still, a very convenient option if you want to stat close to the airport."

"We just came back from a week in Antalya. We had an amazing time there. The hotel is beautiful, new and clean. Staff is really helpful and friendly and solved small snags quickly. We stayed in one of the 3-bedroom suites on the top floor and it was really comfortable to have such a good space. AC was powerful and showers had good pressure. The kitchen has some basic utensils. The only thing missing was a microwave oven. We used the washing machine and could dry clothes in the balcony. The pool is small but felt very private. My daughter improved her swimming in a week just by being able to spend time in the pool 2-3 hours a day. The breakfast was fine, I had omelettes every day made to order (had to pay extra but cheap). We rented a car and having an underground car park meant the car was never exposed to the sun. Lots of shops and restaurants nearby though and the TerraCity mall a short walk away. Beware July was hot, very hot. A dry heat though but 39-40 every day. First time in Turkey for us and wanted to stay away from all-inclusive resorts and have more control on our time."
"Nice location, some damages to the property and the cleaning could improve but amazing customer service. Amazing stay overall."
"Un super hôtel, avec un service de qualité et un personnel au top."
"Sehr zu empfehlen.Alles super, sehr nette Mitarbeiter und das Frühstück sehr ausgewogen und umfangreich."
"Good!It was so good to stay. There were many restaurants and shopping malls nearby. We could cook for dinner. Very clean and modernized room. We would like to revisit this hotel."
"Konforlu ,temiz ve sakin, çalışanlar oldukça ilgili."
"Otel gayet temiz ve konforluydu sadece havuz çok küçük ve odalar biraz küçük ama temiz ve sessiz personel ilgili ve özellikle Fatma hanıma ilgisinden dolayı teşekkür ediyorum"

"Gerçekten çok temiz konforlu bir apart otel, iletişim güzel, tenizlik her gün yapılmakta ailecek veya çiftler için çok uygun bir küçük tatil oteli. Tek hayal kırıklığı havuzun boyutu oldu yine de çok keyif aldığımız bir konaklama oldu, sorta otele teşekkür ederiz."

"HIGHLY RECOMMENDED HOTEL (trust). I rarely leave reviews, but this hotel actually deserves it. First and foremost the staff was really nice and respectful. They was very helpful with what they could provide. We were group of 3 (20-25 y/o) and they greeted us a warmth welcome. This place is relative the best hotel u can get by its price and size, and trust me when I say roomsize wasnt a problem. Though outside of the hotel wasnt any special; the location was great. It was very central meaning groceries, resturants, and nescessary needs was really close. It also was really close too the beach (10 min walk). We didnt include any breakfast due to surrounding resturants nearby. So we cant say anything on the food. But the yard was really nice and cozy. There was a small pool with artificial grass around. The tables and chair was clean, and we could easily enjoy our snack or food in peace. This was an apartment hotel, so u can really get alot of space even when you’re 4 people. We got a suite/room with 3 beds and 2 sleeping sofas. We got a kitchen, bathroom, and basically 2 living rooms from 1st floor and downstairs. There were cleaners everyday, and there were no complaints during our stay, even when we were banging music all the time, and made a heck of a mess. This hotel was really worth the time and economy, and last thing said highly recommended :)"
"Hotel was great,all staff were lovely, had no problems apart from the rooster next door waking me up every morning, i am planning to return in 3 months."

"L’appartamento nel complesso è buono, abbastanza nuovo in stile moderno e letto rigido al punto giusto. Tuttavia abbiamo trovato sporca la zona della cucina che non abbiamo mai utilizzato. La cosa terribile era il cattivo odore che ci accoglieva al nostro ritorno, dopo una lunga giornata. E non c’era verso di farlo andare via: ce lo siamo respirati per tutto il periodo della vacanza. La struttura è un po’ lontana dalla spiaggia di Konyaalti, ma con i bus la si raggiunge in una mezz’ora circa. Il prezzo è stato ovviamente invitante, motivo per cui abbiamo scelto l’appartamento."

"Choosing this hotel based on online reviews turned out to be a mistake for me. There were no nearby shops, cafés, restaurants, or transportation options. The hotel building has four floors, accessible only by steep spiral style stairs. As a middle-aged overseas traveler arriving after a long day of driving, this was particularly difficult. Although the hotel staff kindly helped us reach the fourth floor, the stair access—even to the third floor—did not meet the standards expected of an international commercial building. Room: The room was newly renovated and had a fresh appearance. Bathroom: There was water leakage in the shower booth, leaving the floor wet after each use. Amenities were poor—no shampoo or conditioner provided, only body wash. Breakfast & Service: One staff member greeted guests with a forced smile and responded to my attempt at morning conversation with, “Search in Google, I’m busy,” which felt dismissive and unwelcoming for a first-time visitor to Antalya. The breakfast consisted of a single plate with freshly cut watermelon and tastless cakes. Turkish tea and coffee was always available breakfeast time. Dinner quality needs improvement, and drinks are priced at typical hotel rates."

"Nous avons passé, moi et mon épouse, 3 semaines à Antalya. L'hôtel était parfait durant nos 3 semaines de sejour. Le petit-déjeuner, inclus dans notre sejour, était exquis, avec un excellent turkish coffee pour débuter la journée. Le personnel de l'hôtel était parfait et se comportait merveilleusement bien. Le manager s'efforçait pour que notre sejour se passe parfaitement et je le remercie de sa bienveillance. Je prenais aussi un plaisir à discuter la nuit avec Mehmet, un salarié du personnel, à l'entrée de l'hôtel. Ces instants me manqueront car nous ne voyions pas le temps passé tant nos discussions étaient passionnantes. La chambre avec balcon était parfaite et propre (seulement, il serait intéressant de passer tous les jours l'aspirateur car par moment, nous retrouvions encore des cheveux sur le sol). Hormis ce detail, la litterie et la chambre sont parfaites. Enfin, la piscine est le petit plus de l'hôtel. Cest une grande piscine, spacieuse et l'eau etait propre et chaude. Un excellent hôtel que je recommande et ne manquerai pas de revenir dans cet hôtel à l'occasion dun prochain séjour à Antalya."

"I booked this place on a hunch, and it turned out to be one of the best decisions of my trip. The hotel is brand new. Everything is spotless, thoughtfully designed, and incredibly comfortable. After two months on the road, I had the best night’s sleep yet thanks to an actual real blanket (finally!) and a quiet, cozy room that felt like a true refuge. Breakfast was generous and fresh, and the atmosphere has just the right amount of fellow travelers to feel alive without being crowded. It exceeded my expectations so much that I extended my stay for another night. It’s clear they care, and I’m happy to be one of the first to say that this place deserves to be known."

"Globalement correct mais manque de propreté.
Nous sommes restés 4 jours à Antalya pour un petit break familial avant la rentrée scolaire. L’hôtel est proche de la mer (à peu près 7 minutes de marche, pas plus) et le petit déjeuner est très correct. L’accueil de l’hôtel est courtois. Pas de problème niveau service. Piscine propre et accessible toute la journée jusqu’à 19h30. Nous avions une chambre côté rue et malheureusement nous étions juste au dessus du Pub Irlandais qui jouait de la musique sympathique certes mais la résonance était malgré tout très présente et ce passé minuit. Nous étions dans une chambre non-fumeur, une des deux seules chambres non fumeurs de notre côté de l’étage et malheureusement selon qui sera votre voisin, vous aurez l’odeur de la cigarette qui rentrera dans votre chambre. LE gros point négatif est la propreté. La moquette des couloirs à chaque étage n’a pas été aspiré depuis on ne sait quand et nous n’avons pas vu les femmes de ménage avec un aspirateur ou un balai une seule fois lors de notre séjour. Le sol de notre chambre n’a pas été une seule fois nettoyé correctement. Hôtel avec du bon et du moins bon mais le prix est tout de même trop cher pour le manque de changement de serviettes et de nettoyage des chambres lors du séjour."

Check-in and check-out went smoothly. Koray also assisted us in reserving a taxi to our hotel in Alanya at prices cheaper than Uber. More importantly, he kindly checked in on us both upon our arrival in Alanya and when we returned to Antalya Airport. The area is still under construction, but there is a cafe and supermarket within a 10-minute walk. We did not hear any noise, thanks to the double-glazed windows."

"Kaliteli ve Nezih.Gerçekten güzel bir daire, merkezi, hem sahile hem wğlencw alanlarına yürüme mesafesinde. Temizlik mükemmel. Daire içi bütün donanım mevcut. Hatta iki arıza vardı, musluk ve çamaşır makineai hemen hallesildi, çamaşır makinası sıfıe bir makina gönderildi. Kültürel bölgelerin tam ortasında. Hemen yanında bir paek var ve koşu pisti var. Sooeumu yaptım ve güzel yüzme havuzuna hemen her sabah girdim,harika oldu. Klimalar çalışıyor, sahipleri ilgili. Temizlik görevlisi Elif Hanım neredeyse hergun isteğimiz olup olmadığını sordu. Yeşillikler icerisinde huzur verici. Fiyat performans mukemmeldi. Daire sahiplerine telefon ile veya kisa mesaj ile ulaşabildik, dönüş yaptılar. Swneye tekrar düşünürüm ve herkese tavsiye ederim. Sadece redldansa ait görünen spor kompleksi yoktu, o da karsi tarafta parkta aletler olunca benim icin cok farketmedi."

"Tam eglence merkezlerine ve kumsala yakin olmasi acisindan iyiydi.Apart tarzinda mutfak malzemeleride vardı kettle ve banyoda sabun yoktu site icinde yesil ve havuzu olan bir yer Aslinda fiyatına göre yetersiz diyebilirim"
"Fiyat performans süper.Genel olarak sessiz huzurlu bir yer . 2 çocuk ile rahat ettik. Odalar ferah. Sadece odalara kahve makinesi koyulmalı. Bir de karıncalara çözüm bulunsa süper olur."

hotel_name: Belek 07 Luxury Suites Only For Family
review_text: "Wij hebben enorm genoten van ons verblijf. De accommodatie was schoon, zeer gastvrij en straalde rust uit. De inrichting is met veel smaak gedaan en zorgt voor een fijne, ontspannen sfeer. In de woning is werkelijk aan alles gedacht – je merkt dat er met zorg en aandacht is gewerkt aan elk detail. Alles functioneerde perfect, van de apparatuur tot de voorzieningen. De ligging is ook ideaal, met winkels, restaurants en andere faciliteiten op korte afstand. Daarnaast ligt het verblijf dicht bij Land of the Legends, wat het perfect maakt om te combineren met een bezoek aan dit fantastische park. Ideaal voor een dag vol plezier en ontspanning daarna in een rustige omgeving. Kortom: een toplocatie waar we zeker nog eens terug willen komen!"

hotel_name: Holiday Inn Antalya - Lara, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "This was my first time solo travelling, and I was sexually harassed, assaulted, and stalked by another guest during my stay at Holiday Inn Antalya Lara. Despite reporting this multiple times and even pointing out the individual, and despite the hotel confirming the incident through CCTV footage, the hotel refused to remove him and refused to call the police. They did not even offer to change my room, even after he discovered which floor I was staying on. Instead, staff were dismissive and kept making excuses like “we can’t do anything without management” while telling me “nothing will happen to you” and “this is a very safe hotel.” It gave the impression there is no policy to protect guests: even in cases of serious crime, you are left waiting for management to make a decision that may never come. The perpetrator remained in the hotel throughout my stay, approaching me again in front of staff, leaving me unsafe and unprotected. This not only put me in danger, but also other guests. After leaving, I contacted hotel management in writing but was ignored. I deliberately waited before posting this review to give them the chance to apologise, take responsibility and do the right thing. They did not. Guest safety is clearly not a priority here. I strongly advise against staying, especially for women travelling solo."

The location is a little bit far from things, a 1 hour bus ride to Old Town, 2 hour bus ride to Land of Legends. But overall a really great hotel."
