"Highly recommended. -Prefect stay -Highly recommended -Spotless clean -Covered car park"

hotel_name: My Home Hotel Antalya City Center
review_text: "The staff was very helpful, even before I arrived they helped arrange taxi service from the airport. They carried my luggage up the steps to my room. The breakfast is traditional but also includes eggs and is plenty. It is in a great location and very clean. I would stay here again."

hotel_name: My Home Hotel Antalya City Center
review_text: "Först tänkte vi att bo tre nätter men sen bestämde vi att bo på detta fina hotell under hela vår vistelse i Antalya. För oss var detta hotell mycket bra. Trevlig och hjälpsam personal speciellt Ahmet som var mycket hjälpsam och trevlig. Han gjorde vår vistelse till ett fint minne som vi aldrig kommer att glömma. Tack för allt ❤️"

hotel_name: My Home Hotel Antalya City Center
review_text: "Elendig hotel.Så elendig. Man sov på fjedre hvilket gav massive rygsmerter. Værelset var lille, man følte sig lukket inde i et kosteskab. Morgenmaden var kedelig. Total overpris for det man får. Vil fraråde dette hotel, tænker at et hostel vil give mere."

hotel_name: My Home Hotel Antalya City Center
review_text: "Very helpful staff. Limited parking available, but staff assist in finding a spot. Good Mediterranean breakfast. Vegetarian options plenty. Good location in old town. Small room, but adequate."
"Samimi, temiz ve becerikli işletmecilik.Aile konaklaması için her şey düşünülmüş. Bulaşık süngerinden çamaşır ipine kadar her şey mevcut. Mükemmel temizlikte, personel çok samimi."
"Nice and clean"

"This is our second time here. We were disappointed at first because there is no longer a swimming pool (the separate neighboring building with the pool was being leased before). But the Sea is only a short 10-minute walk, which is much better anyway. Staff is always friendly and helpful though their Russian is better than their English. They do not accept credit cards. Check-in is early which is a big plus and the cost is cheaper than others around. It is an apart-hotel which means there is a kitchenette and a washing machine. Overall, I recommend and will stay there again."
"Güzel.Ailemle Apartta kaldım. 2 gece güzeldi. Bi sorun yaşamadım. Rahat ettim"

"Anbefaler ikke ..Værelserne var beskidte, blev ikke ordentlig rengjort . Håndklæder og sengesæt blev ikke udskiftet under opholdet . Meget ringe morgenmad. Eneste positive var deres pool som var god til børn."
"Hotel was clean but breakfast choice was quite limited"

"Dirtiest hotel I've ever seen. Service people were nice, particularly the lady named Aybuke and a young man whom we met at reception and they did their best to help us. But every corner of the hotel was the dirtiest I'd ever seen in my life - floor, bathroom, shelves. Looks like food bowls, containers and cups were washed by hand every day - there were spots on everything at breakfast buffet. When we arrived, the trash bins on our floor were literally stinking and were removed only the following day. We stayed here for 3 days and there was a bad smell of trash on our floor every day. This hotel needs to be properly cleaned."
"Great location, close to local buses and trams. Staff professional and pleasent. Room neat and tidy, daily maintained . Nice pool and quite neighborhood."
"Çok teşekkür ederiz. Hizmetleriniz çok mükemmel. Resepsiyon, restoran, ve temizlik elemanı hizmetleri profesyonel."
"Ren fin bra service stort sortiment frukost"
"Çalışanlar cana yakın ,güler yüzlü,fiyatına göre iyi bir hotel"

"Het was een heel fijn hotel. Er werd elke dag schoongemaakt. Het eten was zeer gevarieerd en heerlijk. Chef Mithat was erg attent. Het was op loopafstand van veel bezienswaardigheden. Ik kan dit hotel iedereen aanbevelen."
"Kötü bir yer"
"Clean property but high food prices in the hotel"

"I would suggest labelling the buffet foods with dish names and ingredients. There was no labelling on anything. So, I couldn't try most food as I didn't know what was what. Another funny one is there is no mirror in the rooms. One small mirror in the bathroom is not always enough. staff are great though. They help when help is requested. Rest of the times they can be seen chilling. All the men at the reception were great. The only one lady in the reception made me feel like I was wasting her time! This should not happen when in customer service role. The lady was NOT good"
"Breakfast and dinner both was terrible , my both kid got sick from the food"
"Old furniture smal air condition no ac in one room"
"The room was very clean. Food was good in dinning area. Pool a little to small."
"Leuke hotel dichtbij strand en stad"
"Wir fanden das Buffet mittelmäßig. Fü Familien gut geeignet. Personal sehr nett. Zum Strand ca 20 min Fußweg. 3x am Tag fährt ein Transfer hin und zurück."
"Nice place clean fresh comfy"
"Sehr angenehmes kleines „Familienhotel“. Es ist ruhig, sehr angenehm. Essen ist reichhaltig und abwechslungsreich und gut. Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Gerne wieder."
"Nettes freundliches Personal und nah am Strand."
"This was a nice place to stay for a few days transit. Tram and buses easily accessable."
"Dejligt rent og gode faciliteter"

"Top Lage, super Hotel! Hotel top! Lage Top! wir hatten kein frühstück nur zum übernachten und fürs Pool gebucht! Die Lage war besser als erwartet. Mitten in der Stadt. Bazar zu fuss erreichbar, Strand zu fuss erreichbar, die Clubs, Pubs und Bars und Kaleici welche bekannt ist für das Nachtleben auch zu fuss erreichbar. haben Kein taxi benötigt. taxi in antalya soll auch wohl sehr teuer sein, nicht vergleichbar mit istanbul."
"I would recommend this property to everyone. Just take it if you like to have a pleasant vacation. Thank you for this days Suit Laguna Hotel."

"Hotel is in a good location, 20 mins walk to the old town or jump a taxi right outside reception, plenty of small supermarkets, pharmacys and other shops close by for essentials. Its clean and looked after and being on my own, the area is safe at night, even at 3 in the morning!! They offer a free transfer to local beaches, didn't use it but its there if you want it. Room was good enough for the price, cleaned each day with fresh towels, coffee, tea, sugar and bottled water, buy some milk locally, aircon was good enough. The wifi was good, staff friendly, the pool although small was clean with comfy sun loungers. Breakfast was a little lacking, dont expect a full English, saying that you wont find one in resort either so its par for the course. Had a look at the evening meal and same goes so full board isnt worth it, there are loads of restaurants in the old town, didnt find them at first but when i did i had a ball, Dubh lin bar sells Guiness!! Roberts coffee is worth a visit for dinner, go to the end of the street towards the sea, cross the road and through the security barriers slightly to the right, modern and the foods good. Only downside is theres a Mineret very, very close to the hotel so 4.30am its full blast call to prayer, i was in direct line on the 6th floor overlooking the pool, you have been warned!! Happy travels."
"Hotellet passar för övernattning innan nästa flyg. Inget lyx. Omtänksam personal."
"Hat mir super gefallen war für eine Nacht da"

"Mittelmäßig.Nur oberflächlich geputzt, ziemlich herunterkommen, draußen stinkte es extremst nach fäkalien und das Fenster war offen somit stinkte es im Zimmer auch ziemlich und roch die ganze Nacht unangenehm"

"Super Service, laut (Flugzeuge), super gelegen! Das Hotel ist super central am Flughafen gelegen, ich konnte sogar mit mini Koffer zu Fuß die knapp 3 Kilometer hinlaufen, da mir nach dem langen Sitzen nach Bewegung war. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, es gibt ein Café, Restaurant und kleinen Shop mit dabei. Das Zimmer ist geräumig und sehr sauber, aber leider gab es nur zwei Kleiderbügel, keinen Stuhl im Zimmer zum Sitzen, einen Tisch auf dem großen Balkon und der Wasserkocher ging nicht. Meine Bitte, ihn zu ersetzen, wurde zwar gehört, aber nicht umgesetzt. Schade. Im Bad gab es kleine Annehmlichkeiten (Seife, Zahnkit etc)., die Bettwäsche war sauber, die Matratze bequem. Das Hotel liegt direkt in der Ein- und Abflugschneise des Flughafens, das war mir klar und bewusst, und die Flugzeuge über dem Haus machten mir deshalb nichts aus, da ich sie liebe, wer aber Lärmempfindlich ist, dem ist diese Unterkunft nicht zu empfehlen, die Flieger gehen echt direkt über das Haus! Für Planespotter dafür ideal! :-) Der Abschied war etwas holprig. Ich habe am Vorabend dreimal nach einem Shuttleservice zum Flughafen um 03:30 Uhr am Morgen gefragt, dreimal wurde mir das bestätigt, am nächsten Morgen ging das dann aber aus irgendwelchen Gründen nicht, Uber war nicht verfügbar und man bot mir an, für 10€ zum Flughafen zu fahren, oder ein Taxi zu rufen. Ich habe dann das Taxi rufen lassen und zahlte dafür mit Trinkgeld umgerechnet 5,20€"
"Alles war super nette personal gerne wieder"
"Je recommande, pas loin de l'aéroport et du mall d'Antalya"

"Sauber und gut, aber schlechte Umgebung.Hotel, Zimmer und Ausstattung waren sauber und sehr gut. Das Hotel befindet sich nahe am Flughafen, ist jedoch nur per Auto erreichbar. Die Bilder sind irreführend, es gibt keinen Pool. Neben dem Hotel befindet sich ein Restaurant. Ich habe mich als alleinreisende Frau etwas unsicher gefühlt, da die Umgebung sehr heruntergekommen ist und im Lokal nur türkische Männer saßen. Ungefähr alle 10 Minuten fliegt ein Flugzeug im Landeanflug sehr niedrig übers Hotel, auch in der Nacht. Der Zugang zum Balkon war mit Hilfe eines Stuhles blockiert. Ob das zum Schutz vor Einbrechern war, weiß ich nicht. Aus diesen Gründen fand ich den Preis zu hoch. Für eine Übernachtung im Anschluss an einen Flug ist es in Ordnung, sollte aber günstiger sein."

"Hotel itself was very clean and tidy, not much around there to see or do but okay for a night if flight is delayed. Food and service in the restaurant was superb in the evening. Next morning however was a different story, could not take advantage of some of the facilities as they had a power cut so it was very uncomfortable in the 40 degree heat with no air conditioning, cold drinks and couldn't get food as they were unable to cook. Would have given a higher rating if they offered some sort of discount but still charged full price for the stay."
"Personnel très serviable et agréable de jour comme de nuit."
"Great deal for the price"
"Oteli bir aile işletiyor. Çok güleryüzlü ve yardımcılar. Biz havaalanına yakınlığı sebebi ile bir gece kaldık. Memnun kaldık."
"Basic, very very basic"

"Sea view is fantastic but market is 5 miles from here, nice restaurants next to hotels hotels AC is takes long time to cool down the room temreture. Staff dont smile except cleaner , staff is helpful."
"Trevligt hotell som uppfyller förväntningarna. Rummet var rent och sängen bekväm. Inget spektakulärt, men ett bra och prisvärt val för en kort vistelse. Tack för oss"
"Amazing sea view, conveniently located near beach and all the restaurants."
"Es war alles super, sehr freundliches Personal. Ich würde dieses Hotel jederzeit wieder Buchen"
"all perfect"

"Convenient location but there was no sounds barrier. There was no circulation in my room, AC wouldnt properly cool the room and the bathroom has a strong smell. The view was absolutely beautiful. But not the same level of service you’d get from a normal hotel."
"The staff was very attentive!!"
"Amazing view and close to the beach."
"teşekkürler, her zamanki standart.."
"Konum ve karşılama çok iyiydi "

"I enjoyed my stay here. The view is amazing from the right room. The staff are very kind. Speak English well. I did have some issues with the internet going out and knocking me off while I was on work video calls (more than once 😫) but when I mentioned it to staff, they reset the router and that seemed to work. Good restaurants and bars in walking distance. Easy to catch a taxi here. I recommend this place."

"Lara’da konum olarak harika civarında her şey mevcut 3 gün konakladık plajlar 15 dk uzaklıkta alkollü mekanlara yakın kahvaltıcılara yakın. Biz çok memnun kaldık odalar seçeneklere göre bizim gibi sadece uyumaya giden biri için güzeldi. Odamız günlük olarak temizlendi havlular değiştirildi sadece şampuan vs yenilenmedi. Odalara ekstra eklemeler yapılabilir. Güvenli ve merkezi bi yerde olması tercih sebebimizdi. Teşekkür ederim."

"Bir gece konakladık. Tertemizdi. Karşılayan bey çok kibardı. Deniz olanağı çok da iyi değildi.Denize girmeyi düşünmenden kalacaksanız ok. Otelin bulunduğu cadde üzerinde herşey var. Manzaralı oda tercih edin. Klima temiz havlu Bu fiyata daha ne olsun."

"Manzara gerçekten resimlerdekiyle bire bir aynı . Klima yeterli derecede soğutuyor . Terasta gün batımı ve gün doğumu çok keyifli . Sabah resepsiyondaki beyefendi de çok ilgiliydi. Kesinlikle tercih sebebi"
"Alles gut"
"This is a great place to stay. Super super clean. Nice staff. Great value."
"I was disappointed there was no breakfast included"
"Amazing views from the balcony!"

"Great venue.Clean quiet breathtaking views convenient to great restaurants coffee shops Taxi service car rental. 24/7 service restaurant close by. The cleaning staff and reception are very attentive. Excellent."
"The staff are extremely kind and helpful, the room is super quiet considering it’s in a party district. Overall one of the best experiences I’ve had while traveling!"
"Check in ve check out çok hızlı gerçekleşti. Oda temizdi. Sadece çok hafif bir sigara kokusu vardı. Otel konum olarak çok başarılı. Merkezi bir konumda idi."

"My opinion: 1. Nice friendly staff. 2. Rooms need small repairs (painting, fix cabinets, door lock needs tightening 3. Rooms and hotel needs a deep clean, sweep and mop floors, window seals need cleaning, floor corners need cleaning, pull couch and bed out to clean, just pull everything out of the room and clean really good 4. Old and worn furniture needs to be replaced ( needs new rug and couches). 5. Power outage during my stay. Power was out about 5-10 minutes. 6. Room smelled like cigarette smoke"

"Eine schöne Unterkunft mit sehr netten Personal. Lage top! Haben uns wie zuhause gefühlt. Bei Sonnenaufgang oder Sonnenuntergang saßen wir auf der Terrasse. Ein Traum. Eines der schönsten anblicke die wir je gesehen haben."

"Klima sorunu.Odadaki klima asla soğutmuyordu. Bebekle gittiğimiz için klima çok önemliydi çünkü bebek asla uyuyamadı her tarafı pişik oldu. Gece otelden çıkıp araba klimasıyla rahatlatmaya çalıştık. Resepsiyondaki çalışana durumu söyledik ancak yapabilecekleri bir şey olmadığını söylediler en azından müsait bir odaya geçirebilirlerdi."

"This is a new property that was opened too early - some of the parts of the building are still under construction. Most importantly, the staff did not receive adequate training to provide basic hotel customer service. For example, the receptionists tried to charge me twice for the prepaid room. The young inexperienced servers at breakfast lack basic restaurant waiting skills - mix up orders, very slow, and do not have basic communication skills. The management should invest some resources to train their inexperienced staff. Some of the positive things that stood out: - very good breakfast a la carte menu - nice interior design of rooms - good quality toiletries, including dental kits - bathrobe and slippers are available - reliable internet, TV has Netflix and other internet based apps - pool/beach towels are available - good size of the swimming pool and plenty of chairs available - most of the staff speak good English (except for the young servers waiting tables in the morning)"

"I like my stay , and I will come back again.the stay was Sweet and comfortable, all the staff was helpful, and the hotel is new ( furniture and building) the breakfast was delicious, and thanks for Noor in the reception"
"Yeni bir otel elbette eksikleri var ancak güler yüzlü, samimi ve saygılı ekibi ile oldukca başarılı buldum. Özellike odaya getirdikleri kahvalti cok guzeldi. Tebrik ediyorum."

"THE PRICE DOESNT REFLECT THE PROPERTY !,BYPASS .4 night stay was not that good . I spent most of my time at the hotel next door..This was due to the attitude of the monkey at the entrance to the restaurant part of the hotel ,on the beach side . As a resident i was invited to some party , and me and my friends atrempted to go and have a look to see whether or not it was worth a visit . We had a look over the cliff and it was quite empty, but the monkey told us it was busy and to come back tomorrow. Reminded me of when i was a kid trying to get in pubs . " your name is not on the list " scenario . Between that and the tiny "Deluxe " room it was terrible. I would never stay there again !,"

"El insaf.Geçen seneye nazaran pek memnun kalmağımı belirtmek isterim. Hotele geldiğim anda hiçbir şey ikram edilmedi. Geçen sene gelir gelmez odaya soğuk su meyve tabağı ikramı gelmişti lakin bu sene hiçbiri yoktu. Bu durum beni rahatsız etti."
"Gutes und nettes Personal."

"From the moment we reached lucky monkey hotel, it was disappointment after disappointment. Firstly the beds did not come with any sort of comforter and none were provided when requested upon. The windows of the hotel were left open leaving 100's of insects to enter the room leaving sleeping near impossible. Thirdly, prices constantly changed from what was advertised, when looking at prices for massages by the hotel they seemed reasonable but when approached to pay for the service they were unreasonably increased. Lastly and the worst, we paid for this hotel because of the beach advertised, when we went to go use the beach we were met with a hotel staff who was incredibly hostile with us treating us incredibly rudley and worst declining entrance to use the beach. Initially he didn't even believe we were guest but after proving we were he told to come back after 2 hours after we reserved a spot, after coming back two hours later he still refused entrance for us even though there were spaces and the guests and had clearly changed showing he did not take our reservation seriously. Incredibly disappointing, could not use any of the services advertised, rude staff and disappointing food service as well. Would never recommend this place for anyone staying, especially if they are planning to book because of the beach or the food."

"Konum olarak oldukça başarılı ve merkezi bir noktada yer alıyor. Ancak ne yazık ki konaklama deneyimimiz beklentimizin oldukça altında kaldı. Odada bulunan kahve setup’ında su ve temel ikramlar yer almıyordu; 3 kez söylememizin ardından iletildi. Temizlik konusunda ciddi eksikler vardı, özellikle banyo hijyeni ve detaylara gösterilen özen yetersizdi. Duş alanındaki giderin tıkalı olması gibi basit ama rahatsız edici problemlerle karşılaştık. Otelin potansiyeli yüksek ama hizmet ve temizlik açısından kesinlikle geliştirilmesi gerekiyor"
"There are a large number of dogs living near that caused me loss of sleep though their constant barking. Shame as it is a very good hotel."
"Excellent.Very comfortable"

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Beach view"

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Bir yıl önce aynı otelde ailecek konaklamıştık, odalar temiz değildi ve banyo/WC sürekli kötü kokuyordu. Sigara içilmeyen oda istememize rağmen yoğun sigara kokusu vardı. Aradan bir yıl geçti, tekrar konakladık ama hiçbir şey değişmemiş. Banyo havalandırması çalışmıyor, yan odalardan sürekli gürültü geliyor. Yataklar geçen yıl gıcırdıyordu, bu defa daha da kötüydü. Hatta gece yarısı oda değişikliği talep ettik, başka oda verdiler ama sorunlar aynen devam etti: sigara kokusu, gürültü ve yatak gıcırtısı. Yan dönmek isteseniz bile ses çıkıyor. Kısacası, burada kalmayı düşünüyorsanız en az beş kere düşünün derim. Kesinlikle tavsiye etmiyorum."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Pour un sejour plage/piscine. Tout le personnel est professionnel et très sympathique, à l'accueil, au restaurant, les femmes de chambre. Les chambres sont grandes et propres. La piscine en extérieure est grande, avec suffisamment de chaises longues. Seul bemol au niveau de la piscine, le carrelage est très glissant, il faut vraiment faire attention. Le petit dejeuner est varié et bon. Le restaurant du dernier etage est bon mais il était en rupture de 2 boissons (dont un jus d orange frais!) et d'un dessert, dommage surtout que la carte n'est pas immense . Il y a plusieurs excellents restaurants aux alentours. Il est facile de se garer puisqu'il y a un grand parking. Une bonne adresse."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "The place OK Since it was in such close proximity to Lara beach which was an absolute must visit. The pool was also nice but everything else seemed a bit outdated (the rooms, amenities etc) the pictures we saw before going are old and not an accurate representation but again for the location it was ok, a bit overpriced."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Die Lage des Hotels ist wirklich gut, allerdings merkt man dem Gebäude und der Ausstattung das Alter an. Besonders die Dusche war leider nicht zufriedenstellend – kaum Wasserdruck, und das Wasser verteilte sich unkontrolliert. Hier wäre eine Modernisierung sehr wünschenswert."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Akşam yemeği berbattı. Otel personelinin akşam yemeğinde sadece gelen kalabalık uzakdoğu (çin) turist kafilesi ile ilgilendi. Yemek yememiz için bizi pis bir masaya oturttular. Servis kötüydü, yemekler kötüydü. Kimse ilgilenmedi. Sinekler havada uçuştu. Su servisi yapılmadı istememize rağmen."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Crowne plaza markasına güvenerek yaptırmış olduğumuz rezervasyon ve konaklamamızda maalesef hayal kırıklığı yaşadık. Öncelikle otel eski tadilat ve bakım gerekiyor. Otadoğu ya da arap ülkelerinden çok misafir vardı ve çok gürültü yapıyorlardı."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Booked this hotel and had to cancel just 12 hours later due to a medical emergency. Despite the short time frame and extenuating circumstances, the hotel refused any refund or even partial credit. Zero flexibility, zero empathy, and unhelpful communication throughout. Disappointed and would not book here again—especially given how many other hotels in Turkey are far more understanding and responsive."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "We really enjoyed our stay at Crown Plaza Antalya Hotel, Staff are amazing nice very helpful, and very welcoming, they deliver to our room platter of fruit at our arrival, and a big cake few days after to celebrate our marriage anniversary and also breakfast take away on our departure day as we left early in the morning, the hotel has a splendid on the sea and swimming pool. We enjoyed jacuzzi in our room it was a very nice surprise as we didn't know before our arrival. Definitely we do all we can to come back with our kids. Thank you for everything."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Güzel bir anıydı. Otelin konumu harika, havuzu temiz ve nezih. Tünel vasıtasıyla havuzlu alandan direk beach’e geçiş olması güzel. Odaları çok ufak yada bize ufak oda denk geldi bilemiyorum. Ama kısmen deniz manzaralıydı. Herşey yolunda gidince seyahat planımızı uzattık. Bu konuda resepsiyonda bize yardımcı olan Ali beye teşekkür ediyorum. 10. Kattaki restoranda yemek çok keyifliydi ful deniz manzaralı güzel bir ambiyanstı. Bana göre tek eksik kahvaltıda yeterince seçenek olmayışı, ala carte restoranta menü içeriğinin kısıtlı olması ve de kahvaltı salonundaki görevlilerin soğuk davranışları. Ama yine de genel olarak memnun kaldık. Teşekkürler Crown Plaza."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "The hotel was nice and clean, right by the beach. Beautiful view from the small balcony. The breakfast buffet was very good with lots of choices. Large swimming pool. I liked the rooftop restaurant - the atmosphere there was really nice, with a great view, live music, and cocktails. The rooms need some updates, though. Also, when we arrived at the hotel, no staff came to greet us or help with our luggage. That said, I would stay again."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Good visit but renovation is required"

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Excellent hotel on the beach."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Great"

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Otelde geçirdiğim süre boyunca her anımdan büyük keyif aldım. İlk adımımı attığım andan itibaren güler yüzlü personelin sıcak karşılamasıyla kendimi çok özel hissettim. Resepsiyon işlemleri oldukça hızlı ve sorunsuzdu. Odam ise tertemiz, ferah ve oldukça konforluydu. Özellikle odanın manzarası ve dekorasyonu gerçekten etkileyiciydi; hem estetik hem de işlevsellik açısından dört dörtlüktü. Otelin genel atmosferi huzur vericiydi. Ortak alanlar düzenli olarak temizleniyor ve hijyen kurallarına büyük özen gösteriliyordu. Kahvaltı ise tam anlamıyla mükemmeldi. Her damak zevkine hitap eden zengin bir açık büfe vardı; taze meyveler, sıcak börekler, peynir çeşitleri ve daha niceleri… Ayrıca kahve ve taze sıkılmış meyve suları da kahvaltıya ayrı bir keyif katıyordu. Personel son derece nazik, yardımsever ve profesyoneldi. Herhangi bir isteğim olduğunda hemen ilgilendiler ve çözüm odaklı davrandılar. Bu da otelde kendimi evimdeymiş gibi hissetmemi sağladı. Eğer sakinlik, konfor ve kalite arıyorsanız bu otel kesinlikle beklentilerinizin çok ötesine geçecek. Gerek tatil, gerek iş seyahati için mükemmel bir tercih. Tekrar konaklamak için sabırsızlanıyorum"

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Hotel is very convenient area with the beach right across the street. There is an underground tunnel from that takes you to the beach if crossing is an issue. Room is comfy and the view of the beach is beautiful. The girl at the travel desk was also extremely helpful. She did a good job explaining to us all the nice areas and which areas to avoid due to being a tourist trap. She also spoke arabic and gave us good instructions on how to use taxi services in the area. Overall great hotel and good staff. Although the food could be a bit better since it can be pretty bland at times especially the dinner options. Breakfast was better with many options to choose from. Overall would give it 9/10 experience."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "We travel a lot, and I’ve never experienced a hotel that inconveniences its guests so much. First, you can’t charge anything to your room. Second, staff disturbs you constantly calling or knocking on your door to disturb you. Third, it’s really hot. Like, REALLY hot…in the lobby, dining, elevator, and even rooms. When you go somewhere they turn the air off (which doesn’t work very well anyway) and it takes hours to cool off the room. When you get back from a hot excursion, the last thing you want to experience is a hot room. We had more than one bad experience with the guy who books airport transfers, Semir (I think?). The man who took our bags and got us water when we first arrived was extremely kind and helpful. Shoutout to him. The hotel is beautiful, and the tunnel to the beach is a nice addition. Just why do they keep it so hot?"

Bf sent flowers from Cicek Sepeti on my bday the receptionist didnt accept it. Although Osman bay did celebrate my bday with a nice cake after finding that out. hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Property needs upgrades & updating. I booked a six night stay, but checked out after one night. It was 43° outside and it does not seem the property had an air-conditioned lobby so I found it uncomfortable and oppressive the rooms looked like they had not been updated or upgraded for decades after my late night check-in I went to the bar for a lemonade, and they made me pay for the drink before they even served it… I have never seen service like that before. So that my review is fair and balanced, the front desk and sales manager did approve my early check out after one night and I received fast credit for my six night booking… Five nights were immediately credited. Another positive is that the pool area looked nice, but Antalya in July is overrun by families with screaming children and toddlers throwing tantrums and so I am certain a day at the pool would be unpleasant based on the crowd I saw in the restaurant during breakfast"

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Excellent place to stay with your family."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "We are one family and booked 3 rooms, repeated anticipated requests to be at least near each others, On CHECK IN , reception scattered us on 3 different floors, far away from each other, despite much begging. it was week day and not weekend, they didn’t even try to accommodate us in the same floor. This is a business hotel, not a leisure resort, access to a tiny narrow public beach, with no offered umbrellas though connecting underground tunnel from hotel pool, tunnel closes early at 6:00 pm, then, the way to reach the beach road outside where leisure and activities are, is from main hotel entrance which is in the back street, and needs long walk around. In Such similar cases, the hotel contracts private beach and provides shuttle bus to guests. Here it does not exist and not provided. No leisure, parties or activities at all, which is common there in Antalya. Lobby air conditioning turned off daily early in the evening, where outside temperatures above 40 c. Careless housekeeping, every day they should forget something: water bottles, towels.. You need to call to avail. Key card system failure most of the times, it doesn’t open the room door , You need to go down to front desk to re-validate. Only 2 restaurants are there. Breakfast and dinner are ok, but breakfast staff need more training and courtesy. 10th floor dinner staff are gentle and friendly. Rooms are comfortable and spacious, sea and pool views are amazing. Balcony is narrow just to stand on."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Everything about this hotel is 10/10! The service, the staff, the hotel, the view, the everything! The staff are very professional and very nice specially Nejla and Volkan. They always welcomed us with smile and happiness."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Property is located in a quiet area away from everything. Property is old and this can be seen everywhere. Elevator takes long to get in it. Bathtub was leaking. The didn’t replenish the water in the room daily. We used the iron and it blew a fuse and took the power off in the whole room. We asked for a new iron and it took 25 minutes and by that time we didn’t need it anymore as we had to check-out. The manager advised she would have called back regarding the iron but never called. Extremely poor service. 3 star hotel."

hotel_name: Crowne Plaza Hotel Antalya, bir IHG oteli
review_text: "Though the property is excellent, the service was completely not up to par. I would call reception and kindly ask them questions, and in response I would receive ‘don’t call here call room service’, and end the call abruptly. On the off chance they would reply, they would come up with very patronising and rude remarks, such as, ‘maybe use google to answer your question’. It does not just extend to the reception however, but each place other than the spa was completely rude and incompetent. At poolside, I kindly asked for a towel, to which I waited 45 minutes for. In the end I gave up and walked back to the hotel room soaking wet, with the guy I asked, staring at me and smiling. Whilst going past the reception on my way back to the hotel room, I heard a family of 5, being shouted out by one of the ignorant staff members, saying, ‘this is a 5 star hotel, what to you expect’. Whilst I do not know what the conversation was about, I sure as hell know that you would not be so foul to a customer, especially in public. The reception would often laugh at customers as well, such as my wife, who walked soaking wet back up to the hotel room due to being ignored 4 times for a towel. Overall, whilst the hotel itself is lovely and in a beautiful location, it does not make up for the absolutely poor service. I will mention however that the people at the spa, were absolutely fabulous and maybe the reception desk need to learn a thing or 2 or 10 from the reception at the spa."

review_text: "would not recommend this hotel. It is not a 5 star hotel It should be rated at 3 stars hotel. Stayed here from May 28 to June 1, with my young daughter and a friend and her son. It was the worst experience at this hotel. The first night the washroom smelled like sewage the curtains in the room fell no window covering called front desk, and only could offer for technician to come and fix it the following day Housekeeping would come and clean our room every day never use any cleaning products never disinfected. She used our dirty, wet towels to wipe everywhere down the sheets smelled horrible. When I expressed to her to use disinfectant and cleaning products in the bathroom, she said OK, but never did ( there was a language barrier ) every day when we would go out and come back our key fob to enter our room would not work They would send random men, the bell boy room service to come and open up our door for us with the master key, which was a safety issue for us. He explained it’s because we put our key fob too close to our cell phones, which was ridiculous. Two days of our stay they had a really big storm rain and the rooms were flooding. The dining room was flooding the hall. The lobbies were leaking water that hotel is just falling apart. yes, it’s an older hotel but the maintenance of that hotel is unacceptable. When I complained to management My complaint was not taken seriously. No one has contacted me in regards to this matter it’s been over a week ."

"Avoid this place – not worth it! The location shown on the map is completely misleading. If you follow it, you’ll end up at a construction site. Finding the actual hotel—especially in the dark—was incredibly frustrating and took a lot of luck. Once we got there, things went from bad to worse. The room was dirty and covered in hair of all kinds (I won’t even speculate where some of it came from). My child grabbed a glass to get some water and it reeked of alcohol. The bathroom was absolutely filthy—moldy, with no soap or shampoo provided, just a rock-hard sliver of soap covered in pubic hair. It was genuinely one of the most disgusting places we’ve ever stayed. To be fair, the staff were kind and welcoming. But they are clearly not the ones responsible for the way this place is being run. Whoever is in charge should be ashamed. This place has no business being listed on Expedia or any reputable booking site!!"

hotel_name: DoubleTree By Hilton Antalya City Centre
review_text: "very safe for families and good location."

hotel_name: DoubleTree By Hilton Antalya City Centre
review_text: "Comfy.Amazing hotel in the area, very clean and comfortable with amazing service and friendly"

hotel_name: DoubleTree By Hilton Antalya City Centre
review_text: "Pleasant stay. Pleasant stay, nice location, the only negative point is that the staff did not tell us about the shuttle to Konyalti until the last day, we have took taxi every day back and fourth. It would have been nice if they told us about the service. Nice pool, sauna, hamam they have."
"Otel biraz eski"

"Positiv: viel Platz im Zimmer und gute Ausstattung, ein sehr gemütliches Bett, schöne Sicht auf's Pool, nettes Willkommensgeschenk, Transfer vom und zum Flughafen rund um die Uhr... Negativ: es war ziemlich laut"
"Tolles Hotel in der Nähe vom Flughafen. Sehr sauber. Schwimmbad und Gym sind ausgezeichnet. Abends hört man nur sehr die Flugzeuge."
"Amazing.Such a good hotel. Friendly and helpful staff. The room was clean and the service was amazing!"
"Venlig og hjælpsom med tidliglig i ind check. Tæt på lufthavnen. God morgenmad og aften buffe. Bruger ofte dette hotel til mellem landing."

"We have now stayed four times in this hotel, which is a perfect option for layover between the flights. It is a fantastic hotel with spacious clean rooms, wonderful (quiet) pool and a restaurant that covers both the buffet and a le carte options. The staff are very friendly, accommodating and professional. The only downside is that it is literally in the middle of nowhere with nothing around it, so you wanted to venture out, you will need to pay for a cab (40 euros for a round trip to Old town), plus the close proximity to the airport means you will hear planes taking off all night, which can make resting/sleeping difficult. But on the other hand the hotel is about 5-10 minutes drive from the airport, which some find convenient. We will definitely be staying here again."
"Ok hotel nårnman har tidligt afgang fra lufthavnen. Flink personale og god service til transfer til lufthavn. Super aftensbuffe."
"Convenient and affordable, quiet easily accessible"
"Matratze ist leider nicht mehr gut in der Zustand. :/ ansonsten mag ich diese Hotel sehr. :)"
"Dichtbij de luchthaven. Schoon en lekker eten."
"Teşekkürler.Havaalanına yakın olması çok iyi. Yemekler yatak konforu oda temizliği genel temizlik ve çalışanlar mükemmeldi. Teşekkürler"
"Buffet and the pool area was great. So conveniently placed for in and out of the airport."

"My room was palatial, with a beautiful view of the pool. The breakfast had a huge selection of food and I liked the option to be able to have dinner as well. If I had been staying longer, I would have enjoyed the SPA treatments. There was a small complimentary bottle of red wine in my room, which was a lovely surprise! As I am British, I would also have loved some milk to go with my cup of tea! But I really can't complain - I had a flight to catch but just wish I had been able to stay longer!!"
"Sehr gut"

"We stay at the IC hotel airport every year, we love the staff, the cleanliness of the hotel and the rooms. The pool is beautiful and they have the best breakfast and dinner options. Thank you for always welcoming us with warmth!"

"Very comfortable stay.The hotel is very nice. We loved the outside pool. There is a big spa, gym and everything you need. The bed and pillows were very comfortables. We didnt even hear the planes from the room, even if the airport is very close. The only thing is that it was hard to get drinks at the pool, partly because the waitress didn't speak english."

"Really nice property, very close to the airport with free transfer. A beautiful pool area, there is a gym spa and also indoor pool. Rooms are spacious, comfortable beds. Tea and coffee and fridge in the room. Breakfast starts early for those with early departures. Evening Buffett has a selection of hot and cold dishes, salads, 2kinds of soup and desserts, fruits, something for all palates."
"Helpful staff, relaxed environment, good buffet."
"Absolutely amazing hotel with fantastic facilities and most friendly and helpful staff! Love staying here!"
"Beautiful hotel great service"

"It was nice but...While my overall experience at your hotel was pleasant, and the reception staff were very helpful, I encountered a serious issue during breakfast that I feel compelled to bring to your attention. I ordered a cappuccino, which initially appeared normal, albeit overly foamy. However, upon finishing my drink, I was shocked to discover broken glass at the bottom of the cup. This is not only unacceptable for a 5-star establishment but also extremely dangerous—had I swallowed the glass, the consequences could have been severe. When I reported the issue to the restaurant staff, the language barrier made communication difficult. A colleague eventually stepped in, but the only response I received was an apology and an offer of Turkish coffee as a replacement, which did not address the gravity of the situation. I trust you will take this matter seriously and implement measures to prevent such incidents in the future. I would appreciate your acknowledgment of this concern and any follow-up actions you deem appropriate."

"Oda beklenti altında otel çok iyi.Junior Süit odada kaldık fakat oda umduğum kadar iyi değildi. Ayrı oturma alanı yazıyordu ama oturma alanı yatağın hemen önündeydi. Bahçe manzarası yazıyordu ama çok kötü yerlere bakıyorduk. Resimlerde küvet görünüyordu, küvet yoktu fakat duş baya iyiydi. Genel kalite temizlik son derece güzeldi. Oda servisi iyiydi. Oda servisinden istediğimiz ve minibardan kullandığımız sular için ücret almadılar. Çok önemli bir şey değil tabii ki ama nezaket olarak hoş bir şey. Uçuş saatimiz ve biraz rötar sebebiyle bir hayli geç çıktık, saat ikiye geliyordu fakat bununla ilgili de bir sorun olmadı. Bunu da takdir ettim."

"Havaalanına yakın ama doğayla baş başa.Otel havaalanını kullanacaklar için mükemmel konumda,mimarisi,havuzu ve ormanı ,kahvaltısı çok iyi,sessiz bir ortam arayanlar için ideal. Söyleyeceğim tek negatif şey artık bazı yerlerin renövasyon zamanı gelmiş."
"Great hotel, amazing pool and close to the airport"

"Kun positive oplevelser. Stille lille hotel med grønne have og svømmepul, på tværs af støj af flyvemaskiner der flyver tit, men det er klart, fordi det er kun 5 min kørsel fra lufthavnen. Gratis transfer. Men tage en af de gule taxa i lufthavnen og siger til taxamend, at holel betaler. De har sådan aftale. Det er nemt. Man kan spise buffet aftensmad for 22 euro."
"Sehr schönes Hotel. Große gemütliche Zimmer mit sehr guten Betten. Tolle Pools. Tolles Abendsbuffet für 22€."

"Relaxing, high quality airport stay.This was my 3rd short trip to this hotel and, once again, it met or exceeded all my expectations. Hotel pays for yellow cab from airport, so journey is quick & easy. All staff, from reception to restaurant to housekeeping to pool & gym are delightful and do all they can to please and to ensure guests’ needs are met and stays are enjoyable. Rooms are traditional in style, which adds to their cosiness and charm. They are spacious & clean with modern facilities, air con, fridge, kettle, tea & coffee, many with either pool view or woodland and effective double-glazing that insulates from both the aircraft noise from the nearby airport, the traffic noise from the adjacent main road (if your room overlooks the front of the hotel) and the intense heat from the summer sun. Restaurant offers an extensive breakfast, lunch and dinner buffet (€22/20/22 extra if not included in room rate) and all public and pool areas are bright, spotlessly clean and comfortable. I didn’t use the gym, hammam or massage services but I understand they are good. If you’re looking for a comfortable stay in a beautiful, natural setting, with great food and friendly staff, then look no further. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay/s and look forward to returning soon."
"Amazing staff and very good food"

"We have a home in Antayla,and always stay at IC if we arrive late,or have an early flight back to UK,never have we had a bad experience the staff are all fantastic,rooms are so clean,restaurant is fantastic cannot fault this hotel,we will return again in September,and look forward to seeing ibrahim and everybody else"
"Som vanlig et fint opphold. Kjempeservice i resepsjonen og restauranten"
"Çok keyifli ve güzeldi."
"Immer wieder gerne!"

"Great Airport Hotel! Rooms are spacious and clean, breakfast already starts at 4, ideal for an early flight. Transfer to the airport is done via taxis, which the hotel covers, so there is no waiting time for other guests. Overall, everything one could ask for at an airport hotel."
"Kaikki ok"
"great"
"Great choice of hotel especially if you would like to be near airport. I have stayed here lots of times and I would always recommend very friendly staff."
"Temiz ve sevecen bir evde kaliyormuş gibi, düşünün."
"The restaurant food was excellentseems to have improved a lot since oyr last stay ."
"Welcoming, polite, very helpful staff. Great place to stay."
"Prima hotel, we komen hier vaker en het bevalt iedere keer uitstekend."
"Amazingly helpful staff"
"Gesamte Unterkunft"
"Hotel is good for a night next to airport"
"Sehr nette Personal und Service"

"Wir sind nur ein Tag vor unserem Flug geblieben. Die nähe des Airport war ausschlaggebend für die Buchung und ich kann mir auch das Hotel für ein Urlaubsankunft vorstellen. Sehr ruhig und sauber. Das Pool war sehr groß und sauber meine Kinder hatten sehr viel spaß. Werden definitiv wieder kommen. Wir hatten Frühstück gebucht. War sehr vielfälltig. Wenn man Abendbuffet haben möchte hat es 20€ gekostet 10€ für Kinder. Getränke waren sehr günstig, Dosen haben 2€ gekostet Coktails 4€ . Hambürger war 8€ etc. Man muss nicht all inklusive Buchen die Preise waren gut."
"Tried hamam last year and it was fantastic! Went this year again and it was even better than i remember. Everybody is so kind, the food is amazing, the pool is awesome."

"La struttura offere la colazione inclusa, le camere sono molto spaziose. Prima di arrivare in hotel ci hanno informato che arrivando dall’aeroporto col taxi giallo, lo avrebbe pagato l’hotel, sono stati gentilissimi. E anche se si trova molto vicino all’aeroporto, con le finestre chiuse non si sente tanto. Al uscita dal hotel ( nel caso devessimo andare in aeroporto) ci offre lo shuttle organizzato gratuito. Sono molto soddisfatta dalla scelta del hotel. Grazie mille."

"First of all I knew what I book.... means, close to the airport ("lot of" airplanes)... i was there with my childs which are teens. The transfer to and from the hotel by yellow taxi's are paid by the hotel. The rooms are clean, you have tv, clima, insect screen/protection in front of the window, spa, training room, room cleaning every day, big pool, breakfast in lot of variants (taste is ok or average), the people are friendly and respectful, the reception works and helps directly if you need something. So this hotel is for me definetly an alternative for me. By the way we use a rented car to arrive the beach (Konyaalti) which needs around 25 Minutes."

"Uçak seyahatimize göre oteli tercih ettiğimizi söylemem gerekir. Konumu avantajlı. Check-in işlemleri oldukça hızlı. Odalar temiz ve gereken konforu sağlıyor. Sunulan yemek hizmeti temiz ve kaliteli. Personel son derece kibar. Bu nedenle memnun kaldığımızı söyleyebilirim."
"Excellent hotel 🏨"
"Eine großartige Gelegenheit, zwischen den Flügen bequem zu entspannen"
"Fantastisk"
"Gewoon goed!"

"WOW! This hotel was 10 outta 10 for my needs! I would have loved to stay longer, but it was just a quick overnight in-between flights. I was upgraded to a Deluxe Room, which was very premium and supplied all amenities, dessert and a coffee station with water. Next the hotel pays for the taxi to and from the airport (contact them directly for details). Even though online it says the breakfast that is included starts at 7am, in fact it starts at 4am! So I was able to try some delicious Turkish buffet food before leaving for my plane at 5:15am. (contact them to confirm this is the same for your trip.) The place seemed very large, spacious and safe to me. If I'm in the area again, I would definitely stay here without a doubt!"

"After flying through Atlantic Ocean, this the perfect place to get rest and to relax. It is super clean, comfortable, and quiet even next to the airport. IC Hotel has indoor and outdoor pools, hamam, steam room, and sauna. It is a perfect place for everyone."
"Рекомендуем.Очень хороший отель. Большой бассейн, вкусные блюда и большие порции при заказе в номер. Персонал работает на высоте"

"Bu kadar ilgili ve elinden gelen her şeyi yapan personel alkışa değer. Resepsiyon görevlileri çok iyi karşılayıp özellikle oda yükseltme konusunda çözüm odaklı oldular. Restoran bölümündeki servis personeli çok ilgili ve kibardı. Özverili personel otelcilik sektöründe kilit personeldir diye düşünüyorum. IC hotels persenoli kesinlikle övgüye değer bir performans sergiliyor"
"Nice place"
"Exactly what was needed for an airport hotel."
"Very professional love the staff they did everything to help! Also the facility is spectacular"
"Memnun kaldık.Otel konforlu ve temiz ,çalışanlar ilgili ve saygılı,kahvaltı çok güzel,akşam yemeği gayet güzel ve makul fiyattaydı."
"We always use this hotel when travelling via Antalya to the UK. Service is friendly and prompt. Great pools inside and out. In the Winter we often get an upgrade"
"Close to airport - free shuttle service, 5 minutes. Spacious rooms, nice open air area to breathe, wonderful turkish meals, friendly staff."

"Amazing gorgeous hotel with beautiful spa and phenomenal breakfast buffet! Everyone is very nice and friendly. Room service 24/7, taxi, everything just great you feel like a king/queen in a Palace there! Bravo!"
"Everything was perfect"

"I'm frequent traveler and I was very pleasantly surprised with this hotel. From the moment I arrived, I was greeted warmly and offered an upgrade without asking due to my Expedia status. The room was clean, luxe and stocked with everything anyone could ask for (toothbrush, toothpaste, shaving cream and razor, shampoo, conditioner, body lotion, shower gel, free water, tea, coffee, tissues, and more. There were different lighting modes and large bathrobes that improved the comfort. The bed was comfortable and warm. It felt like sleeping on a cloud. The next day, I was provided free buffet breakfast with lots of great options and then was able to enjoy the gorgeous pool and beautiful facility surrounding it. This hotel is a haven that's a close to the airport as you can get. I ordered room service for a late lunch. I got a cheeseburger with fries and it was prefect. On the day I left for the airport, I was given a shuttle ride which was prompt and the driver attentive. I had spent a week in Kemer before staying here and I must say that this hotel is by far better than most hotels I have visited around the world. Thank you, IC."
"Veramente un albergo di alto livello. Libertà assoluta e rispetto e gentilezza verso il cliente. Un servizio taxi da e per aeroporto eccezionale. La camera comoda e pulita. Avrei dato più stelle."
"Good hotel"
"Immer wieder gerne.wir waren öftes hier und wir lieben dieses Hotel! Frühstück gibt es ab 04:00 Uhr. Manchmal bekommt man auch Zimmer Upgrade."

"This is an excellent hôtel to stay in by all means, and not just for its proximity to the airport. Big thanks to the whole team. The only possible improvement would be by providing more confortable matelas for the sofa beds which we needed as we were traveling as a family of 5 persons (senior suite)."

"Buffet dinner was delicious and the service great. Beware, ask for laundry prices prior to pick up. It was unexpectedly expensive 90 euros and it was only one load of laundry. Pool area was relaxing and quiet. Ideal location to catch an early flight out in the morning. The shuttle arrived promptly and took us to the airport quickly."
"Great place to stay near airport.Personal was flexible and allowed early checkin without fee. Early breakfast was provided at 3:30am which was useful too. Airport shuttle was free and fast."
"biraz daha temizliğe dikkat istiyor. kahvaltı vasat"
"Mycket nöjd kund.Underbar vistelse! Allting var i linje med perfektion!"
"The room was very hot, especially at night. The air conditioning was turned on at maximum power, but the temperature did not drop below 22 degrees. This is very bad."
"Excellent hotel for an airport hotel, I was surprised at how beautiful and nice this hotel. Highly recommended."

"Hotel olarak harika, ailecek kaldığımız süre içerisinde resepsiyon daki olsun servis tarafındaki ekip güleryüzlü ve işlerini severek yapıyorlar. Kendilerine teşekkürlerimi sunuyorum. Kahvaltı gayet güzel Restaurantta ki yemekler çok lezzetli. Fiyat olarak da gayet makul."

"Her şey çok güzeldi. Personel ilgili ve güler yüzlü. Odamız trmiz ve beklediğimden büyüktü. Her gün temizlediler. Havuzu çok güzel. Kahvaltısı çok güzeldi. Kesinlikle bir daha gidersek de tercihimiz bu otelden yana olur"
"Otel gibi, otel. Makul fiyata kaliteli hizmet."

"Amazing hotel with beautiful pool and great restaurant. Very close to the airport and transfers are included. Very nice spa with best message I even had! Will stay here on our next trip. Highly recommend."

"Otelin konumu amacına hizmet ediyor.Çevre ve ambiance mükemmeldi.Personel güler yüzlü ve yardımsever. Tek eleştirebileceğim şey otelin eskimiş olması havlular,klima eski kalmış. Çok memnun kaldık,rahatlıkla tavsiye edebilirim"
"Every requests perfect supported: Very very customer focused"
"Nice hotel"
"Class hotel,all facilities .food.pool,gym,spa..the atmosphere.its close to the airport so its far from the center."
"Very good"
"Very nice friendly personal, great if you are having early/late flight."

"A very comfortable stay.The hotel is one of the comfiest places in Turkey I’ve stayed at. It is simple but everything is very tidy and modern, with a pretty large pool and no crowds. They clearly thought about the location, cos the pool is surrounded by a forest and has very good shade in the morning and late afternoon, so swimming was super comfortable even in the +37 degree heat, there was even cool breeze. The food was very tasty, with rather diverse desserts for a standard Turkish buffet, and I also tried there a la carte options which was even nicer. The people almost everywhere speak good English which is rarity in Antalya, and everyone was very helpful and nice. I was even given a deluxe upgrade for free. Also, a seemingly little thing but it’s the first Turkish hotel where they provide a bath sponge in the room apart from other useful stuff. I think it really deserves its four stars."

"酒店很漂亮，有超大的泳池，自助早餐是我在土耳其一行中吃过最丰富的，房间为正常标间大小，隔音效果不错，但设施有些老旧，有些地方需要维修，我们的房间淋浴花洒高低调节的装置松了，无法调整花洒高度，一进门的廊灯也是坏的，会一闪一闪的，除此以外酒店的配置还是很好的，有很多空乘人员在这里入住。我们选择这里的原因是因为要搭乘早班飞机，而且这间酒店提供非常便利的机场接驳服务，如果有搭乘早班飞机的朋友，我还是很推荐这间酒店的。"
"The hotel is about the only option for a comfortable and convenient stay in Antalya airport area. Rooms are spacious and clean, plenty options at breakfast."
"Heel dichtbij de luchthaven, en ik kreeg gratis taxi van het hotel. Ontbijt en diner opties waren overweldigend! En ik vond het personeel heel professioneel en behulpzaam."

"A good “airport friendly” option with good connectivity and a great breakfast. Great gym, indoor pool, steam & sauna offering. A proper lounge/bar offering would improve things! Bearing in mind its’ primary function the staff need to be more global in their language offerings."
"Goede locatie en netjes."
"overnight making air travel connections.Perfect."
"The location is perfect for the airport. I only stayed a couple of hours so cannot comment on full facilities but those I saw and used were excellent."
"Ailece uçuş öncesi ve sonrası konakladığımız iC hotel. Her defasında memnun ayrıldığımız! Tavsiye ederim."
"Very nice hotel, clean and modern. My kids and I loved the pool on a hot day, good food and transfer from/to the airport. Thank you."
"good"
"As usual perfect. Upgrading. Personnel perfect. Halil Ibrahim a perfect waiter in the restaurant."
"Very nice and friendly personal. Swimming pool fantastic. Food excellent. My room was on the very busy road side. That made stay little less good."

"The hotel is located a bit outside the airport. Nevertheless, the location is pleasantly quiet. The house is modern and very clean. I had a Nommer which was very spacious. The breakfast included in the price was varied and great. The staff was very friendly and helpful. I can recommend the hotel with a clear conscience and will definitely come back."
"sehr empfehlenswertes Flughafenhotel! war für eine Nacht da, vor Rückflug, super empfehlenswertes Flughafen-Hotel!"

"On arrival, the hotel made a great first impression—stylish, welcoming, and true to its boutique charm. Our room matched the photos perfectly and felt both comfortable and unique. The swimming pool was a good size and never overcrowded; a few extra sunbeds would have been nice, but that’s just being picky. Breakfast was very good, with a wide variety to suit all tastes. The front desk staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful, making our stay even more enjoyable. The location is excellent—just a short walk to the old bazaar, with endless dining options nearby. Overall, we had a fantastic stay, would happily recommend this hotel, and would definitely return."

"Öncelikle artısı ve eksisi olan bir otel artısı sakin bir otel kahvaltısı güzel ve çalışanların güler yüzlü olması eksisi ise otopark sorunu otopark otelden uzak, bina dışarıdan güzel gözükse de içi restore edilmeli yenilenmeli eski bazı aksesuarlar çalışmıyor ve çoğu şeye bakım yapılmamış."
"Fint hotell med god beliggenhet og fint bassengområde. Litt små rom og veldig enkel frokost. Veldig trivelig og hjelpsom vertinne."

"The A/C did not work at some point. We waited until late for someone to try to fix it. We had to ask for another room instead of waiting for so long. Then the problem was sorted. But from there the new r offered room was smaller than we had previously."

"Billederne snyder!!! Hvad der skulle have været en romantisk getaway, blev til et mareridt. Vi valgte hotellet for dens centrale beliggenhed og de flotte billeder, men ved ankomsten fik vi et værelse, der slet ikke svarede til vores reservation. Værelset var ekstremt lille, uden plads til vores kufferter, og vinduet kunne ikke åbnes. Receptionen viste ekstrem irritation og kunne ikke hjælpe, så vi måtte vente til næste dag. Den nat fik vi ikke sovet, og næste morgen blev vi tilbudt et nyt værelse på første sal. Selvom det var større, blæste aircondition direkte på sengen, og vinduet vendte mod hotellets støjende kompressorer, hvilket gjorde værelset ubrugeligt. Vi blev derefter tilbudt et tredje værelse i kælderen, som var fyldt med kloaklugt og fugt. Personalet anerkendte problemet, men gjorde intet og vi forblev på værelset resten af vores ophold. Det skabte desværre en dårlig stemning for resten af vores ophold. Hotellet er ifølge vores oplevelse ikke værd at få 4 stjerner. Det er slidt, dårligt vedligeholdt, og det eneste positive er den centrale beliggenhed. Poolen er lille, og morgenmadsbuffeten er skuffende. Billederne på nettet er vildledende; hotellet lever ikke op til forventningerne. Vi vil ikke anbefale stedet til nogen."

"At first night We got a room in the «basement», which was completely different from the photos. It was really small, only space for a bed for 2 people, and it smelled bad. Told the staff that We didnt want this room as it smelled and didnt look like the photos. Was told that it was nothing to do, unless i wanted to pay 2000 liras for upgrade to junior suite. They told me to wait for the next morning for changing the room. The day after we changed room to the second floor as wanted, and the room was much better. But disappointed that you pay the same price and can Get either the first room We got which was really bad, or a descent one that looked like the pictures. I was also shocked that they didnt offer a free upgrade to junior suite as they had several rooms, and We only wanted to change room for our first night as We were told that We would change to another standard room the day after. The bed also made a lot of noise. The location was really good, central near everything, and right next to good restaurants and old-town"
"Staff was very helpful an everything was easy to get by , great location that I pick , would highly recommend this hotel"
"Hôtel très bien situé en bordure de la vielle ville. Nombreux restaurants autour. Personnel très sympathique."

"Excellent.Rooms are very clean, service daily. General Manager (Seda Besjazali) is Excellent. She makes sure all guests are comfortable and answers all questions and help needed. She goes above and beyond to ensure guests are satisfied. Very good breakfast and Valet parking at no cost to guests. Both are important when traveling."
"Misleading information from staff. Do not tell you what is chargeable from initial check in and charge at check out. Spoiled our stay in the end."

"A lovely place, in the heart of the most central area in Antalya. You can get anywhere without the need for public transportation. The hotel itself is a boutique hotel. Tastefully designed, excellent service. I will definitely choose this place again"

"The property seemed a lot smaller than pictured, the pool specifically. The staff were friendly and they offered us an upgraded room when we checked in. The breakfast was included but the options were a little limited. The location was perfect, we only spent 2 nights here as we moved onto Istanbul. It was a decent stay. The bed was amazing!"
"Good location however the rooms do not have any hooks, tower rails or soap holders: truly shocking. I hurt my shoulder hitting the tap of the shower …"
"Fantastiskt läge med fin pool, wifi fungerade inte på rummet tv med dåligt bild, annats dock ett fint hotel!"

"I visited with my husband and kids and we really enjoyed our stay. It was walking distance from everything. Their staff was very helpful and friendly. They even helped us arrange a visit and pick up shuttle for the Turkish Hamam. Thank you!"

"They gave us a very bad room, it's humid, small and smell bad, it's located in lower ground and looks like a separate area (with 2 other rooms) compared to the rest of the hotel. I don't know if they gave this kind of rooms to Expedia customers or we were just unlucky. The area is very noisy speciallly on the night and it smelled cigarettes everywhere Honestly, it was a bad experience and were very disappointed The positive point in this hotel is housekeeping (room cleaning) and breakfast."

"Yine tercih ederim.Otel biraz eski olmasına rağmen, kale içinde tercih edilebilecek iyi seçeneklerden biri. Dışarıda ki kalabalık ve gürültü içeride rahatsız etmiyor. Resepsiyon da girişten çıkışa kadar her konuda çok yardımcı oldular. Otopark olması iyiydi. Kahvaltı saatini kaçırmamıza rağmen mutfak personeli de bunu sorun etmeden yardımcı oldu. Tüm personele teşekkürler."

"Do NOT stay here.Stayed for 3 nights while on vacation, instantly regretted choosing this hotel. It does not look like the photos, the beds are barely more comfortable than a box spring mattress. Cigarette burns in carpet, and with carpet in the shower/bathroom area that gets wet so it didn’t smell great. We requested to be refunded so we could stay at an actual 4star hotel and they refused. It’s 2star rooms even in a suite, with a nice pool. Most of the staff were very nice however and location is great. False advertising though is shameful."
"Litet hotell med nära till allt.Perfekt ställe om man är själv på resandefot , det är nära till barer , resturanger , stranden osv."
"Personel çok ilgiliydi, odanın temizliği de güzeldi, kahvaltısı da çok lezzetli. Teşekkür ederiz"
"Bueno! Lindo hotel de paso, la gente excelente, muy amables"
"Mükemmel bir otel konforlu lüks hizmeti süper her konuda yardımcılar her seferinde kullanacağım bir yer"

"Nice property, great staff, good location.Very nice service and attention from all the reception staff. The property is located in what we thought was a nice place, near many restaurants by the hill, and the waterfall of Caglayan. We stayed in a standard room and it was simple and comfortable, with AC, exactly what we were looking for as we planned to spend little time in it and enjoy more the outside. Local style breakfast was enjoyable. We had a small miscommunication when booking the transfer from airport to hotel as per booking, but the reception staff was helpful in advising the best solution."

"Disappointed with the size of the pool and the delux suite had ripped and missing curtains on rhe balcony. The jacuzzi wasn't working properly as bits were missing. Tv in delux bedroom no channels.. Sink in bathroom leaked over floor which made me slip over and now my toe is very painful and bruised I informed of the tv problem and ended up waiting 3 days for german channels. We checked out early Our stay was for a week but we checked out after 3 days as not worth the price"

"Amazing hotel to stay at in Antalya! The location is perfect with a sea view and a short walk to the beach. 6min walk to the main road to make use of public transport(busses). Main toad also has so many restaurants and shops. There is a nice bar that serves food and drinks right next to the hotel and a little shop. There are also many cute, less commercialised restaurants within minutes from the hotel. The staff were super friendly and helpful. They offer towels for the pool on request and serve drinks all day. The location of the hotel is perfect, short walk to the main road but in a quiet and peaceful area. We will definitely stay there again!"
"Overall a nice hotel. Large rooms, cleaned to a fantastic level everyday. Great staff, bar on site etc. The pool was a welcome relief from the heat. Breakfast was good although a bit basic."

"Greit hotell for kortere opphold.Fikk tildelt rom i bygningen over gaten. Rent og relativt nytt hotell, men allerede preget av noe slitasje, spesielt på badet, som kan tilskrives valg av dårlig kvalitet på interiørløsninger. Bassenget ser bra ut på bildet, men realiteten er at det ligger 2 meter fra gaten og innbyr ikke til bruk."

"The room was nice, spacious and clean. The location was okay, but removed from sights and the beach. The pool is not much of a pool and I wouldn’t let my kids go in it. It’s tiny and it was surrounded by adults who were drinking all day and hanging out. Seems like a popular hotel for travellers to recover at after getting their teeth done or plastic surgery. Would not return."
"Fantastic hotel, beautiful rooms. The only thing that was the terrible rowdy drunk British tourists who have no regard for other guests."
"It was in a convenient location for my needs. The staff were all very friendly and helpful and i enjoyed my stay."
"Die Lage war top Personal super lieb und hilfsbereit"

"Came to Turkey for surgery stayed at this hotel for 3 nights with my daughter great quiet location but many beautiful views and restaurants near hotel , rooms were lovely , staff friendly and very pleasant. Would stay again . Great value for money ."

"We stayed at Espina Hotel for our honeymoon and it was a dream come true. The service was excellent and the room facilities were outstanding. I would recommend this hotel to anyone who would like to stay in Antalya."
"Das Hotel war hervorragend."
"The staff was so mean and unhelpful."
"Very good atmosphere"
"Nice and clean rooms. Close to some good restaurants. Also close to mall. Recommended."
"Nice hotel"

"They have very friendly and nice staff very helpful The hotel nice and clean"

"Good location in Lara district. I had the premium suite which was spacious and had a seaview."
"Brand new"
"2nd visit , everything still a good standard"

Not just having a really nice breakfast the people working there are absolute angels and made my stay a millions times better. Shout out to them. My flight was 7 hours before checking yet they gracefully gave me a place to crash with no extra charge, then when it came to check in I realized they had given me a better room than what I had booked with a see view. I would deffo recommend staying here, there’s a corner shop nearby and the views when you step out the hotel to the sea is amazing."
