Gönül rahatlığıyla tavsiye ediyorum."
"Nice and well maintained rooms"

"Très bon séjour rien à signaler à part un jour où le ménage n’a pas était fait et puis la femme de ménage c’est permise de regarder dans ma trousse de toilette ou j’avais mit les petit gels douche et shampooing pour ne pas en remettre Sinon mon séjour c’est très bien passé les petits déjeuner étaient corrects et variés L’hôtel est plutôt bien situé pour les personnes qui souhaitent sortir il y a le Moon lara pour les soirées chicha et le Gaga Club pour l’ambiance boîte festive avec des danseuses Sinon il y a plusieurs restaurants très sympathique L’accès aux plages de Lara beach et Konyaaltı Halk beach sont fastidieux car vraiment pas à côté mais il y à plusieurs corniche dans les environs pour pouvoir se baigner et se poser sur un transat comme Muratpaşa Belediyesi Antalya İnciraltı Plajı La piscine de l’hôtel n’est pas très utilisé car donne sur la rue bien qu’elle ne soit pas passante je n’ai vue personne s’y baigner juste certains profitent des transats et des différentes places pour se relaxer"

"Amazing if you love to swim! That’s why we chose this seaside gem. The swimming is perfect. Be forewarned if you like water sports;it isn’t t easy to find snorkeling gear nearby so bring your own, and if you want to do a boat trip for swimming or diving it will be a full day excursion from this Perge Hotel. Otherwise, beautiful place with a stunning restaurant."
"Overall great!"

"By far this was the best part of our trip to Turkeyi. The hotel is 10 min walk from the old city, the views are outstanding, the restaurant has views to kill for and the food was excellent. The staff, manager were all very attentive to our needs and made our stay special. I can’t say enough of the hotel and staff. Shout out to Boran, Gizep at the beach club, very nice and hard working. As well as Tacit, at the restaurant. They all were superb and made our stay very special. Defined coming back."
"The hotel is in very good condition, close to shopping and old town, excellent location with private access to the beach and very friendly staff."

"Nous avons énormément apprécié notre séjour à l'hôtel PERGE. La gentillesse du personnel, la qualité de la literie, la chambre spacieuse, le calme de l’hôtel, ainsi que l’accès à la mer ont vraiment contribué à rendre notre expérience mémorable. La restauration est excellente aussi. À noter, quelques petits détails de finitions de plinthes et de peinture dans les couloirs et la chambre et un manque d’entretien au niveau des terrasses du bord de mer et de certains transats. Peut-être sommes nous mal habitués, un peu dommage pour un hôtel de cette qualité. Malgré ces petites remarques, nous envisageons sérieusement de revenir pour un autre séjour dans cet établissement."

"I’ll be honest, I chose this hotel because of the beautiful beach area. And it did not disappoint. The staff were incredible, from giving me great recommendations for dining (real Turkish Anatolian cuisine, not the tourist traps). And not one of those restaurants disappointed me. They went above and beyond with literally everything. It was super easy to get around. Just a short 5 minute walk through a beautiful park, which was great for sunset, into a charming Old Town. There are a few gems there for dining, but largely it’s great to explore the area. Taksi’s are inexpensive so it made it easy to explore. The staff was knowledgeable about the surrounding area and coordinated a private tour for me through an agency they use and I could not have been happier. Additionally, it was so hot, they referred me to Antalya Workshops where I went for a heat break in the afternoons and learned about Turkish coffee culture, made traditional Mosaic Lamps (great souvenir to take back) as well as Anatolian perfumes (which is also a thing in Turkey). All in all, the hotel was beautiful, service was excellent, staff was amazing. Breakfast at the hotel was lovely…other than that I ate out."
"Hersey icin tesekkurler.Otel konumu, yenilenmis odalari ve tum calisanlariyla cok guzel"
"Very good friendly and English speaking staff at front desk and restaurant"

"We adore this hotel. Incredible breakfast views from the restaurant, perfect seafront location with direct sea access for spending the whole day in the water; and a 8 minute stroll to the old town. Comfortable rooms and excellent service in a small hotel. And Adult-only. What’s not to love?"
"Güzel bir tatil.Harikaydı, özellikle çalışanlar çok yardımseverdi ve hepsi çok güler yüzlüydü!"

"First visit to Antalya and this was one hotel of many in the city, but would probably exclusively stay here if ever visiting again. Views of the Mediterranean are unparalleled, private waterfront is such a pleasure. Breakfast is a great selection, and the staff are fantastic. Hotel and rooms are of very high quality. Away from much of the hustle and bustle but very short walk to everything. Hotel also has free parking which is a huge plus."
"구시가지에서 가까운데 조용하고 해변비치가 있어 수영도 할수있는 호텔입니다. 바다전망이 훌륭하고 공원이 가까워 산책하며 힐링할수있는 호텔입니다. 다만 lundry서비스는 세탁상태와 다림질 상태가 그다지 좋지않아 추천하지 않습니다."
"Perfect situated hotel 10 minutes from the Old Town. Very accommodating and service minded staff."

"Alles sauber und modern der Zugang zum Meer phantastisch, Frühstück sehr reichhaltig. Wir haben dort nur Salat gegessen und gefrühstückt war sehr gut allerdings Aperol Spritz 20 EUR, Cola 2,50 EUR also alles ausser Alkohol passt. Direkt neben einem Park und nur 10 min von der Altstadt zu Fuß."

"I very seldomly leave reviews, but the customer service here were second to none. Arda, kubra, and Sema were absolutely amazing. The property was very clean and the view was amazing. Highly recommend!"

"Our room was in the annex , as described. The hotel charge room price as 4 star hotel but their services is away to be good. They charge extra cost for a single orange juice on breakfast?!? we had 4 pillows in our bed but extremely thick I’ve requested to change, they told me they didn’t have. I went to reception Ito ask ice, once again they said they didn’t have, the only option was to pay for extra cost for ice as room service?!? The room minibar barely cooled. At the beach from one day to the other they don't even swiped the place. All the time all the staff only wanted to charge you more for everything the was a terrible experience."
"I recommend this hotel"
"Well located, safe, walkable, very good customer service, staff are very helpful and very nice food, I recommend more friends and family to visit the Perge hotel. Mustafa and Seleney were so kind."
"Super friendly staff. Amazing breakfast. Nice tunes plaued at lounge snd the beach. A good vibe. 5 min from old town, yet away from it all and quiet"
"All perfect and staff was super friendly. Loved the beach area"

"I recently stayed at Perge Hotel, and my experience was absolutely delightful! The staff here is exceptional; they truly went above and beyond to make our stay memorable. Although we had a rocky start due to a miscommunication, the team quickly resolved the issue with grace and professionalism. The hotel boasts a beautiful private beach, perfect for a relaxing getaway. Its central location made it incredibly convenient to explore the surrounding area. The food was delicious, offering a variety of breakfast options that satisfied our vegan taste buds every time. A special highlight was how the staff, especially Selenay and Mustafa, helped me plan a birthday surprise for my husband. They were attentive to every detail, making the celebration extra special. I highly recommend Perge Hotel and will definitely be returning for another visit. Thank you for a wonderful stay :)"

"Superb experience! Rooms are beautiful and the views are out of this world.. from the seemingly endless ocean, to cliffs over to mountains and absolutely stunning sunsets.. calm and serene, very pleasant staff - extremely helpful and very professional. The old town is a stone throw away, but you’d never know when at the hotel. I loved every second of my stay at this beautiful hotel and can only recommend it."

"What I liked: friendly staff, great views, wonderful swimming area, location. What I didn’t like: stray dogs in reception and outside. Rooms are without balcony and not worth the price especially in the annex"
"The cleaning was not that good. There were still bags and other things from previous guests in the drawers. The drinks at the hotel were costly and small. The staff was nice."

"Beautiful property with stunning terrace at breakfast. Be aware that there are at least two buildings. We had a standard double and it was a block away in a non elevator building. Not a problem for us but be aware if that's an issue. Other plusses include professional staff and iff street parking."

"Our room was in a separate building which was 500m from the main hotel. Spotty Wi-Fi, power went out, no elevator, cramped reception area - totally opposite of what was available in the main hotel. An upgrade was available to the main hotel but we would be charged another hundred dollars in contradiction to the message I received about a free upgrade if available. Highly disappointing stay because it seemed as if we were staying at a different hotel that borrowed privileges from the main hotel. The staff was highly uncooperative about offering us a room upgrade at the main hotel, and overall unfriendly and very business oriented. There was no message or warning about this room being in a separate hotel when we booked it. Yes, we could use the restaurant and pool areas but we had to walk along the dirty sidewalk dodging cars to get there. The guests staying at the Main hotel did not have to go through this therefore we felt as if we were treated a second class guests."
"The service is friendly and the rooms are clean. it's beautiful!"

"I’ve booked this hotel as a treat to celebrate my birthday at the end of a 2-week holiday travelling around Turkey. This hotel was by far the most expensive and the worst hotel with stayed at. The only positives were the view, private beach which was quiet and the restaurant was pretty good. Cocktails at the beach were good but ridiculously expensive (you can enjoy all if you are not a customer of the hotel ). The negatives: - this hotel pretends to be a high end boutique hotel but it’s not. All the finishings are awfully down, damaged/broken things in the room are not sorted and it’s not clean (eg. Lights not working, bathroom wall filled with toothpaste splashes, etc.) - the manager wasn’t at all apologetic with any of the problems we reported and quite rude and threatening (basically told us that if we were not happy we could just leave but he would guarantee that we wouldn’t find any better hotel…we had a tour booked and didn’t have time to change hotel so he ended up upgraded us to a suite which was as disappointing as the rest but at least we had space to move - the staff is nice but their English was really limited - all the “warm” breakfast items were cold. No juice included. - the access to our suite and the lift for the beach just look like a building site"

"Hotel was needing upgrade. Outdoor room facilities were run down and not very clean . Restaurant was extremly good quality and the service was great and I could not fault. Reception staff were also attentive and very helpful."

"The staff were very friendly and treated us well during our stay. The facilities were also ideal with a beautiful beach area, lovely breakfast and restaurant, and excellent room and balcony. The walking proximity to the pier and old town makes it a must stay. I highly recommend this hotel."

"Just spent a week at the hotel. Very conveniently located, walking distance to old town. Great staff, especially day shift, very friendly, caring and helpful. On my first day there İlayda gave me great recommendations for local restaurants and i loved all of them. Great breakfast- lots of options, something different every day, very healthy and delicious, good service and unparalleled views ❤️. Very nice beach, i even liked stairs- free built-in exercise😁. Also, staff takes great care of resident kitten:) definitely recommend this hotel."
"Easy access to the water, amazing always available staff, kind and courteous. Perfect walking distance from everything."

"We had a delightful two-night stay at Perge Hotel in Antalya. From the moment we arrived, the staff warmly welcomed us, took care of our luggage, and provided a detailed tour of the hotel, along with helpful local recommendations. Upon entering our room, we were pleasantly surprised with a thoughtful gesture of wine and fresh fruit. The spaciousness of the room was impressive, and its pristine cleanliness exuded a sense of luxury. Every aspect of the hotel was simply stunning. The breakfast experience was exceptional, with a diverse buffet offering a wide range of delicious foods. We thoroughly enjoyed starting our mornings with such a delightful spread. The ocean area was truly fantastic, with pristine chairs that appeared brand new. The attentive staff ensured our needs were met, making our stay all the more enjoyable. We wholeheartedly recommend Perge Hotel to anyone seeking a truly luxurious experience where guests are treated like stars. And the parking is also so easy! Biggest regret is not staying longer"

"Stunning hotel. We stayed in room with hot tub, which was incredible, and had the most beautiful view. We also got a complimentary bottle of bubbly on our first night, we were very grateful for that. The beach & beach bar setting were also very nice, allowing guests to relax and have access to a private beach. However, the hotel was let down by a few things: - staff were not as attentive as previous hotels we’d stayed in Turkey (we’d just arrived from Istanbul & Capadocia where the staff couldn’t do more, here we didn’t get that vibe). Reception staff said hello, but other staff didn’t acknowledge us, especially staff in and around the beach bar. - when getting in and out of the jacuzzi, the water drained into the hotel. We were blamed for water dripping into the restaurant, guests complaining & not paying for their meal. I was unsure how this could be our fault, and felt very unjustified. - during breakfast, you had to pay for your own drinks. When paying over £1000 for a hotel, I’d expect orange juice to be free at breakfast. This was very disappointing. - and finally, when we checked out, additional meals and drinks were added to our room bill that we hadn’t had. The receptionist was skeptical to remove from our bill, which felt like an element of mistrust. Overall, a very stunning hotel, but let down by these few things. I wouldn’t return."
"1 gece kaldık ama her şey güzeldi. Personel sıcakkanlıydı. Her yer temizdi. Güzel hizmet için teşekkürler."
"Temizlik çok iyi odalar şık ve eşyalar yeni"
"Otelin kahvaltısı seçenek olarak sınırlıydı ve kötüydü. Oda geniş ve ferahtı. Otoparkın olmaması kötüydü"
"Property was nice as well as the staff, only concern was what appeared to be a dark/black mould on the bed frame under the mattress."

"Our bed in our room was really dirty. There were dark hairs under the blanket and also dirt on the blanket. It seemed like they didn’t changed the blankets. We told this the personal at the reception and he said he can’t do anything . He just gave us new blankets and we had to change this by ourself. And the bathroom was also not clean. If our room had been clean and the stuff had helped us out I could recommend the hotel, but because of this circumstances I can’t do this."
"La chambre était juste un peu petite avec les valises mais sinon tout était nickel dans l’ensemble nous en sommes très content. L’hôtel est vraiment a proximité de tout à Antalya"

"İlk giriş işleminden, çıkış anına kadar muhteşem bir ev sahipliği deneyimledim. Olumsuz olarak söyleyebilecek hiç bir konu yok. Güler yüzle karşılaması, mesleğine hakimiyeti, analitik çözümlemesi ile konaklamamı mükemmel hale getirdi. Otel konumu da çok güzel. Aracınızı da güvenle ve kolay bir şekilde park edebiliyorsunuz."
"Ich durfte eine Stunde eher aufs Zimmer dank dem freundlichen Herrn an der Rezeption Kemal, wirklich sehr freundlich. An sich ist es ein City Hotel und für eine Nacht war es super."
"Hastane için gelmiştik yeterli uzaklıktaydı. Çok ilgili güleryüzlüler."
"Nuca homesde kaldığım süre boyunca çok iyiydi herşey a dan z ye"
"Sehr schön ruhig undcsauber ...freubdliches Personal"

"Superior oda seçimi yapmama rağmen otelin en küçük odasını verdiler. Bu Hotels sitesi ile Otel yönetiminin koordineli çalışmaması ve yazılımsal bir alt yapıyla birbirlerine bağlı olmaması sonucu olabilir. Sonuç olarak fazla para ödeyip hizmet olarak karşılığını almamış oldum. Otel genel olarak iş seyahatleri için oldukça kullanışlı, rahat ve temiz. Ancak kahvaltı yapılan mekanın akşam üstü 16:00 da kapanması doğru değil. Ana caddeye çıkış için bile o mekanın en az 21:00 e kadar açık olması gerekir."
"It was a pleasure to stay here. It felt like home and we can‘t wait to come back."
"Perfectly clean, cozy, modern, and spacious. Staff was pleasant and helpful. Breakfast was delicious & wonderful atmosphere."

"It was an amazing week, the hotel staff were really nice especially kamil the receptionist, he helped us so much amd even changed rooms for free if you wanted a bigger room, the breakfast was so delicious Overall an amazing hotel"
"Breakfast is very poor no buffet. No iron and iron board in the room. The refrigerator was not cooling enough. Not enough light in the bath room."
"❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️Veldig bra!"

"Bizim için ilk izlenim çok önemlidir.Butun çalışanları kibar ve güler yüzlü.Profesyonel yaklaşımlı nezih bir yerdi. Bina ve odalar yeniydi.Odalarin temizliği harikaydı.Kahvaltiyi çok beğendik . Özenle hazırlanmıştı.Çalisan arkadaşlar da işlerini çok iyi yapıyordu.Gelmek isteyenlerin kesinlikle düşünmeden değerlendirmesi gerektiğini mekan."

"Nuca was a great choice for our stay in Antalya. The hotel is just a few blocks walk to a stunning cliff view of the ocean, and about 20 minutes away from a great little spot where you can access the beach with sunchairs and umbrellas for cheap! Tons of great restaurants and cafes in walking distance. The staff at Nuca was incredibly helpful. The room had a really nice long desk and chair which was great for working. Wifi super fast. The hotel seems brrrrrand brand new, it's in really immaculate condition. Our booking included daily breakfast at their cafe in the front and it was DELICIOUS. Thank you so much to the great staff at Nuca for going out of their way to make our stay comfortable and perfect."

"Schlimmste Hotelerfahrung meines Lebens absolut nicht zu empfehlen Wir hatten nur einen sehr kurzen Aufenthalt, aber es war mit Abstand die schlechteste Hotelerfahrung, die ich je gemacht habe. Schon bei der Anreise ging es los: Das Hotel hat keinen Zugang von der Hauptstraße, sondern nur einen Eingang in einer extrem engen, chaotischen Hintergasse, in der man nicht einmal ordentlich ausladen kann völlig unpraktisch, vor allem mit Gepäck. Im Zimmer dann der nächste Schock: Gelbe Flecken an der Decke (siehe Bild) absolut schlimm und ein No-Go für jedes Hotel. Doch es kam noch schlimmer: Ein schlimmer Geruch kam aus dem Badezimmer, der sich kaum in Worte fassen lässt. Es roch nach Abfluss, unerträglich. Offenbar ist das Problem nicht neu, denn in anderen Bewertungen wurde es bereits mehrfach erwähnt. Und was war die Lösung des Hotels? Man hatte einfach zwei Urinalsiebe in eine Ecke des Bads gelegt. Kein Witz. So etwas habe ich wirklich noch nie erlebt. Wir haben ernsthaft darüber nachgedacht, sofort abzureisen.Weitere Mängel: Wände so dünn, dass man jedes Geräusch aus den Nachbarzimmern mitbekommt. Es gibt kein Buffet stattdessen bekommt man eine Karte mit fünf oder sechs Omelett-Varianten. Das war’s. Wenn ihr euch einen schönen Aufenthalt in Antalya wünscht: Gebt lieber mehr aus und bucht ein anderes Hotel. Diese Unterkunft ist ein abschreckendes Beispiel."

"Oldukça memnun kaldığım bir konaklama deneyimiydi. Otel yeni, temiz ve zevkle dekore edilmiş. Lokasyon son derece avantajlı, şehrin birçok noktasına kolay erişim sağlıyor. Personel ilgili ve güler yüzlüydü. Hem iş hem de turistik amaçlı seyahatler için rahatlıkla tavsiye edebileceğim bir otel."
"İlgili personel temiz otel"

"Odalar temiz ve eşyalar yeniydi. Çok zevkli ve sade bir şekilde dizayn edilmiş. Tüm personel çok nazik. Özellikle kat görevlisi Kezban Hanım’dan çok memnun kaldık. Oldukça kibar ve güleryüzlüydü. Odamızda gürültü sorunu yaşamıştık. Resepsiyon hiç ikiletmeden bize üst katlarda yeni bir oda verdi. Tamamiyle memnun kaldığımız bir deneyim oldu. Herkese teşekkürler."

"Çok güzel, modern ve temiz bir otel. Antalya'da ne kadar kalacak olursak olalım yine orayı tercih ederiz. Personel çok kibar ve ilgili. Odalar ve otel oldukça modern ve kullanışlı dizayn edilmiş. Kahvaltı otelin ön tarafındaki restoranda veriliyor. Serpme değildi ancak çeşitli ve doyurucu bir kahvaltı tabağıydı. Odadaki televizyonda digitürk erişimi bile vardı. Konumu da gayet iyi, her gideceğiniz yere arabayla kolay ulaşım sağlayabilirsiniz."
"Otel yeni eşyalara sahip oldukça temiz ve güzel. Kezban hanım her gün odamızı temizledi ve çok sıcakkanlıydı. Kesinlikle tavsiye ederim."
"Alles bestens, modern, sauber und super Lage. Frühstück ausreichend und lecker. Immer gerne wieder."

"Leider sehr hellhörig und viele Gäste waren sehr laut in der Nacht und haben die Türen zugeknallt. Frühstück fast jeden Tag das selbe und man durfte sich nichts selbst aussuchen. Wenn man nicht genau 1h vor Ende des Frühstücks kam bekam man nicht mal mehr Orangensaft. Personal sonst sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Lage sehr gut nah am Meer und an Bushaltestellen. Leider ist der nächste Badestrand sehr weit weg."

"Konumu ve yapısal özellikleriyle konforlu ve nezih bir otel. Temizlik son derece güzel. Sessiz zakin ve huzurlu. Personel, özellikle resepsiyondaki hanımefendi güleryüzle misafirlerle yakından ilgileniyor. Kahvaltısı sağlıklı, lezzetli ve kaliteli. Tüm çalışanlara teşekkür ederim."

"I had an unforgettable stay at Nuca Hotel and would like to share my experience. From the very first moments of my arrival, I was impressed by the responsiveness and attentiveness of the staff. The entire team was incredibly friendly and always ready to help. Breakfast doesn’t include coffee thats not good. But for a few days stays it’s ok. Location was good"

"The hotel is a bit far from the beach and shopping area. The hotel is excellent. Just the location that might be a bit annoying if you don't have a car or minde traveling for 20min for the beach or the big shooping area (old bazaar)."

"I loved the breakfast. It was really good, with lots of different food. I also liked that there was a 24/7 reception. It made me feel safe and relaxed. The room (double-bed room) was also great. It was quite big, installed with A/C, and modern. The cleaners did a great job. The room-price is also quite nice and worthy. I felt that the area which the hotel resided in, was a little unsafe/scary at night, especially alone as a woman. There weren’t so much lights at the streets. The hotel entrance was on the back-side (not on Barınaklar main-street, but on a sketchy street (2011 Sk.)). However, it was fine, and luckily it was only a short walk on the 2011 Sk. street. I also found the room-isolation to be not so good. For example, I could clearly hear my neighbours talk on the phone or taking a shower, as well as the stuff happening outside. It was annoying at times. However, all in all, it was indeed a great experience!"
"Bir gece kaldık oldukça temiz ve güzel"
"Die Lage vom Hotel ist sehr Gut und in der Nähe sind auch Einkaufsläden und Restaurants. Das Hotel ist sehr Sauber und Neu. Am Empfang die Mitarbeiter sehr Hilfsbereit."
"Otel güzeldi yeni yapılmış ve temizdi konumu iyiydi bence fiyatina göre gidilecek en iyisi diyebiliriz benim için sorunsuz bir tatildi teşekkürler"
"Rien à dife"
"Schönes neues Hotel."
"Very quite and easy check in. The staff was polite and responsive. Close to dining area"
"Anbefaler stede hyggelig ansatte veldig behjelpelig 10/10 service Kanskje endre frokosten sånn at man slipper og få samme frokost servert vær dag"
"1 gece kaldık gayet sakin ve konforlu çalışanlar ilgiliydi"

"Das Hotel ist sehr neu. Dementsprechend sind alle Räume sowohl optisch als auch technisch auf dem neusten Stand. Folgende Mängel sind uns aufgefallen: Check in: Leider gab es hier nur auf Nachfrage eine Auskunft über die Frühstückszeiten. Das Wifi passwort wurde uns ebenfalls nicht mitgeteilt. Am nächsten Tag haben wir das Passwort ebenfalls erst auf Nachfrage erhalten. Dusche: Wie oben beschrieben sind die Räume zwar sehr neu,jedoch mussten wir feststellen, dass die Dusche jedes mal übergelaufen ist und man eine Überschwemmung hatte. Hier musste man dann die Handtücher alle auf den Boden werfen um zu verhindern, dass man ausrutscht. Mülltonnen: Zunächst dachten wir, dass die Platzierung von Mülltonnen im Zimmer vergessen wurde. Im Verlaufe der Tage hat sich dann rausgestellt, dass es scheinbar garkeine Mülltonnen gibt. Die einzige Mülltonne die es gab war im Bad zu finden. Lichter: Im Eingangsbereich vor dem Kleiderschrank waren die Lichter defekt. Frühstück: Die Frühstücksplatte die man erhält ist qualitativ hochwertig. Nur ist wichtig zu erwähnen, dass das Hotel hier auch Gäste von außerhalb empfängt. Von einer ruhigen Atmosphere ist hier eher weniger die Rede. Es konnte nicht übersehen werden, dass hauptsächlich Männergruppen den Raum dominierten. Zudem wurde hier ebenfalls geraucht obwohl es klar geschlossene Räumlichkeiten sind. Management: Leider mussten wir sehr unprofessionelles Verhalten von Führungskräften des Hotels feststellen. Obwohl ein ausgeschildertes"
"We only stayed for one night. Room was clean. Stuff was friendly."

"The air conditioning was broken in our room when we arrived and we notified the staff immediately who said someone would come and look at it. Three hours later and no one came, we asked them again and they said they would sort it out. After another hour, we asked when it would be fixed and they eventually moved us to a different room. It was a nice room but the toilet was broken and ran all night. The staff were pretty unfriendly and acted like they didn't want us there. Thank god we only stayed for a night."
"Top Service, Top Sauberkeit, Top Lage, Sehr leckeres Frühstück"

"Yeni açılmış bir otel. Genel anlamda iyiydi. Temizlik iyi. Tuvalet gideri kokuyordu. Mini buz dolabı çalışmıyordu, söyledik yine çalıştırmadılar. Kahvaltısı güzeldi. Otelin girişi ters taraftan yapılmış ve otoparkı yok. Personel güler yüzlü."
"Un hébergement calme très bien placer"

"My stay was great. Special thanks to the kind staff at the reception for going the extra mile to make my stay enjoyable. The breakfast plate was cute and nicely curated as well. I would stay there again. One possible improvement: it seems the bathroom pipes next to my room were not firmly installed during construction. When my neighbor was showering, I could hear the sound of water and vibrating pipes from my room. Other than that, everything was excellent."

"Çeşmemde soğuk su yoktu.. tuvaletinde küçük suyu çalışmıyordu bu ikisinin haricinde herşey çok güzeldi. otelin konumu ve dışarıya çıkış kapısı bence çok kötü kapııı ön tarafa alsalar daha iyi olurdu"
"Yeni açılmış bir otel şehir merkezinde rahatlıkla tercih edebilirsiniz. Çalışanlar güler yüzlü ve yardımsever. Gece giriş yapmamıza rağmen gececi arkadaşlar bizi çok güzel karşıladı. Teşekkürler"
"Very welcoming and efficient staff. Very high quality rooms and bathroom."
"Resepsiyon ilgiliydi, otel temizdi, merkezde kalabileceğiniz güzel yerlerden biri"
"Temiz , yeni hotel, resepsiyonda gece karşılayan bey çok profesyonel teşekkür ederim hepinize"
"location and staff great . new clean and near the shopping places. I can recommend this hotel."
"Temiz ve güvenli bir otel, 24 saat resepsiyon hizmeti vardır. Açık büfe lezzetli kahvaltı imkanı sunan bu otel şehir merkezine bir kaç adım mesafededir. Tavsiye ederim"

"We were very happy at this hotel which was modern and contemporary.We were allowed to use the sauna and hammam while we were there which was included in the price and free.Extra services like massage and facials etc has to be paid for. The breakfast area was very modern too and the breakfast was very good with cereals, turkish coffee, diluted juice, yogurt, cheese, sausages scrambled eggs, fruit , biscuits cakes etc& coffee. The beds were very comfortable with 2 single beds. Slippers Tea and coffee for 2 provided for in the bedroom.New pair of white slippers provided for on the night we arrived and a new pair of slippers given to us on the day we left. The manager Mr Eray was very helpful and polite and arranged a couple of excurtions to green canyon and antalya maldives in the mediterranean at very reasonable prices and provided a simple breakfast of croissont or a cake ,apple and a drink each which came in handy on the mini bus. When we needed extra tea or coofee or water in the room we asked for it and very quickly received it. The hotel is in easy reach from the stop ismetpasa on the tram line about 500 metres or so. I would most likely stay there again when i go again"

"There was a ball of hair in the shower area, which was really disgusting. The bedside table had stains, and some of the toilet fittings were corroded or broken. The only good things were the air conditioning and the location. Breakfast options were very limited if you aren’t a local. We only had breakfast once and then decided to eat elsewhere. Only one reception staff member could speak a little English, so communication was a major issue."

"Highly recommend this hotel. I stayed here for 8 nights and was extremely happy with my stay with 0 issues. Ive been to 15 countries and had countless holiday's & this was one of the best hotels i stayed at. Staff were all lovely and friendly. Rooms were spacious with impressive interior like a palace very opulent. Bathrooms were huge and massive showers with constant hot water. Breakfast was amazing with so much choice to choose from too. I loved the fresh water 🍉 melon. Honestly hand on heart i highly recommend this lovely beautiful hotel. 10/10 i cant say a single negative comment Im a level 8 Google reviewer & im glad i booked it."
"Odalar ve hizmet güzeldi fakat geri kalan şeylerden memnun kalmadık özellikle yemek menüsü çok kısıtlı tek çeşit bir şey var onu yemek zorundasın"
"Otelin berbat ve korkunç bir iç dizaynı var. Ama otel olarak tüm hizmetleri oldukça yeterliydi. Özellikle kahvaltısından çok memnun kaldık, odalar da iyiydi."
"Very nice"
"Nice n clean"

"Otel gerçekten hem estetik yapısıyla hem sunduğu hizmetle mükemmeldi. Odalar temiz ve personel çok yardım sever ve iyiydi. Özellikle kahvaltıları çok güzel. Sadece merkezden biraz uzak arabanız varsa veya toplu taşıma kullanabilirsiniz önür türlüsü biraz eziyet oluyor."

"We stayed here for 3 nights. Relatively new hotel and well designed rooms. Breakfast was provided and they had good options. My only negative feedback is the lack of air-conditioning in the elevator and hallways but otherwise the rooms were air-conditioned."
"Good staff. Affordable. But the room was not very clean."

"Our stay was totally terrible. They gave us the smallest and dirtiest room. We asked for a room change and they said it‘s bot possible since the hotel is fully booked and all rooms are busy already. So we asked to get our money back and move to a different hotel but they wouldn‘t give us our money back. The hotel employees didn‘t speak a single word in english, it was very difficult for me and my husband to communicate with the employees, my husband unfortunately had a food poisoning too and they didn‘t help us. We had to beg them to send housekeeping and clean our room, they didn‘t clean it for a week. So we went to the reception every single day and told them that our room needs to be cleaned. We also translated it into Turkish via Google translator. What they meant by cleaning was just changing the towels and the bed linen, the „fresh“ bed linen still had stains on it, the „new“ towels somehow were wet. The Bathtub was leaking and after just 2 Minutes of showering the bathroom was under water. And also the Bathtub was never cleaned before. My husband name is from Armenian Origin, unfortunately we experienced racism and discrimination, even cigarette butts were thrown at us from an employee at the hotel. It was one of the most terrible experiences we have made in our holiday."

"Wir hatten ein 3 Personen Zimmer vor Monaten gebucht. Ungeplant hatte unser Flug Verspätung und wir sind erst um 4 Uhr in der Nacht im Hotel angekommen. Das Check-In verlief ohne Probleme und wir durften in unser Zimmer gehen. Was uns schockiert hat, es war nur ein Doppelbett im Zimmer. So steht die Frage wo die dritte Person schläft. Wir haben unten bei der Rezeption angerufen und sie darum gebeten, dass wir ein Bett benötigen, da wir das auch so gebucht haben. Wir waren sowieso schon von der ganzen Reise erschöpft und haben kraftlos noch über eine halbe Stunde im Zimmer gewartet, bis ein Klappbett organisiert wurde. Nach dem 3. Mal anrufen, ist dann ein junger Mann gekommen und hat das Bett gebracht. Das Bett war so unsicher, dass es jeden Moment zusammenklappen könnte. Zusätzlich hat er das Klappbett ohne Überzug, Decke und Kissen gebracht. Er hat das Bett in das Zimmer gebracht und ist schnell raus. Wir haben ihm nachgerufen, dass wir noch einen Bettüberzug und ein Kissen benötigen, er wollte uns jedoch nicht mehr zuhören und hat die Tür zugemacht. Aufgrund diesem Problem konnten wir erst um 5 ins Bett liegen. Wir haben das Problem bei der Rezeption am Morgen beschwert. Nun stand eine neue Dame dahinter. Sie meinte, dass die anderen Kollegen in diesem Moment wahrscheinlich nur das organisieren konnten. Was aber unerklärlich ist, da wir dieses Zimmer schon im Voraus gebucht haben. Wir haben dem Hotel 45 Minuten im Voraus informiert, dass wir auf dem Weg zu ihnen sind..."
"Beklentimi karşıladı. Checkin yaptım (17:00) Duş aldım, yemeğe çıktım, uyudum (sessizdi), uyandım kahvaltıya gittim (ihtiyacımdan fazlaydı) ayrıldım(09:00). Yeterliydi"
"Ich bin begeistert, alles perfekt"
"Les employés sont formidables et très serviable etM.fikrat chef cuisinier et tres professionnel et un bon cuisinier"
"Girdiğimizde özel oluşunu hissetmiştim. Her bir açıyı düşünmüşler. Güzel bir deneyimdi"
"Rizaak was amazing and welcoming I would highly recommend this hotel for its cleanliness and customer serviced"
"Bölge olarak ailelere cok uygun degil. Gceeleri kavga gürültü oluyor. Sonradan ogrendik ama semt olarak cok iyi biryer degil. Otel odalari fena degil, kahvalti orta seviyede."

"Hotel cok iyi calisanlar mükemmel. Gece yarisi gittiğimiz halde bize Restaurantlarini actilar. Teşekkür ederiz. Bukadar misafirperver olduklari icin"

Natürlich gabs auch keine Entschädigung!"
"Sehr schöne und große Zimmer - Essenzauswahl könnte größer sein - Freundliches Personal"
"Struttura bellissima nuova e pulitissima"
"Good, clean and exslusive hotell my second stay here this time. Very nice staff also."
"Excellent location, quiet, fantastic service. Would stay again. Thanks for a lovely stay."

"Veldig bra hotell midt i sentrum av antalya. Hyggelige personale og god frokost. Kommer til å være der hver gang vi skal til antalya."

"The highest performance of a hotel ⭐️⭐️⭐️ The cleanliness was super the breakfast very diverse they have FREE parking it was 5 min. Walk from the city center and Kaleiçi . "Güzel lokasyon, iyi kahvaltı"

"The hotel was really nice and we enjoyed the location. The only thing that was bad and take the experience down a bit, is The breakfast. For Turkey this is a bad breakfast, otherwise good hotel."
"The staff were very friendly, I love that ❤️❤️❤️ Moroccan greetings to you"

"Evinizdeymiş gibi rahat etmek istiyorsanız Mai İnci Hotelde konaklamalısınız. Tek kelineyle mükemmel üstü.Ortam, çalışanlar, hizmet ve dahası.En önemlisi de ÇALIŞANLARIN güler yüzleri ve hizmette yarışmaları, çok güzel ve anlayışlı insanlar…"
"Very freindly staff espsial sabrina and beste thank all staff"
"We really enjoyed staying at Mai Inci. Close to the historical part of Antalya and about a 20 minute walk to the archeological museum. Very nice staff and breakfast."

"Une adresse sure. Bref, l'adresse à ne pas rater quand vous passez à Antalya, à deux pas du centre historique."

"Mai Inci is located perfectly. It is a comfy hotel with everything that you need. The workers are very helpful and friendly. It feels like beeing home in Antalya. If i visit Antalya again i would choose Mai Inci again."

"My room was dark in the basement no window and no light in the hallway. I’m very disappointed and it ruined our trip."

"The staff at the hotel were excellent, and the entire place was impeccably clean. The surroundings were also very nice, adding to the overall pleasant experience. Overall, a good stay but better communication about room features is needed."

"4 gecelik konaklamamızda hiçbir sorunla karşılaşmadık. Çalışanlar her konuda yardımcı oldular. Konfor ve temizlik üst düzeydeydi. Kahvaltı çeşitlilik açısından yeterliydi. Hamam ve saunayı deneme fırsatımız olmadı."
"Amazing hotel, fantastic location great friendly staff very knowledgeable great rooms very clean. Will definitely stay there again"

"Super fint hotel som vi havde 48 timer på, i forbindelse med arbejdet. Træls at hotellet kun havde vand i minibar og var løbet tør for Coca-Cola da vi ankom kl 02:00 om natten. Ellers mega hyggeligt hotel og meget centralt. Kommer helt sikkert igen."

"Personal sehr freundlich und bemüht. Zimmer hellhörig, Unterhaltungen von Balkon daneben oder darunter laut und deutlich hörbar. Von Schallschutzfenstern nichts bemerkt. Kühlschrank im Zimmer laut in der Nacht."

"Zentral gelegen, wenngleich die Straße dreckig und nah an Müllcontainern war. Soweit alles ok, allerdings sind die Zimmer recht hellhörig. Unser Ausblick vom Balkon war eher mau. Essen und Personal gut"
"Good hotel. Friendly and helpful staff. Economy rooms located one floor down from reception (in the basement) and have no windows."

"Wir waren mit dem Hotel insgesamt sehr zufrieden. Sehr gepflegt und saubere Anlage. Das Personal war super freundlich und sehr hilfsbereit. Die Lage fanden wir auch sehr praktisch, einerseits die Nähe zur Altstadt und zum Hafen anderseits sehr nah zur Einkaufsmeile."
"They have a wonderful customer service. I like the location of the hotel. The hotel is clean and comfortable."
"Very good location and very good customer service. clean, modern and delicious breakfast. I recommend it 💯"
"Cok yardimci ve kaliteli calisanlar, temizlik gayet iyi, kahvalti guzeldi."

"Extraordinary experience with hospitable staff. First things first, even though I arrived at the hotel in the morning, the reception staff let me check-in early. Location is just amazing since the facility is in the heart of the city. Old town is just 5 minutes away by walking. The hotel is lovely furnished and decorated at best. It was just a one night stay but I will definitely come back. Huge thanks to everyone!"

"What is unique about this hotel is the hospitality by the staff. They are always ready to go out of their way and make sure you are happy. Professionalism and sincerity intertwined. Moreover, It is obvious that they also pay attention to cleanliness. Besides, they also offer a delicious breakfast in the morning with a varied range. In a nutshell, overall I am happy with my experience and I am grateful to have new lovely friends there."
"Everything was perfect. Helpfull staff and clean room"
"The hotel was in the city centre so we were able to see some annual celebrations and go through a bazaar."

"Oda temizliği ve bakımı kötüydü. Her yerde kıl ve saç vardı. Housekeeping kaba ve yetersiz kalıyor. Oda kapısı kilitlenmiyordu. Kısacası beklentimizin çok altında kaldı puanını kesinlikle haketmiyor. Sadece konum olarak güzel bir yerde"
"Das Zimmer lag im Keller, ohne Fenster ohne Tür schloss, laut und sehr kleines enges Zimmer"
"Herşey çok güzeldi Herkes çok ilgili ve güleryüzlü Bölge içerisinde konfor ve düzeni sağlayan nadir işletmelerden biri. Tebrikler."
"Séjours tres agréable, hôtels magnifique, personnels très sympathique, rien a redire ."
"The Hotel is located in a beautiful area in Antalya, with historic sites and a beautiful beach near by. The breakfast selection was awEsome!"
"So Nice in the centrum its very Big and u dont feel that or get disturbed the location is great over the harbor wonderful pool big an beautiful place"
"Hôtel bien situé dans la vieille ville (sauf pour les transferts de nuit). Bon accueil et personnel agréable. Wifi pas extra. Piscine pour se détendre."

"Fantastisk hotel med sentral beliggenhet i gamlebyen. God facilitet. Er nærmt havnen, privat strand , shopping og bazar. Er veldig fornøyde med personaler på resepsjon (hjelpsom og lett tilgjengelig særlig Umit.) Flott bassengområde Absolutt anbefales."

"The property was beautiful and I had an incredible view of the harbour, however guests should be warned if you are in a room facing the street, that it can get quite noisy. Aside from this, I enjoyed the restaurant next door and proximity to the harbour, it was a beautiful view to wake up to"

"Tout était parfait sauf la literie qui doit être changée et le frigidaire qui ne refroidissait pas. La position de l’hôtel est parfaite. Nous avons eu une belle chambre qui donne sur la piscine d’un côté et sur la mer de l’autre (#519) Un merci spécial à Nihad et les personnes qui s’occupent du petit déjeuner. "Her şey güzeldi. Teşekkürler."

"Muito bem localizado cafe da manhã muito bom, alguns lugares estava molhado ou pela piscina ou pelo ar condicionado, porem o atendimento da piscina e muito bom e as pizzas sao perfeitas, na parte dos vidro tinha um cheiro ruim mais tinha gatinhos muito fofos e bonitinhos,amei."
"Excellent service, friendly staff."

"Karaalioglu parki girisinde kaleicinde eglence alisveris icinde denizin limanin dibinde ozel plaji var unlu mermerli plaji hem de sehir merkezinde havaalani heryer yakin ulasimi rahat ilgililer cok temiz sessiz sakin kahvaltisi cok iyi havuzu buyuk temiz calisanlar cok ilgili alakart restoranti var iceri disari oturma alanlari var cok rahat ettim 2.gelisim antalya merkezde kalinacak en guzel otel bence herkese tavsiye ederim otel calisanlarina cok tesekkurler."

"Beautifully located within the old town with walkable access to everything. Im so glad we booked this hotel. So clean, calm and amazing views. We booked a sea view facing delux room. Their breakfast selection was good too! Friendly staff and always accommodating. Highly recommend!"
"Location and personal service."
"Couldn’t have picked a better hotel at a better location with the best breakfast spread.. AND all for a very reasonable rate"
"Otel herşeyiyle mükemmeldi.Çok iyi ağırlandık.Sorunsuz bir tatil için herkese tavsiye ediyorum"

"No mini bar, no coffee capsule but instant tubes. Decent swimming pool but the water purity may not be great as my eyes stay irritating for 12 hours after swimming there. Extremely limited breakfast items, and closes at 10:30 instead of 11:00 for a hot tourist spot."

"Great location in old city. If you are visiting Anatolia, this is the place to stay. The streets are super narrow and tough to navigate, but the Puding hotel staff were amazing at helping with the parking. Any hotel in this area will be tough to find at first, but pudding was relatively easy and once we knew where it was, you just had to drive up and they parked it for you. The hotel is super nice, great spread for breakfast and modern updated room. Very unique architecture and gardens in keeping with the neighborhood. Would highly recommend to anyone considering this area to stay here. Can’t say enough about the staff. They were beyond good!!"

"Bem localizado em Antalya Old Town proximo a restaurantes, lojas e pontis turisticos de interesse! Equipe amigável. Estacionamento com manobrista e carronho de golfe para nos transportar a pontos mais altos do bairro!"
"Loved this property. The staff was so nice and helpful."

"We stayed four nights. We reserved for three persons. First two nights they gave us a room for two persons with amenities for two, and only added a small single bed . After I complained to Expedia. The hotel itself is very clean, and thoughtfully designed, our room was bright and tastefully decorated with powerful air - conditioning unit. The members of the team. "Really enjoyed our stay here, it was very reasonable and in such a good location. We walked everywhere and had no issue with noise. The staff were also very friendly. However, some basic amenities could be improved. For example, we were given tiny bottles of shampoo/shower gel and when we asked for more shower gel as we were there for 5 nights we were told there was no more. Asked a different staff member the next day and he searched and found one bottle for us so this was better but I think it’s such a simple basic thing that should be supplied to the rooms without having to ask. There was also a bit of construction happening around whilst we were there which meant the place didn’t look the most polished! But overall for the price and location we would stay here again."
"Close to everything in kale ici but still far enough from the hustle loud noises from the pubs. The room was good!"

"Review Title: Disappointing Stay at Kiana Kaleici Hotel Our stay at Kiana Kaleici Hotel from August 2nd to 9th, 2024, was far from what we expected due to a series of issues that went unresolved. The mini-fridges in all three rooms didn’t work at all, leaving our drinks warm. It was frustrating to find that beverages left outside the fridge, cooled by the room’s air conditioning, were actually colder than those stored inside. The room listing promised free bottled water, yet after the first day, we were informed that we had to purchase our own water, which meant daily trips to a local store in 35-degree heat. The TV in one of our rooms was completely non-functional, and the other TVs only offered 3-4 local channels, causing us to miss the Olympics—despite the listing advertising 64-inch TVs with cable and premium channels. Instead, we found 24-inch TVs with basic channels. We also faced issues with the water pressure, which was inconsistent and often just trickled out, making it difficult to shower properly. Basic amenities like toothpaste, toothbrushes, and coffee were missing from the rooms. When we requested coffee the lady had to order it online. We fell in love with this place in one word is SPECTACULAR."
"Overrated. Beds were terrible."

"From the moment you arrive, you’ll be warmly welcomed by the hotel’s incredible staff. Their genuine hospitality and cheerful smiles instantly make you feel like part of the family. The hotel is perfectly situated in the heart of downtown Antalya — everything you could need or want is just a short walk away. You’ll find fantastic restaurants nearby, many featuring live music (our personal favorite!) that adds a special charm to your evenings. Each morning, breakfast is a delightful experience. It’s not your typical buffet — they serve it with a creative twist, surprising you with a fresh variety every day. It quickly became one of the highlights of our stay. If you’re looking to unwind, the pool area is a peaceful little haven where you can easily spend the whole day relaxing. Truly, this is one of the best hotels we’ve stayed at, and we wouldn’t hesitate to return. Highly recommended!"
"Bon hotel,bon personnel"

"We loved our stay here, the staff are incredibly kind and accomodating, the rooms are very clean, cosy & air-conditioned well, the breakfast spread was amazing, pool was very clean, the whole property is well maintained & it’s in the heart of the old town (but barely heard any outside noise from the room). It’s a family run business & we felt the extra charm & care from that. Only very small observations were low water pressure in the shower, the bed wasn’t the most comfortable & we had to park our car approx 10 min walk from the accomodation (although you’d get that anywhere in the old town). Otherwise a great stay & would recommend to anyone"

"We came for the first time and loved every minute of our stay. We were here for 9 nights and everything was just perfect. Breakfast was to die for and changed every day and so stunning. Never before have we experienced such a great host and everyone that worked there. Nothing was too much trouble. We have rebooked again for September as we loved it so much"

"We has a very pleasant stay. Very friendly staff and helpful."
"Great location and the breakfast was amazing"
"Walking distance to a variety of things"

"Das Hotel Saye Koank liegt mitten in der wunderschönen historischen Altstadt von Antalya – perfekt, um die Stadt zu Fuß zu erkunden. Schon beim Check-in wurden wir herzlich empfangen. Besonders hilfreich waren die individuellen Empfehlungen für Ausflüge. Der Service war ausgezeichnet*ä, vom Frühstück bis zur Reinigung. "The service was fantastic; so kind and helpful and understanding."
"Hospitality was wonderful."

"We had broken a teacup a couple days ago and paid the 100 lira for it - fair enough as it was our fault - however she tried to charge us another 100 lira for another “broken” teacup, which was an already cracked tea cup that the hotel had provided for us to use and was insistent we had broken it, again all this with an attitude."

"The overwhelming majority of the staff here are exceptional. The location in old town is very nice, and the breakfast is extraordinarily good. I would never hesitate to return here if I were back in Antalya."

"Arkadaşımla 2 gecelik Antalya seyahatimizde Kaleiçi bölgesinde yorumları da baz alarak Saye Konak Hoteli tercih ettik. Güleryüzlü, son derece ilgili personeli ve işletmecisine çok teşekkür ederiz. He was incredibly helpful and had the most pleasant personality, which made the stay feel more personalized. The location was convenient, with many transportation options available within a 5-minute walk from the hotel. While not the most lavish stay, Dam Lara served its purpose for a decent and well-located accommodation."

"We stayed only for one night on way back to home. It was good hotel. Shower did not work properly (need new shower head) but overwise was nice hotel. Very close to coast and good restaurant and shopping center at Lara.
"

"DON’T STAY HERE IF YOU WANT TO SLEEP! About 50 meters from this hotel are eight bars that start pumping the music out at six and it doesn’t end till 3. The music is at a level ten. Typical Turkish breakfast which was sufficient (If you got there before the Russians) Nice pool. WiFi was temperamental Would definitely return…."
"Sehr gut und freundlich 👍"

"Çok güzel Kaleiçindeki gerçekten tarihine uygun çok hoş bir bina tek bir sıkıntısı var Kaleicinin tam göbeğinde olduğudan dolayı etrafındaki mekanlardan gelen sesler eğlenmeyi seviyorsanız tabii ki de o sizin için bir sıkıntı değil"

"Zimmer grösse gut. Sehr ringhörig, Bett unbequem, das Wasser in der Dusche fliesst nicht richtig da alles verkalkt ist. Abflüsse sehr dreckig und alt!! Kein Lift vorhanden, aber den Gepäck bringen sie ins Zimmer. Einzig tolle, Lage und die Aussicht vom Balkon (Suite)"
"Absolutely wonderful hotel in the heart of Antalya Old City. Fantastic breakfast, plenty beautiful of sitting areas with superb Turkish hospitality Very romantic"

"Établissement très jolie et très propre à première vue. Nous avons beaucoup aimé la proximité des commerces et les rues piétonnes. Mais une fois arrivée dans la chambre nous avons pu remarquer l’état de la chambre sol sale, des moisissures dans la douche, évier pas propre, mur remplit de trace de saleté, lit loin d’être confortable et j’en passe .. pour le prix payé je trouve sa désolant"

"Check-in was smooth and the front desk manager was polite. However, once we informed him that we are not going to use his restaurant and purchase his recommended boat trip..his polite manner changed in minutes. Also, the hotel doesn't provide drinking water inside the room after paying 250 dollars per night. I was told to go out and buy my own water. I'm a diamond and platinum member in several hotels. This is my first time being treated in very rude way special during our checkout time with my family. Please treat all properly and equally."
"Trotz der sehr zentrale Lage in der Altstadt, ist das Hotel und besonders der Pool-Bereiche ein Oase."
"Loved my stay, would HIGHLY recommend to anyone coming to Antalya! Perfect location and wonderful staff!"
"Tres bon séjour. Chambre nettoyé tous les jours sans exception. Personnel très sympathique et aux petits soins."
"It was amazing one of the best places i have ever stayed in"

"Ihana ja todella viihtyisä hotelli, viehättävä pihapiiri ja erittäin avulias ja ystävällinen henkilökunta. Huoneemme upgradettiin ja saimme vaivatta pidennettyä check-out aikaa. Jos tulen uudestaan tänne niin yövyn aivan varmasti uudestaan tässä hotellissa."
"La habitación tenía el encanto de lo tradicional pero estaba en buen estado y era grande. El baño, sin embargo, era pequeño y antiguo. Los empleados son agradables y serviciales"
"Ons kamer was heel oud en bed was helemaal niet comfortabel"

"Biz üç kişilik bir odada konakladık.Eşim çocucuğum ve ben. Otele geç giriş yaptık gittiğimizde çocuğumuzun yatağı hazırlanmıştı . Odalar eski eşyalar eski fakat yatak inanılmaz rahattı eminim otelde çok daha güzel odalar vardır . Bizim kaldığımız oda da balkon yoktu fakat bahçe o kadar güzel ki bahçede ve havuzda zaman geçirdik çocuklu aileler için özellikle çok rahat bi otel . Sadece sigara kullananlar için balkonlu odaları seçmek daha konforlu olabilir. Kahvaltısı güzeldi hamurişi olan ürünler çeşitliydi fakat sıcaklara bi el atılmalı yumurtayı hiç beğenemedik . Otelin içinde üç farklı restaurant var biz Seraser restaurantta akşam yemeği yedik güzeldi çalışanlar çok ilgili ve kibarlar ambiyans çok güzeldi bahçedeki muz ağaçlarına bayıldım. Kahvaltıyıda seraser de yapıyosunuz oldukça keyifli ve yine burada da çalışanlar çok tatlılar . Otel çalışanları genel anlamda çok kibar ve yardımcılardı. Biz çok sevdik yine gitmeyi düşünüyoruz . Gidecek olanlar için oteli navigasyonla bulamıyosunuz biz inanılmaz zorlandık. Saat kulesini bulup oradan insanlara sorarak ilerlemenizi öneririm. Biz otelden akşam çıkıp gezip döneceğimizde bile bulamadık oteli labirent gibi bütün sokaklar dar ve iki araba yanyana geçemiyo tarihi bi bölge olduğu için bu şekilde . Ama biz yine gitsek yine Tuvana Hotel i seçeriz büyülü bi yer çok sevdik ♥️"
"Very good hotel. Nice breakfast buffet available. Staff were friendly and helpful. Location of hotel is great."

"Konum olarak merkezi bir konumda olduğu için erken uyumak isteyenler gürüntüden rahatsız olacaktır. Çevredeki publardan gelen müzikler ve sokaktaki insan gürültüleri yatak odanıza kadar ulaşıyor. Sessizlik arayanlara pek uygun değil bence. Onun dışında kahvaltı idare eder, yüksek bir kalite beklemeyin."
"Gayet güzel iletişim ve yönlendirmelere sahip sunulan hizmet mükemmel tesekkür ederim."
"Herşey çok güzeldi teşekkür ederiz"

"My daughter and I really enjoyed our stay here. While not quite luxury the building itself is very charming and atmospheric. We felt like we were in another era. The pool is small but a very welcome reprieve fromthe summer heat. The staff were very friendly and helpful. The dog Sari is also great! The only thing that struck us as odd is the lack of complimentary drinking water for guests."
"Gerek konum itibariyle gerekse hizmet anlamında beklentimizi karşıladı. Her şey çok güzeldi."
"Air conditioning not sufficient."

"Tuvana hotel was quite a nice surprise thanks to its location, pretty much in the center of Antalya old town, with a very confortable pool and restaurant service. Regards to all the people who guested US, in particular tò the waitress Who welcomed US every morning tò the breakfast and also the the gentleman on the reception desk and tò the lady who resetted our room mailing our stay confortable."

"Lovely hotel. Dainty quaint and right in the heart of the old town! Perfect location to walk down the harbour too there is a beach but it is so small and you have to pay 550 lira to get a bed and stay alday it’s beautiful but you are very packed in and not a lot Of shade so be careful!! Food was amazing staff friendly and very helpful! Clean tidy room. If you don’t want the hassle of hundreds of people round a pool all day and a huge hotel this is perfect. I would go back"

"Best hotel find I booked for my trip in Antalya. Conveniently located near the beach, bazaar, restaurants as well as transportation. Easily accessible, in front of the hotel you can instantly push for the taxi to come to you right away. The ambiance and the decor of the nature surrounding the hotel, the pool,the staffs, everything about the hotel and my stay was to perfection. I wished to have stayed a couple more days if I could."
"Jätemysig hotell"
"Nice stay, home-like."

"The hotel is situated in a pretty street and is reminiscent of a bygone era. The photos don’t convey the feel of the property, the scent of the blossoms or the attentive staff, quietly going about their jobs and keen to assist when needed (helpful to use google translate sometimes!). Breakfast-a plentiful Turkish offering Rooms- simply furnished with air-con and we enjoyed one of the few with a balcony, which was much appreciated. Comfortable beds and black out curtains. Pool/gardens- a small pool but perfectly adequate for the guests using it. Stunning planting, trees and flowers, with an ample bar area with service to sunbeds! Restaurants- Tapas (ok), Pizza (very good but pasta only ok) and the fine dining Seresa ( excellent and worth the splurge) There are some decent restaurants in the area and a great many rug and souvenir shops!! Recommend taking ear plugs if you are a light sleeper as sound appears to carry… We enjoyed a wonderful stay and would definitely visit again."
"A beautiful heritage property in the heart of the old town. Worth the money. Staff is quite responsive and helpful."
"Great location, with friendly, efficient staff."
"Das Hotel ist wunderschön und toll gelegen. Wir haben uns hier rundum wohl gefühlt."
"Wszystko było tak jak w opisie. Miła obsługa."
"Nach anfänglichem Problem mit dem Zimmer haben wir ab der zweiten Nacht unser Wunschzimmer bekommen."

"Vi bodde längst uppe på andra våningen, längst borta från receptionen. Wi-Fi var väldigt ostabilt. Detta är dock nog det enda negativa vi kan säga om boendet. Personalen var helt otroligt trevliga och hjälpsamma. Byggnaden var i gammal stil, riktigt mysigt. Det kändes väldigt privat. Vi hade till ex egen balkong. Frukosten bjöd på mycket olika, både frukt och grönt, olika ägg, bröd, salt och sött. Flera olika traditionella turkiska rätter. Poolområdet var mindre men vi hade aldrig problem att hitta en plats. Ganska lugnt. Städning varje dag, vissa dagar kanske mer noggrant än andra, men en upplevelse av att personalen tar mycket hänsyn till när man är hemma eller inte. Riktigt trevligt område med små gator."
"It's a unique property, full of history and stories. I felt like I was staying in a local high-born family residence. There is a lot of art and antiques. It's very quaint."

"Frühstück war ok Zimmer roch muffig, sauber war es nıcht unbedingt. braucht im Bad viel reparaturen Lage vom Zimmer über der Küche roch extrem nach essen. Personal war nicht unbedingt freundlich. Nochmal würden wir da nicht hingehen."

"I loved this hotel. I especially liked the Olde World decor. Some parts could do with a bit of repair but that didnt spoil the overall effect. The staff were friendly. Breakfast was good, would recommed the hotel to get Vegan milk to cater for Vegans. If I come back to Antalya I would stay here again."
"Very accomodating and serviceminded!"

"Hotel incrível, com história em todos os comodos (tem mais de 300 anos), reformado, em bom estado. Piscina linda e limpa, com flores ao redor. Drinks deliciosos, apesar de acima do preço da região (compreensível pela exclusividade). Tem 3 restaurantes, todoa deliciosos. Café da manhã turco com variedade de queijos, azeitonas, tomates (apesar de não ser nosso estilo favorito - faz falta frutas, mais cereais, bolos)."
"Tuve una estadía agradable"
"Beautiful and cozy property in the center of the city."

"L'hôtel est tout simplement magnifique puisque il s'agit d'un ensemble d'anciennes maisons Ottomane. Il se situe dans le quartier historique du Kaleiçi donc l'endroit le plus sympa d'Antalya. Tout a été parfait: Les jardins, la piscine, le staff, l'accueil, le petit déjeuner, la chambre et le parking juste a côté. Cet endroit est une merveille j'espère revenir un jour !"

"Servicio de 10, muy amables y te reciben con una bebida de bienvenida que con el calor que hace en verano se agradece. Además, te ayudan a aparcar el coche. Hotel con mucho encanto ya que han respetado la arquitectura creando un atmósfera excelente. Desayuno excelente."
"Ottima posizione e hotel di carattere, confortevole."
"Parkplatz sollte angeschrieben werden, durch die Lage des Hotels wirkt es verwirrend. Hotel hat einen angenehmen Charme."
"Beau sejour"
"Very nice old hotel eith a lovely garden, trees and flowers."

"Jättemysig hotell med Kaleiçis mysigaste gata. Jättetrevlig personal och bra service. Det tråkiga var att air conditioner hade bara ett läge med fullt ös, så det blev väldigt kallt på nätterna. Fjärrkontrollen till tvn var urfunktion."

"Oda ve otelin bina olarak durumu iyiydi ancak iyileştirmeler yapılabilir. Otel genelinde klimalar çok eski iyileştirme yapılabilir. Oda dışında otel içerisinde serin hava hissedilmiyordu çünkü klimaları çalıştırmıyorlardı. Genel olarak konaklamadan çok memnun ayrıldık. Otelin restoranı da ortam olarak çok şıktı. Otelin Kaleiçinde olup otoparkının olması başlı başına bir tercih sebebi. Fakat otopark kapısı otomatiğe döndürülebilir. Her oda anahtarına bir adet otopark anahtarı verilebilirzd"
"The welcoming and looking after by staff members"

"The location of thr property is fantastic. The property is beautiful, clean and tidy. The staff are very helpful. The manager was very welcoming and everything was explained well. When we checked into our rooms, the room temperature was extremely high, the air conditioning was not left on for us to make a comfortable entry. Inspite of being in the room, the temperature was very high. The cooling was extremely poor and for some reason the temperature can't be dropped below 18. We had 2 rooms booked and air conditioning was a problem in one of the rooms, although cooling wasn't that great in the other room too. We were offered 2 keys to leave the ac on but it still didn't solve the problem. In the middle of the night had to request a standing fan following which we could sleep well. Not sure if it is just us or if cooling is a real problem at this place. There are 3 restaurants of which 2 have good vegetarian options. The place is Lovely they could just do so much better with central air conditioning in lobby, restaurants etc. The second issue we had as vegetarian was , there are not enough vegetarian options in breakfast buffet, and ingredients are not written down, hence difficult to guess. Could do with going an extra mile to keep guests happy and by asking. If i had known i would have boooked without breakfast and had something in a cafe instead. The pool is lovely too, but if one family with kids is in the pool, you need to wait before they finish, pool is small."

"I cannot explain how amazing this hotel is. First of all the location is right in the old town but down a beautiful little street so you feel tucked away, it has 3 incredible restaurants and a pool that is never too busy. The rooms and hotel itself are authentic, big, clean and so lovely, cleaned and restocked for you everyday. The breakfast and breakfast itself was one of my highlights - in a fine dining restaurant that is part of the hotel (that I went to on my birthday evening and was AMAZING). The food is incredible and the service is outstanding, even at a self serve breakfast the staff are attentive and bring you the things you need out before asking (for us it was a bucket of ice for our iced coffee!), the seating area is beautiful and never packed. The area of the hotel is just amazing, you feel safe and tucked away but literally in the middle of everything. All the staff are attentive and always there for you should you need, the whole place is just incredible. It took a while for me to choose a hotel as I wanted something in the center of things but not busy or too much going on and I cannot get over how incredible and perfect this place is. The best place I’ve ever stayed at. I’ll be back as soon as I can !!!! Thankyou."
"Fabulous"

"During my recent stay at the Tuvana Hotel in Antalya, I was thoroughly impressed by the blend of historical charm and modern luxury this establishment offers. Nestled in the heart of the old town, the hotel is an oasis of tranquility, providing an authentic Turkish experience."
"Hotel is good, close to ols town area and great mermerly beach..good food around ,"

"The Tuvana is situated in several wonderful historic buildings that have beautiful terrrace gardens and are directly across from each other connecteed by a very private street. The rooms are large--I had booked an economy room but they upgraded me to a deluxe and I might have been more comfortable in a smaller space. The AC unit was a bit old and it took a while to cool the large room. There was a wall of windows with draperies to block the sun--if they were to renovate I would replace the heavy, dark-colored draperies with something in a lighter color, texture, and weight...it would lighten up the dark wood. There was a lovely, large community balcony off of the main hall that overlooked the fine dining terrace and was a nice reading/cocktail spot! Also a beautiful seating area on the mezzanine level. The pool was in the building across the street but easily accessed. The service was great."
"Havde dejligt ophold, med en perfekt beliggenhed , tæt på alt hvad man har behov for. Rigtig god service og imødekommende personale."

"As soon as I arrived the staff were friendly and helpful. The grounds and the hotel building are beautiful. The pool area is relaxing and the water was just the right temperature. It was small but cozy. The food from the restaurant was delicious but you do have to wait till 4pm - not available for lunch!!! The room was comfortable if in need of a little diy - but had everything you needed."

"The property is located in the heart of all actions never missing any of the attractions nice clean pool with the pool side drinks and the fruit plate delivered to the VIP room. Great breakfast and above all the friendly courteous staff made all the difference. Will stay again at Tuvanas."
"Beautiful small hotel in the heart of thenold town. Perfect weekend stay, make you feel like you are a VIP in the ottoman times."

"Die Unterkunft hat viel Charme. Unser Zimmer war ausreichend groß und hatte einen schchönen Balkon. Das Schwimmbad ist ebenfalls ausreichend groß und gut gepflegt. Der Garten mit der Beleuchtung, den Pflanzen und bewußt ausgewählten Dekorationen einfach wunderschön. Frühstücksbuffet völlig ausreichend. Das Hotel ist sehr zu empfehlen."

"We loved this hotel! It is as beautiful as the photos and the location is very central and close to transit. There are many shops, bars, and restaurants all closeby. Our room was beautiful, staff were very helpful, and the breakfast was amazing. Would definitely recommend staying here if visiting Antalya."
"Harika bir yer, sanki eski zamanlarda seyahat ediyormuşsunuz gibi. Odamizda balkon yoktu fakat katımizda balkon vardı, hiç sorun değildi. Yazacak birsey bulamıyorum, hersey mükemmel ötesi"
"Muy agradable el hotel, el personal amable y buen desayuno En cuanto a los cuartos le falta un poco de renovacion. Excelente lugar"
"Jederzeit gerne wieder."

"Quite amazingly recreated old world charm. We were given an automatic room upgrade at no cost by the helpful staff at the reception. Wonderful location at the heart of the old town of Kaleici, it is walking distance from all attractions like the Mermali Beach, Harbour, Hadrian's Gate and tram stops which are a very convenient mode of transport to go to the Archaeological Museum or the Pebble Beach Park. There are no elevators, but the hotel staff moved our luggage for us. Also the Taxi cannot approach the main gate and would drop off about 20 to 30 meters away - but again, the hotel staff stepped in to do the hard work. We had a very memorable and comfortable stay"
"Another hotel we only did a night stay but really enjoyed the place, their parking availability, and being in the old town!"
"A great hotel in the heart of Antalya, in the pedestrian area. A bit hot in the summer, but our room had A/C. Staff was very polite and helpful."

"This property is located in the center of everything where you can find lot of dining, shopping & transportation near by to go anywhere. You can walk to the shopping area. This area seems never sleep alway live with fun. We really loved this hotel because of the location but little congested due to old & historic building."

"I wanted to love this hotel so much but I was very disappointed. The grounds are beautiful but the rooms are run down and worn. Breakfast was terrible. Overall I would not stay here again. I hope they make some updates. Also Expedia needs to start visiting the properties they promote."
"Like the ambience of the Ottoman villa. However, rooms are too small and they need serious upgrading."
"Really enjoyed our stay, thanks!"

"Disappointed! At first it looks like a Tuscan villa, but at a closer glance the property is in two different buildings. One for office and pool, other for rooms and restaurant. Tub impossible to get into, too high and very narrow, old people will not be taking shower here. Bed too soft because old, we needed to ask for 2nd pillow, room is wood and floor creaky. And i hope you don't mind smells and noise from downstairs restaurant. And a 5am wake up call from musjid down the block is every morning."

"Camere molto piccole e alquanto rumorose. Ottima la pulizia.
