Quando ha capito che avrei regalato la bottiglia al tassista ha accettato lo scambio. Colazione caotica e sbilanciata sul salato."
"det sødeste personale! også på de tilknyttede restauranter."
"Very nice and cozy hotel! Very friendly! Fine dining at the restaurant! Lovely buffet for breakfast. Once we found the hotel and its parking it was easy going. We had a most lovely stay!"
"Environment is beautiful calm and relaxing"
"L'hotel non e' facile da trovare e va raggiunto a piedi. Non ho visto cartelli o insegne. Le stanze sono buone , la TV pur accendendosi non sembrava ricevere alcun canale. Ottima colazione."
"Beautiful hotel set in fabulous location. Room very comfortable. Breakfast exceptional. Staff cannot do enough for you. Very accommodating.Thank you"
"nice place to stay."
"Host was very kind and attentive to any request. Really good vibe. The swimming pool was a very nice and calming area with a great luxurious garden."
"Quiet and nice place to stay!!"

"A little jewel i. The middle of the city is how I would describe this hotel. We were not thrilled with Antalya having visited other cities, but this hotel made a huge difference The decor is truly unique and well thought of, the food in the various restaurants it has was outstanding a d the staff extremely courteous and attentive The overall place is gorgeous. Highly recommended!"

"I had an incredible stay at this hotel! The staff went above and beyond to make my experience comfortable and enjoyable. The restaurant below offered delightful meals, and the staff were exceptionally friendly. The rooms were impeccably clean, and the housekeeping team was always attentive and friendly. I highly recommend this hotel for its amazing staff, pleasant dining experience, and impeccable cleanliness."

"This is a lovely hotel made up of several beautiful historic homes all connected by beautiful courtyards. Everything about the hotel was wonderful except it was very difficult to find if you are driving because it's in the old city and the roads are not well marked. Even Google maps had a tough time finding it. Once there, a perfect location to explore old Antalya on foot."
"VERY NICE FACILITIES AND FRIENDLY STAFF"

"The location is excellent – right in Kaleiçi old town, close to the beach, shops, and restaurants, with a lovely rooftop terrace. However, my “Deluxe Double” at £72.60 per night was very small and on the ground floor, so I couldn’t open the curtains for privacy. I found two dirty towels in the wardrobe, and while two bottles of water were provided the first night, they were not replaced during the stay. Breakfast was not included, and I later saw the same room advertised for as low as £43 on other sites. Staff were friendly, but overall, I felt the stay was overpriced for what was offered."

"Excellent location! Friendliest staff who deeply cares about their guests' comfort and safety. Staff was helpful creating a personalized tour which allowed visiting other places perhaps not included in normal tours. Comfy bed, clean room, beautiful view from the terrace. Breakfast could use some improvement."
"Exceptional staff and amazing service. Breakfast was good and the room was great (really good air conditioning). Thank you!"

"It was a pleasure staying at Bacchus Pension. One of the best features of this hotel is the staff. Ibrahim was very welcoming and accommodating. Hospitality is very important to him. The buffet breakfast consisted of traditional Turkish foods and was delicious. And an excellent view of the beach enhanced my breakfast experience. I slept well in my bed and my room was comfy overall. I would stay here again."
"Small room breakfast basic. Position good"
"zu jeder Zeit erreichbar, super service"

"We were in a basement room that had a strange odor. Water leak into the bathroom. Staff was fantastic at helping us find a place to park (not an easy task) Love the location, but might pick a different property next time."

"Quiet part of old town, can walk to all sites and to tram. Three night stay but they must have booked our room that we paid for and so had to go to a small dark room for one night before moving next morning to a bigger room. Breakfast very basic. Family who run the pension are lovely and work hard. Be mindful if you have a disability that breakfast will require you some steps to get to and same as rooms, no lifts. It’s a very central place. The wifi was not good and so if you need for work, will be very hit and miss."
"Location was ideal and staff very friendly"
"Odalar kucuk olmasina ragmen, sadece yatmaya gittigimiz icin yeterli idi. Calisanlar guler yuzlu ve yardimci idiler. Konumu cok iyi."
"Excellent hotel - warm inviting staff- very close to all the fun stuff . Can’t recommend the hotel enough - amazing really ."

"Oda genel olarak güzeldi, otelin genel kısmında biz 1 gece konakladığımız için fazla vakit geçirmedik. ancak havuz çok bulanıktı o hayal kırıklığı oldu. Ortam olarak güzel bir ortamı var. kale içinde olmasına rağmen gece ses sorunu yaşamadık."
"Super Zentral. Würde es wieder buchen."
"Hotellet behöver rustas upp då det är väldigt slitet tex trasiga galgar, slitna sittdynor. Städningen även där kan behövas se över då det var dammigt på vissa saker och fläckar på papperskorgen."

"The hotel is not for those who like peace and quiet. if your windows face the street, then be prepared to listen to musicians singing in a nearby restaurant until one in the morning and drunken tourists screaming under the windows until the morning. If you don't have problems sleeping, you won't feel any problems. in all other respects - an ideal place to relax"

"We loved out stay at this cute place it’s right in the centre of town and convenient to get to main attractions. Thou it is little loud and noisy at night as it right above all the restaurants and main tourist attractions. We still loved it thou"

"Nous y avons passé 3 nuits pour visiter le centre D’Antalya. Tout est proche, la piscine est franchement la bienvenue en fin de journée de visite. Petit déjeuner top, chambre confortable et propre, personnel charmant et au petit soin! Je recommande vivement ce petit hôtel plein de charme au cœur de la vieille ville !"
"Ok hotell. Jeg var der bare en natt. Rask innsjekking Hyggelig personal. Men det var ikke særlig rent"
"It’s amazing, close to city centre . Highly recommend ."

"The night staff (man with a broken arm) was so rude and not happy to help whatsoever with giving us basic necessities like towels and toilet roll when asked. Our room was not cleaned for the 7 days we stayed even when we asked. The man rang our room and argued with us calling us “disgusting” and repeating the fact that it is only a 3 star hotel not a 5 so we shouldn't expect anything better. He claimed he is only there to check people in and out of the hotel and it is not his job to help us. He just sat there watching movies on his laptop everynight. There was mould on the shower ceiling, the cabinet draw fell off randomly, the was a random ladies slipper under the bed along side other hairballs, dust and litter. We were never given basic necessities until we asked ourself and even then we got attitude given for “not asking the day staff” which we did but nothing was done about it. The hotel claims it is a spa but has nothing to do with being a spa and when we asked they made up an excuse. We didn't mind the lack of property facilities and conditions until the last day when the night staff man spoke so rudely to us in the lobby and then ringing our room that other guests heard and said they had been experiencing the same level of service."

"I recently stayed at Les Lion Luxury Spa and had a disappointing experience. Upon entering the room, we encountered a cockroach. When we reported it to the staff, one of the members simply kicked it out with his foot, which felt very unprofessional. The cleanliness of the room was severely lacking. It was very dusty, and we found hairs on the floor throughout the room as well as in the bedding. The air conditioning unit was inadequate; it was too weak to cool the room properly. Additionally, the soap dispenser was empty, and the shower caused the entire bathroom to flood. Overall, the stay was far from satisfactory due to these issues. I hope the management takes these concerns seriously and makes the necessary improvements."
"Staff were friendly helpful and very accommodating. They went out of their way to make sure our stay was truly wonderful. Thank you."
"Hotel so small, communication issues, breakfast no good menu"
"Excellent service"
"we had a great stay at sofa hotel Fonda and all staff was nice helpful we definitely recommend this lovely place"
"Great location and helpful staff"
"Stayed in family room 301. Really large living area, kitchenette and bathroom. The staff were friendly and helpful. The breakfast offered"

"Vi är en familj som består av 5 persone, 2 barn på 2 respektive 10 år samt en 18 åring. Då vi landade sen på kvällen i Antalya valde vi att övernatta här innan vi åker vidare till Alanya. Rummens storlek var helt ok med två sovrum och kök. Problemet med sovrummet var att det inte var anpassad för att sova i. Kanske för att vila lite och få egen tid. Detta eftersom det fanns takfönster som var rakt ovanför sängarna utan persienner eller mörkläggningsgardiner som gör rummet mörk och lämplig för sömn. Kl 5 på morgonen får du soloen rakt i ansiktet och du kan inte undvika det hur än du virider dig i sängen. Så sömn får du hoppa över i dessa två sovrum på takvåningen. Rummen var inte så rena och döda kackerlackor var det inte brist på under sängarna som lockade vår nästan 3 åriga dotter. Gällande servicen kan jag börja med att taxin som vi beställde från hotellets reseption innan vårt resa kom aldrig. Vi landade ca 21:10 och var ute från flygplatsen kl 22:00 och letade efter taxin som ej var där. Med små trötta barn kan man bara tänka sig situationen. Till sist lyckades reseptipnen hitta ny chaufför som kom kl 23:30. Fick alltså vänta 1,5 timmar där. Framme vid reseptionen vid incheckningen frågade vi efter en affär för att köpa vatten men svaret blev tydligt att det fanns vatten på rummet och det är gratis och ingår i priset. Va bra tänkte vi men efter utcheckningen fick vi notan på att varje flaska kostade minst 50 lira. Vatten kostade 5 lira max utanför hotellet."
"Everything was great. We were welcomed friendly and they helped us with the luggage. Best breakfast and service. Highly recomended"

"Accès a la plage direct inexistant faut marché 5 minute et l'entrée a la plage est payante 500 TL par personnes de l'attente pour avoir un transat car pas de place pour mettre ta serviettes, la piscine n'est pas a l'hôtel elle se trouve dans un autre hôtel à côté 3minute mais bien sur ce n'est pas marquer dans la description de l'hôtel, on nous a envoyé un mail 2 semaines avant notre séjour pour nous en informer. Pas du tout calme il se trouve dans un endroits entourée de bar et de boîtes de nuit. Le personnel est adorables, on a demandé à changer de chambre car était trop petite et c'est pas celle qu'on a choisie lors de la réservation et ca étaient fait, le petit-déjeuner est tres bon."
"Wonderful hosts who provided great breakfast each morning. Rooms were really nice too. Great location"
"Cozy hotel with amazing staff"
"Bel Hotel . E il Propietario molto Gentile e anche lo Staff. Lo consiglio."
"Very kind owners"

"We had a full-day layover in Antalya and chose to stay in the city centre. The property is very well connected, with excellent public transport links: a tram to Terminal 1 of the airport, a retro tram to Konyaaltı Beach, and Mermerli Beach just a short walk away. It's located right next to several cafés, and being in the heart of the city, there's a nightclub next door. This didn’t bother us as we were aware of it beforehand and brought earplugs. The property itself was clean—though I do wish I hadn’t looked under the beds! Overall, we had a lovely stay and would happily recommend the hotel."
"Super hotel personelle très serviable je suggère cette hôtel."
"Wonderful repeat visit to this beautiful hotel - a real oasis in the middle of the Kaleiçi, where everything - beach, harbour, bars and restaurants, shopping centre - are within walking distance!"
"Fantastisk opphold med en ypperlig service. Her vil vi igjen for en så billig overnatting. Koselig"

"A quaint little hotel just ticked all the boxes I was after. Clean welcoming and close to beach and attraction. Travelled with two young children and felt safe through out the stay. Rooms were small for three of us to share but then again we are talking about a property on the old town.This is our now fav place to rebook and revisit when in Anatalya....Thank you so much to the team!"

"What a delightful little boutique hotel. Very close to all the nightlife and markets, perfect location to explore the old town and the marina. We will definitely return in a couple of months for a longer visit. Thank you to all the staff."
"Clean and pleasant rooms. Great breakfast and lovely staff."

"The Hotel was an amazing and the hosts (İbrahim&Yılmaz) are very helpful and professional,great people. Location is very good , rooms are super- clean and staff are hospitable. We had a great experience , we recommend highly"
"Beautiful authentic Turkish family run hotel. Close walk to cafes and restaurants. Incredibly delicious breakfast. Staff are absolutely lovely. I’d definitely recommend a stay!"
"Great location,friendly with excellent service."

"The breakfast was good. But the room was very noisy. The music went on until 1 am . From 1-3 AM you cam hear super loud talk between the neighbours in hotel . "Good breakfast Good location. Shower"

I went as a solo traveller from England, there was no English people at all in this hotel which isn’t a bad thing but the managers of the hotel were sat with the Turkish guest all day which I personally found really unprofessional. I felt very unwelcome, I was that nervous sleeping in the room incase the ceiling came in I caused my self to have sleep paralysis. Also have to mention the home made bidet that stabs you in the bum when you sit down on the toilet. I booked the room for 5 nights but only stayed 3 as I felt very uncomfortable whilst being there."
"The staff are amazing they make you feel so welcome and like a member of their family , very chilled vibe , love the pool . Big shout out to Levent and his team , I will definitely be back …"

"The staff were very friendly and helpfull. The pool was clean and just what you need at the end of the day when its hot. The rooms were clean with good air con."

"Overall, not worth the price I paid. The bathroom was very unclean, outdated shower and bathtub. Due to the position of he shower it made it very awkward to shower without spilling water. Although I paid for breakfast I ended up going outside to eat as the food was below average and definitely not worth the price paid. The only positive was that the receptionists helped wherever possible and were very helpful. Not the most 'family' suited stay but it was close to the park, old town and the main strip in antalya which was a short walk."

"Charmant petit hôtel dans le cœur de la vieille ville d'Antalya. La piscine est très agréable et calme, l'équipe est souriante et professionnelle. Les chambres sont un peu vieillissantes mais confortables."

"You get what you pay for...we paid for a twin economy room & thats what we got, albeit dated too. We stayed an extra night as we liked Kaleici alot & requested a dbl room, no problem. We loved our things & a couple of hrs later i realized id left my hair turban towel. I asked reception for it & they said it wasnt in the room, 100% it was & therefore a member of staff had kept it as the room was not let & they allowed me to check where i left it. We had been in the pool & i left 2 towels over the balcony outside. On returning from a walk only 1 was there, i asked about the other & it hadnt been seen, could only fall in the garden area, again another towel taken. My husband was ill on the day of check out so booked am additional night, i asked for clean towels & toilet paper when paying for the room, 6hrs later i asked again. I got them put in the room but they didnt make the bed or empty in the bin in the bathroom with the used toilet paper. Breakfast was ok, staff started friendly then after complaining they weren't. Would we stay again, its a big No, i didnt feel my things were safe."
"Great location, a beautiful property and friendly staff."
"Es war ein super schöner Aufenthalt, sehr freundliches u zuvorkommendes Personal :) schönes, sauberes Zimmer und gute Lage!! Guter Pool 🏊‍♀️ Wirklich zu empfehlen. Vielen Dank!"

"Daha önce de konaklamıştım bu otelde. Plaja yakın. Kahvaltısı güzel. Oteli kesinlikle öneririm. İç dizaynı, odalar vs fiyat performans oteli. Hamamı varmış hiç kullanmadım. Havuz küçük ama keyifli. Yetişkin oteli olması da harika."

"Bon hôtel de classe moyenne supérieure. Tres bon buffet petit-déjeuner, varié. A 5 mn à pied de la plage de petits cailloux mais les chaises longues/parasol sont payants à la mer."
"Room too small, bedding not a luxury, not a coffee maker,"
"The staff were friendly and helpful!"

"Odalar biraz küçük, balkon da yok ama temiz bir işletme. Görevli arkadaş son derece nazik ve yardımcı"

"Yeni tadilat yapilmis bir otel. Giris katinda guzel dekore edilmis bistro var biraz ama pahali. Kahve 120.-TL Konumu guzel. Odalarin tasarimi cok kötü. Duş aldim ve bütün oda su icerisinde kaldi. Unfortunately we didnt get to try the advertised spa facilities as it was not ready but all in all a very good experience."

"Logement d’exception dans la vieille ville d’Antalya. Chambre typique, propre et bien équipée. Le beau jardin est un vrai plus. Proche de toutes commodités (restaurants, bars, magasins, transports…). Le personnel est très accueillant et arrangeant. Une adresse ne pas manquer !"

"Bu zamana kadar kaldığım en tatlı ve huzurlu otel olabilir. Otantik konseptli bir otel. Çok güzel bir bahçesi var, her şey özenle hazırlanmış. "Great place to stay. Shower small but all clean and no issues. Breakfast was very good and fresh. Great location"

Prior to arriving, hotel had also been messaged asking for one of the sea facing rooms to have 2 single beds and they replied this would be done. Upon arrival, this request was declined as the sea view rooms don't have this option, to which I could only ask 'why did I receive this reply'. "Bahce odasini secmistik fotograflarda daha buyuk gozukuyordu fakat oda bize biraz kucuk geldi, o acidan asiri konforlu degildi fakat temizligi, sakinligi acisindan guzeldi. Kahvaltisi az cesitliydi fakat lezzetliydi. Fakat odalarin icerisine banyolardan ve camlardan cok fazla ses gecirimi oluyordu. Bu konuda bir iyilestirme yapilabilir ama genel olarak ortalama-guzel bir deneyimdi."

"No frill hotel for the money it wasn’t super clean, but it was OK. Parking was a challenge. Very small garage tough for big cars. The rooms are hot and if you don’t leave your key in the slot for electricity while you’re not in the room, it shuts down that’s why it’s hot"
"War sehr gut.danke"

"We had a terrible night No soundproofing, we could hear all the road noises as well as the noise from the neighbour, the wall between us and the neighbour was not a wall, it was like cardboard, we could hear everything. The breakfast was really very basic, very little choice, basic quality products."

"Snyggt designat hotell med mycket trevlig och hjälpsam personal. Belysningen rent allmänt och i rummen kunde vara bättre. Skulle önska bättre städning av alla utrymmen. Det är inte ett hotell för den ljudkänsliga då det är extremt dåligt isolerat och alla ljud går igenom väggarna."
"Car pqrking has issue, my car hit the bottom as I enter the parking, wrong calculations with the hill"

"Didnt enjoy the garden room with patio as it is outside the building and so so loud by the road. Also electricity went off in the middle of the night and the generator was right next to room at 3am so loud. Loud neighbours which reception did quieten down. Room never got serviced in 3 days had to ask for towels. Charged extra for my partner as i forgot to add his name to the booking so charged 10 euro extra per night. Breakfast was included and good selection. Aircon in room hard to get right and angle wasnt good."
"Fastest checkout of my life. Booked for 5 nights but checked out within 3 hours."
"heel gemakkelijk, tramstation naar de binnenstad om de hoek. je krijgt een brochure voor leuke activiteiten in de buurt en voor de rest een erg fijne vakantie gehad."
"Great property . We arrived and was 38degrees the fridge in the room was off with no water. It’s a small matter but wasn’t nice."

"Nicht wie angepriesen! Die Zimmer sind definitiv nicht schallisoliert. Es hörte sich an, als würde ich versuchen, die ganze Nacht bei geschlossenem Fenster mitten auf einer belebten Hauptstraße zu schlafen. Ich hatte das Gefühl, dass ich mit meinen Nachbarn nebenan im Bett lag, als sie anfingen los zu legen. Die Wände, Türen und Fenster müssen aus Pappe sein. Das Hotel sieht auf den Bildern besser und sauberer aus, als es in Wirklichkeit ist. Haare und Staub so weit das Auge reicht. Die Lage ist sehr zentral und wenn der Preis keinen Luxus versprechen würde, wäre es vielleicht ausreichend und akzeptabel, um nachts ein paar Stunden zu crashen. Die Straßenbahn ist praktisch vor der Tür, Taxis sind in max. 2 Minuten da, wenn man sie ruft und vieles ist auch zu Fuß gut erreichbar. Vorsicht am Morgen.. selbst wenn man das "Bitte nicht stören"-Schild an die Tür hängt, kann man sicher sein, dass es jeden Tag ignoriert wird und das Reinigungspersonal einfach die Tür aufschließt. Der Garten ist ganz nett, aber ziemlich klein. Das einzig Positive sind ein paar Mitarbeiter, die sehr hilfsbereit waren. Zu viele No-Gos und zu viele bessere Hotels in Antalya, um wiederzukommen."

"3 gün tatil için konakladık. İki çocuklu olduğumuz için oda küçük geldi, hemen yardımcı oldular. Geçtiğimiz Oda gayet geniş, ferah ve temizdi, duşu, soğutması çok iyiydi. Kahvaltı gayet iyi ama kahvaltıda çalışan ekip harika ötesiydi. Hepsi oldukça sempatik, güler yüzlü ve ilgiliydi. Hiçbirini ayırt etmeden teşekkür ederim. Hergün kahvaltıda sıcak ve soğuk seçenekleri mevcuttu. Otel konum olarak da harika bir yerde. Kendi kapalı otoparkı mevcut. Tekrar ziyeret etmek de tereddüt yaşamayacağım bir yer oldu. Herkese iyi tatiller."
"Really good hotel"
"Design of rooms is terrible! Definitely not soundproof rooms."
"Lovely decor and very friendly staff"
"Otel gayet guzel ve temizdi tek sikayetci oldugumuz taraf araba seslerini cok fazla iceri aliyor odalar onun haricinde bir sikayetimiz yok …"
"The staffs are not very helpful."
"Leider sehr hellhörig; ansonsten wunderschönes Hotel - wie auf den Bildern."

"Fiyata göre hizmet çok iyiydi. Kahvaltısı güzeldi. Personel ilgiliydi. Müdür bizimle ilgilendi Konum çok merkezi değil ama çok da uzak değil Oda konforu, otelin iç tasarımı vs. Cok iyiydi. Yüksek tavan odalar ferahdı"

"Unfortunately, the hotel is below average; 1- The receptionist is not helpful ( not all of them) 2- No room service after 8 3-if u ask for anything over the phone they will said yes yes we will help u, then they don’t actually help. 4- Room are very small ( don’t believe the photos) 5 - No blanket/ Duvet but only a Sheet on the bed and we ask them for a blanket/ Duvet, the receptionist said we will send you one but nothing arrived."
"Sehr gut"

"Hotel was a huge disappointment. Lobby area is nicely decorated but Signs of wear all around (dirty carpets, water damage). Room smelled like mold, as did the towels. Dark rooms, and no storage. Bathroom was cramped and not designed well, the floor always stayed wet from the shower. Hotel is in an industrial area. Manager was nice but rest of staff were meh. I wouldn’t come back and I couldn’t wait to check out."
"Sehr schönes, sauberes Hotel zwischen Flughafen und Busbahnhof. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich."

"Very clean hotel with friendly staff. Breakfast is very good for the rate. Orange juice or any other juice for breakfast is an additional charge. Negatives are, the room smelled of stale water and there was a pool of water in front of the hotel from overwatering the plants. Not convenient when getting in and out of cabs."

"Had a great experience at this hotel it is very clean and nicely decorated. The front desk staff was very friendly and helpful. My friend forgot his ring in the bathroom and had a flight to catch so he was already on the way to the airport. The hotel staff sent the ring over in a taxi for him so he wouldn’t miss his flight. Amazing service we will definitely return to this hotel next time we are in Antalya."
"Kahvaltı hariç her şey güzeldi.Teşekkürler 🙏"

"Very nice hotel , but there is no room service at the time of the check in which made us wait 2 hours to check in, i booked a child on Expedia but they made me pay again at the property. Rooms are nice but extremely small"
"Very good modern hotel with not high price. Its about 20 minutes away walking from best district in Antalya - Old City."
"Good"
"Good place to stay, nice environment, and excellent staff. Housekeeping was excellent and the receptionist are very good at there job. Will stay at again."
"Next door to marks Antalya shooing mall and the forest attractions"
"Very poor hotel. Room stinks of smoke and washroom is absolutely gross"

"Detta hotell ligger mitt i centrum, men är mer ett trestjärnigt än ett fyrstjärnigt hotell. Rummen väldigt små. Ett fyrstärnigt hotell ska inte ha pappersmuggar vid frukostserveringen, utan det ska vara riktiga glas och koppar. Personalen var dock väldigt service inriktade och trevliga"
"Very good"

"It was a very nice hotel and everything was perfect however we were there for 8 days and the sheets were not changed once The pool was very nice and refreshing perfect for the hot climate Would recommend!!!"

"Temizliğinden kahvaltısına denize yakınlığına her şey gayet iyiydi. Tek sıkıntı banyosunun kapı dizaynı :) boşluklu kapatma sistemi olduğu için dışardan içerisi gözükebiliyor. O da onemlı bir sıkıntı değil tabi, konaklayacak olanlara tavsıye edılır."
"It was good"

"Bra rum, nära till centrum. Frukosten var inte alls bra, det saknades. Glas , skålar, skedar., salt varje dag, man var tvungen och fråga. Det var ofräscht på borden. Mycket folk, för lite plats, det fanns ingen som regelbundet plockade bort från borden från tidigare gäster eller torkade borden, tog ett bra tag innan det togs bort och man fick ett fräscht ledigt bord att sitta vid. Begränsat utbud. Samma varje dag. Brödet var inte färskt och det låg bara massa småbitar kvar i korgen. Uppskattar att det fanns en pool, dock kunde poolområdet städas lite och göras mysigare. Det var inte så mysigt att ligga där o sola. Det är sol endast på förmiddagen fram till ca kl 14. Sedan hamnar poolområdet i skuggan. Rummen var ok. Lite lampor som inte fungerade och handdukar byttes för en person och inte för alla. Ingen. Golvhandduk lämnades efter att de tagit den som fanns. Det var en person som var trevlig och hälsade och det var han i receptionen vid utcheckning, annars var det svårt att få ett hej. Man visste knappt om det var personal eller gäster på hotellet då de inte riktigt framgick. Annars bra hotell för kortare vistelser. Det utgjorde sitt syfte och sängen var helt ok lagom mjuk/hård. Kan absolut bo där igen för att få ett hotell nära till stan med pool och frukost. Bussarna går regelbundet utanför hotellet. Kattungarna"
"No clean"

"Sejour parfait dans chalbre d'angle avec balcon. Chambre spacieuse. Proche du centre à pieds mais dans un quartier moins touristique. Restaurants à proximité. Facilité de stationnement au pied de l'immeuble. Accueil chaleureux. Petite piscine. Adresse à recommander. Prix très satisfaisant pour les prestations."

"Excellent hotel. From the beginning, the staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming. The location is perfect just a short, pleasant walk to both the Old Town and the beach. The pool area is lovely, offering a relaxing spot to swim and unwind. Breakfast exceeded expectations, especially considering the price. Communication with the hotel was smooth and efficient. If you’re looking for a place to stay in the Old Town of Antalya, this is the one."

"Personalen på hotellet var vänliga och bemötte oss på ett trevligt sätt. Tyvärr var städningen en stor besvikelse. Under de tio nätter vi bodde där blev rummet aldrig ordentligt städat. Ingen kom och bytte sängkläder en enda gång, och badrummet rengjordes inte alls under hela vistelsen. Det samlades smuts, och det kändes ofräscht att bo där så länge utan någon form av rengöring. Det drog tyvärr ner hela upplevelsen, och vi kände oss inte bekväma. Jag är därför inte alls nöjd och hade förväntat mig en högre standard, särskilt när det gäller hygien och renlighet."
"Really nice and friendly staff Rooms and bathroom clean and tiny , would definitely good back tomorrow!!!! 👊👊👊"

"The checkin was delayed due to our room door getting stuck. It took lot of time for them to resolve. Hence it all started on the wrong footing. The AC in the room was poorly installed and designed with insufficient blow and cooling capacity for such a big room. Antalya is hot during June and we had a difficult time to cope with the heat inside the room. When we complained to the front reception, they wouldn’t take any action to rectify the root cause of the problem. Subsequently, we had to ask them to install pedestal fans (2 nos) to keep the room ventilated. Overall it was not a good experience in this hotel. There was a gentleman in the front desk at the reception in the day shift and he wasn’t helpful at all in resolving issues. He would just say “I’m not a technician and hence I am unable to resolve” which is not the kind of response that guests want to hear. He wouldn’t care to offer any help nor assistance and thus totally unprofessional. Keeping such people at the front desk is detrimental to the business. You get frustrated as he tests your patience to the core. There was another gentleman during the night shift and he was very helpful and kind. Overall not a good stay at this place."

"We were so disappointed The room was run down furniture was so ours and dirty looking the cabinet door was missing no glasses in the room Staff was ok for the most part Breakfast was awful coffee in the room was 1 person We had paid for 5nights but left after 3 Sorry Mene Hotel you need to do a lot better!!!"
"Good experiences"
"Very friendly staff. Perfect location in the heart of the city. Close transport links. Walkable distance to the city and shopping."
"Guzel bakimli güler yüzlü persenel güzel kahvalti daha ne olsun"
"Odada sigara kokusu vardı."
"Good cleaning and v nice stuff"

"Good friendly service. Nice clean pool to cool down in. Tasty breakfast. Easy check in and out. Easy to park near hotel. Nice balcony with a sea view. Free water and fridge. Option for room service. Air conditioning good and not too loud. Only bad points were that the shower head could be cleaner and the bed sheet was not that comfortable as it has a towel material (this seems to be a local thing though as we experienced it in other hotels too)"
"Staff were very friendly and room was comfortable"
"Friendly staff and very clean rooms"

"İki ayrı oda tutarak girdiğimiz otelde beş kişi konakladık. Odanın birinde buzdolabı çalışmıyordu sorun iletince hemen ilgilenip odamızı değiştirdiler. Çalışanlar gayet ilgili kahvaltı gerçekten çok güzel ve çeşitli taze. Klimalar çok eski ama çalışır durumda. Odalarda çöp kovası da olmalı bir de kıyafet asmak için askı olmalı."
"Internet very poor but overall a good hotel to stay. Staff was excellent!"

"Good breakfast. But at the hotel, you feel like you're in prison. You're not allowed to invite anyone to your room, even during the day. Strict Turkish rules + staff homophobia. Slow internet, at least in my room."
"Smelly room, bad aircon"

"Ich hatte einen wirklich tollen Aufenthalt! Die Mitarbeiter waren unglaublich freundlich und hilfsbereit – vom Empfang bis zur Küche. Besonders das Personal beim Frühstück war super herzlich und aufmerksam. Das ganze Hotel war sehr sauber, und das Frühstück war ein echtes Highlight: große Auswahl, abwechslungsreich und lecker – da ist für jeden etwas dabei! Einziger kleiner Kritikpunkt: Die Fenster müssen geschlossen bleiben, sonst wird es draußen leider etwas zu laut. Aber das ist wirklich das einzige Manko. Ich werde dieses Hotel auf jeden Fall wieder buchen und kann es wärmstens empfehlen!"
"Internet very slow"
"Reception 🛎️ e servizi professionali"
"Friendly staff and middle of the center"

"Hotelli hyvällä paikalla josta lyhyt matka rantaan ja satamaan ym.Henkilökunta erittäin ystävällisiä ja mukavia.Aamupala erittäin runsas, joten kaikille löytyy varmasti syötävää ja juotavaa, niin lapsille kuin aikuisillekkin.Ainoana miinuksena on huoneiden kunto.Huoneissa on kokolattiamatot ja meidän huoneen matto oli kamala ja likainen.Myös seinät kaipaisivat vähän kunnostusta.Huoneiden kunnosta huolimatta jos menen vielä Antalyaan varaan huoneeni tästä hotellista."

"Vi hadde et fint opphold på Antroyal, men noen ting trakk opplevelsen ned for vår del, bl.a. at det luktet mugg på badet og at vi fikk for lite toalettpapir. Sengene var harde og det var ikke lystette gardiner, men det er vel mer en smakssak. I tillegg sto TVn på hele tiden under frokosten."
"Great experience"
"This hotel is close to city centre and within a short distance from tourist sites. Front desk Mr. Younus was super excellent. Very helpful, cordial and assisted greatly."
"All good, staff helpful"
"The bed is very uncomfortable and the air condition is straight on the bed The breakfast was ok"
"Zeer vriendelijk personeel, ontbijt was prima. Badkamer beetje verouderd."

"Det var mycket bra, uppmärksamheten på turisten var mycket bra. den perfekta rengöringen Läget för den gamla staden och stranden är mycket bra. Frukosten mycket bra. Jag rekommenderar detta hotell. :)"
"resepsiyonun bir kısmı çok kabaydı ve kendimi garip hissettim"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "الفندق ممتاز وغرفهم حلوه والستاف متعاون ومساحة الغرفه كانت ممتازه حق ثلاث اشخاص"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Pros: Check inn, reception good. Area nice closer to everything. Akra V needs completely update in rooms/facilities as Akra Hotel, but still good. Food variety and quality is good at Panora Restaurant where hotel serves breakfast and dinner. Cons: As a Dog friendly hotel, the first day couldn't sleep all night because below floor a dog barked, maked voices all night till morning. This policy disturbes all other guests, should be changed. Next day, asked to change my room to another side of the building, where pets are not allowed. Breakfast hall at Panora Restaurant at main Akra Building is a totally chaotic place. Couldn't find 10 minutes any single clean table for sitting, asking several staff to clean a table but all says they are busy! Stayed in total 5 days, each day same regardless of the time I arrived. Coffee/tea/water service at all under control of service staff so you cannot take by yourself. However, they don't even ask or bring you tea/cofee/water, you should ask several times to several staff. All behaves they are so busy and will bring later. So, I was going to bar area and bringing my own coffee/tea because no one is serving. Please return to old system and allow guests to get their own coffee/tea from the common area as they are getting their food. Asmani restaurant at top floor of Akra Hotel over priced, menu is so strange and food is not tasty. We ordered several things to try paid more than 200$ and left with no taste. Dissatisfied, never ever again!"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Highly reccomend. Staff so friendly."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "beach and swimming pools were very nice. Breakfast and dinner were amazing. GYM was wonderful. staff was polite. Rooms are beautiful."

review_text: "Allt var toppen med detta hotell. Frukosten, läget och havet . Rekommenderar verkligen detta hotell😊🌞🏖"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Very nice big, clean, well equipped room. Staff was very helpful and friendly. The Pools and parks as well as the Buffet at Akra were great"

review_text: "Perfect"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Otele girişten itibaren tüm çalışanlar, misafir ilişkilerindeki personel rahat etmeniz ve mutlu ayrılmanız için ellerinden gelenin fazlasını yapmaya çalışıyorlar. Otel ve oda konforlu ve temiz. Yalnızca odalarda kettle yerine kahve makinası olması daha iyi olurdu."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Akra otelde daha önce konaklamama rağmen Akra V otelde ilk defa konakladım. Çalışanların ilgi ve alakaları müthişti. Akra profesyonelliği buraya da sirayet etmiş. Antalya’da konaklayacağım tek adres burası. Her şey için teşekkür ederim."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Best hotel we stayed. We met two lovely ladies at the reception and they are amazing. They are your asset."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Fantastisk område, tæt på strand og mange gode café restauranter. Familie venligt. Fitness og spa er godt. Fantastisk morgenmad. Venlige, smilende og hjælpsomme medarbejder Vi opholdte os i 3 dage, og fik en høj grad af service. Det kunne mærkes, at personalet er kompetent og går op i at gæsternes ophold bliver til en god og uforglemmelige oplevelse. Jeg vil bestemt komme igen, for at nyde maden, og faciliteterne og den gode service. Tak til alle Akra V, som tog kærligt og gavmild af os, og en ekstra tak til Merve. Vi blev mødt med et stort varmt smil hvergang vi mødte hende."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Facilities at both Akra Hotel s are shared, therefore the breakfast buffet at Akra was amazing in everything from the scenery to the food options and excellent service"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Room is very nice. Balcony us very very spaceious."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "the team are really nice. Busra & Cinan were very helpful and my kids enjoyed the breakfast buffet and staying on the pool :) this is my 2nd time at this Akra."

review_text: "Everything was amazing. 10/10"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "The staff are absolutely amazing. Busra and Ilka were brilliant and very kind to name a few. Both morning and evening staff were great and welcoming. Never fail to smile or ask if I needed anything. Definitely recommend."

review_text: "Hersey dört dörtlüktü"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Kısa olmasına rağmen fazlası ile sunulan bir konfor mevcuttu. Ama sürüdürülebilirlik adına alınmış uygulamalar en takdir edilmesi gereken kısmı."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "A really nice hotel, especially with the amenities across the street in the Akra hotel. Friendly staff that speak multiple languages, clean rooms, nice beach and pool area. Highly recommended."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Zimmer sauber und geräumig , Personal sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, Wasserkocher im Zimmer mit Kaffee und Tee, im Badezimmer Shaving Kit, Kamm, Wattepads, Zahnbürste mit Zahnpasta. Großer Fernseher. Frühstück im gegenüberliegenden Hotel Akra (***** alles was das Herz begehrt; eines der besten Frühstücksbüffet, die ich je hatte) und 25 m Pool ebenfalls im Hotel auf der anderen Straßenseite erreichbar über eine Fußgängerbrücke"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Hotel was okay and service was fine too , but you have to go to the otherside(main hotel) for everything,best suggestion will be book Akra not Akra V."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "We stayed one night and then transferred to Akra hotel. Akra V is across the road and we didn’t know we would be going back and forth for breakfast and to access the facilities. It was too hot and inconvenient to do this multiple times a day. Akra hotel was amazing and I would highly recommend. We stayed in the sea view room and had amazing views. I will definitely be returning as I had a great time. The staff were amazing. Pool service was great and we had everything we needed at Akra."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "People at the front desk were horrible, Tolga was very helpful and kind with his great customer service"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Clean"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Super Hotel"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Wow! What can I say. Beautiful hotel and staff were amazing from start to finish. Did a nice birthday surprise for my partner and the maid was amazing. I would come back 100 percent, just from how the staff were kind, attentive and friendly- that really makes an hotel extra special! Thank you Akra :)"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Great place. Excellent access to private beach and Akra Hotel amenities. Few hours of swimming - very enjoyable. Got upgrade to seaview room-Thank You!"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Lyxigt hotell som till hösten ska renovera alla rum, vilket behövs. Utöver de fint och modernt hotell men många pooler. Vi blev glatt överraksade med en uppgraderade till de 5 stjärninga hotellet brevid. Rekommenderas varmt"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Fantastiskt hotell rekommenderar verkligen, framöver blir det bara detta hotell. Har aldrig varit så utvilad på en semester/ En som besöker Antalya minst två gånger per år."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Best feature was the panoramic views at breakfast. The sea and the mountains absolutely stunning! Hotel grounds are kept pristeen. All staff amazing. Special shout out to semra our cleaner! Very smiley and friendly. Thanks. Only bad point that the akra v is on the other side of the road and some services not as good as main akra. Middle of centre so good location, bus stops outside so short ride to old town or terracity shopping"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "We could access the entire facilities of Akra Hotel, which is great."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Çok keyifli bir konaklama geçirdik"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "I have travelled to many countries, and stayed at five star hotels and Akra V hotel is one of the best I stayed at. This was my first time in Antalya and I felt very welcomed. The hotel was clean, he staff were lovely. We had access to all the facilities of Akra hotel. The location was great, as its central and other historic sites are not too far away. There is always a Akra taxi waiting outside, with good prices should you need to visit anywhere. I will definitely come again and recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Antalya."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "If I come back to Antalya, I will definitely stay here. Honestly, I was very impressed by their hospitality. They gave me a free upgrades which wrre amazing. The breakfast was superb. I have stayed in many 5* hotels but i have to say this one stands out in terms of their guest services and reception. The manager (Umut i guess) was very helpful and followed up with me to ensure all was good. The beach, pool, and turkish bath are all excellent. The other staff were very professional and accomodating. Any item I asked from the room was delivered immediately. The only issue I had was that their call center which did not know about collect call to Canada and I ended up using my cell phone to attend an urgent matter."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Great stay, restaurants, etc. Only downside, they rip you a new one for laundry services & try to rip you a new one for taxi service (just use Uber)."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "The food here is awful, but the infinity pool and hotel is beautiful. They messed up our dining bill one day and another day they tried to give me another persons bill although I never ordered anything at the beach. I had billing issues twice at the beach restaurant. The service at the rooftop restaurant Asmani was below average."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "This hotel is absolutely amazing, great helpful staff, clean and comfortable. One of the best hotels I have stayed at!"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Herşey çok iyiydi özellikle plaj bölümünde çalışan arkadaşlara çok teşekkür ederim"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Very good value for my money"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Great property! Awesome location with an amazing grocery store and plenty of dining options. Pools are amazing but the beach leaves much to be desired. I suggest taking a taxi to a nearby (20 min) beach instead"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "The entire staff is excellent. The young front desk associate went above and beyond. His English was great too! Beautiful property And amazing breakfast buffet with lots of local cheeses, fruits vegetables and sweets. Exactly what I want to see traveling to another country. But they also have traditional eggs, waffles, oatmeal etc. Restaurants on site were amazing and inexpensive. The only negative is that all cocktails were watered down."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Leider habe ich nicht das Hotel bekommen , was ich bei ihnen laut Bilder und Reklame gebucht habe. Die Bilder waren vom gegenüber liegenden Hotel was auch zu der Gesellschaft gehört. Dieses war aber nicht beschrieben bei der Buchung das es nicht dieses Akra Hotel ist sondern das gegenüber. Auch nach einigen Gesprächen mit den Angestellten und Rezeption das wir auch bereit sind die Differenz zu zahlen ohne Anerkennung einer Schuld damit wir in diesem Hotel bleiben was auch geworben wurde , wurde uns nicht weiter geholfen. Der service dazu war sehr schlecht und nicht zu empfehlen. Hier wurden auch Buchungen von Zimmer mehrfach gemacht wo es sowieso schon Ärger an der Rezeption gab. Mir wurde gesagt das die Leitung nichts damit zu tun hat und nur Expedia dafür verantwortlich ist , und Expedia die Bilder dazu auch in ihrer Werbung eigenständig gemacht hat. Ich solle mich an sie wenden. Der Preis der Unterkunft war der gleiche welches ich bezahlt habe eigentlich mit dem Aufenthalt für die in Expedia gezeigten Bilder und Hotel. Ich buche immer über Sie habe schon viele Hotel gebucht und nächste Woche wieder eine Buchung in Afrika für mich und meine Mitarbeiter. Ich buche diese Hotels jetzt direkt da mir hier auch nicht geholfen wurde wie damals in Kusadasi. Dort musste ich auch alles selber klären. Wir haben nicht einmal eine Entschuldigung bekommen. Wobei das personal anscheinend nichts dafür kann. Ich habe auch keine Antwort von ihnen beo"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "A nice hotel in a really good location. I actually booked myself into the Akra V which was the wrong one, don’t be fooled by the pictures! Akra V is across the road from Akra and is very quiet, so you would have to cross the main road everyday just to access the pools/other amenities in Akra. I needed to pay extra to change over to Akra but it was worth it. The staff member at check in was helpful and managed to find us a room and also got us transport to move over to Akra. I have stayed before and enjoyed the experience so much I stayed again. Hospitality is NOT great. Service needs to improve - some of the staff let the hotel down but overall, very good. Easy to get taxis from the hotel with the assistance of staff. Pools are wonderful, mixed for families as well as separate pools for couples and individuals to enjoy. The spa and gym was one of my favourite things about the hotel as the gym is fully stocked and modern, the sauna is a really good size with both unisex and women only options. My only issue with Akra is the lack of friendliness from a lot of the staff. General hospiality isnt great, check in was a bland experience, the staff member failed to advise us of any amenities and didnt even tell us where or when breakfast would be served. Some members of staff stood out as being very good, 1 was Fatihaan at the pool and Caglar at breakfast were helpful. Otherwise it would be nice if the other members of staff smiled a bit more and were a bit more attentive!"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "+ Great breakfast. + Fantastic ocean views. + easy access to city and a lot of activities. + very helpful hotel workers. + a lot of fun around the hotel."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "My stay at Akra hotel was amazing! We stayed at the Akra V and it was so convenient, to use all of the facilities of the Akra hotel across the street, the rooms were very clean and comfortable the front desk was always friendly and helpful. Food was amazing in breakfast buffet and lunch buffet the other food outlets were very nice and the bar. The hair salon and pedicure was great, pool and beach very very comfortable and so beautiful we had a wonderful time"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Wouldn't recommend. The staff here compared to the main Akra hotel seem not just not care nearly as much. We didn't even get the two king rooms we paid for, they were twin rooms and they didn't bother to put the beds together or have a double duvet even after multiple requests. I would avoid and just get the main Akra or better still find another hotel in the area that will appreciate your custom."

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Akra V hotel is much quieter than akra hotel but with access to all facilities of akra"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "The hotel was great with great amenities"

hotel_name: Akra V - Access to Akra Antalya
review_text: "Hotel is getting a bit tired and needs some maintaining and refreshing. Stayed here previously and it was fantastic, this time it wasn’t anything special."

"Självla läget där hotellen låg var mycket bra läge. Bra pool sen var det bara en trappa ner från poolen ner till en privat strand. AC lät mycket och de gick inte sova, flygplanen åkte exakt ovanför hotellet och de störde en hel del med sömnen också. Det värsta med hotellet var att man inte fick handla utifrån och hämta in i hotellet. Det kunde vara vad som helst , mat , dricka , m.m… MAX 2 dagar ska man vara på denna hotellen inte mer."
"Très belle vu Restaurant très chèr Vieille chambre Lit n est pas confortable de tt Mais a l ensemble un charmant hôtel"
"Very good overall, nice restaurant and staff, but they charged us some drinks from the room fridge at the check out when we never drink them."

"The hotel is in a relatively good location — close to the airport but far from the city center. There's only a small supermarket within 100 meters. The area is calm, but planes fly overhead almost every minute, which can be disturbing. Check-in was smooth and the receptionist was polite. Unfortunately, the experience changed on our first afternoon. We bought a box of water, some chips, biscuits, and nuts from the nearby store for our kids. At the hotel entrance, a receptionist rudely stopped us, questioned us about what was in our bag, and even opened and searched it without permission. He confiscated the snacks and said we had to buy them from the hotel at 120 lira per item. This was a very disrespectful and uncomfortable situation. Even worse, at check-out, only the biscuits and nuts were returned — the chips were gone, clearly eaten by someone. It wasn’t about the value of the chips, but the lack of respect for guests' belongings and basic hospitality. Customer service here is weak, and guests are treated more like money than people. I hope the hotel management reconsiders how they treat their customers in the future"

"Staff was pleasant & there's lots of free parking. Beautiful pool area, nice balcony, decent breakfast. Room was sort of clean, unswept floors, open ceiling in shower. Room was very moist, everything in the room was a bit wet, but after running the air conditioning all night it was much better. Room decor feels old, not modern."

"An OK hotel at Lara Beach. Could do with some renovations. Breakfast choice not great. Food in the restaurant and outside bar area were good although the waiting staff had an attitude. Reception staff were good."
"Fantastisk udsigt og god wifi. Støj fra fly der fløj lige over hotellet hver 3.-5. minut De kunne ikke finde min reservation og ville se bevis, så noget tyder på de ikke har haft den i systemet"

"Otel konum olarak çok güzel.Otel ile aynı konumda yeni açılmış la vera restoran ve beach mükemmel.Çok keyifli bir yer ancak ıdalar ve otel çok eski ve bakımsız .Kahvaltı kötü..Tüm bunlara rağmen oteli sadece uyumak için kullanıp La vera da zaman geçirnek çok güzel 👍👍"
"Manzarası mükemmeldi. Yapı biraz yaşlı fakat temizlik ve hizmet ile bu eksiklik göz ardı edilebilir. Çalışanlar güler yüzlü ve çalışkan. Havuz ve denizi çok güzel."

"I stayed at the Lara Hotel for 2 nights and 3 days. While I was generally satisfied with my stay, I found the receptionist's behavior unwelcoming and rude. The morning receptionist, in particular, was unhelpful and acted as if assisting guests was a burden. On the other hand, the breakfast and cleaning staff were very helpful."
"A new bar on the left hand side of hotel now open with loud music till the early hours of the morning has now made this family friendly hotel a no go."

"The outside pool area and restaurant plus the various work being carried out to the various levels down to sea front will look amazing once finished. They really need to start spending money internally with the carpets and bedrooms but £85.00 per room B&B with balcony is great value."

"Fin pool, vacker utsikt och bra säng. Dock slitet rum som inte kändes helt rent heller. Hög musik från baren till efter klockan 12 på natten vilket gjorde att öronproppar behövdes, även pga ljud från AC:n och minibaren. Stranden var stängd pga renovering vilket inte hade förmedlats innan vistelsen och det pågick byggen på båda sidor av hotellet, det var därmed inte så rofyllt under dagarna och inte heller på kvällen iom musik från baren. Bott på hotellet under lågsäsong förut och då var det såklart lugnare och bättre i mitt tycke. Bra läge på hotellet nära parken och bra frukost som även en vegan kan bli mätt på iom grönsaker, bröd, frukt och olika sorters sylt."

"Otel genel olarak konforlu ve temizdi. Ulaşımda da bir sıkıntı yaşamadım. Çalışan arkadaşlardan çok memnun kaldım. Başarılılar, güler yüzlüler :) 1 puanı otelin restoran kısmından kırdım çünkü ana yemek ve türevlerinde vejetaryen seçenek oldukça azdı, hatta neredeyse hiç yoktu. Şefe de bunu dile getirdim bana kaliteye önem verdiklerinden bahsettiler ama vejetaryen seçenekle kalite arasında nasıl bir korelasyon var anlamış değilim... Şanssızlığıma beach kapalıydı yapacak bir şey yok, üzücü sadece :) Genel olarak memnun kaldım. F/p olarak da üzmüyor. Sadece menüde bizi de biraz görürseniz gözüm kapalı herkese tavsiye ederim. Bu gözler ana yemekte en azından bir falafel köfte görmek istedi :)) Hizmetiniz için teşekkürler, iyi çalışmalar."
"Lavtgående fly hvert 2.3. minut hele døgnet rundt. Ikke noget fantastisk internet. Venlig og hjælpsom betjening. Spiserestaurant meget dyr. Prisen var ca. det halve i byen."

"Overall, a great stay. Recent upgrades to the pool area are excellent. Pool and surrounding areas are both superb! New restaurant serves great food and drink, although very pricey for Turkey. Breakfast buffet was fine for the price paid. Rooms are in need of an update, but we're very clean, air conditioning worked well and were serviced by housekeeping daily. Beds allowed for good sleep each night. Staff at the hotel are amazing. BUT, I was far from impressed with the attitude and approach of the hotel manager. When discussing the lack of hot water in my room for a second day running, and being accused of lying, this left me feeling less than pleased. Thankfully, the rest of the hotel staff don't operate on the same values as the management! Hopefully the manager reads this and takes note!"
"Çok kötü hiç ilgilenmediler tavsiye etmiyorum"
"فندق هادئ ونظيف والخدمه جيده والموظفون محترمون و الفطور جيداً وسوف نكرر الزيارة مرة أخرى ."
"Fiyat performans oteli. Odalar yeterli genişlikte, temizliği güzel, çalışanlar güleryüzlü geçirdiğimiz beş günden memnun bir şekilde ayrılıyoruz."

"Antalya Havalimanından olan yurtdışı uçuşumuz için bir gün gidiş bir gün de dönüşte konakladık. Gayet memnun kaldık, temiz, sessiz bir çevrede. Yeterli bir kahvaltısı var. Her odada balkon var, klimaları çalışıyor. Teşekkür ederiz."

"Hotel genel olarak beklentilerimi karşıladı, özellikle kaleiçine yürüme mesafesinde olması güzeldi. Oda ve banyolar 2 günde bir temizleniyor, yataklar rahattı, oda içi biraz dardı, klima ve ve tv de sorun yaşadık ama ihtiyacımızı karşıladı, açık büfe kahvaltısı lezzetliydi. Genel olarak fiyat performans diyebilirim. Kısa süreliğine şehre geldiğimde tekrar kalabileceğim bir hotel."
"I like staying, but for 2-3 days"
"Odalar temiz ve güzeldi çalışanlar da çok sıcakkanlı ve yardımseverler memnun kaldık"
"Fiyat performans oteli, temiz oda genişliği yeterli"

"Fiyat performans olarak uygundu, klima ve mini buzdolabı yetersizdi, oda ve tekstil ürünleri temizdi, resepsiyonda ve mutfakta görevli personel güler yüzlü ve ilgiliydi, otel merkezi ve kolay yerdeydi markantalyaya 6-7 dk yürüme mesafesinde memnun kaldık"
"Personal gar nicht interssiert , Zimmer sehr klein und unsauber , keine Decken , kein Toiletten Papier , keine Seife , Kuehlschrank kaputt also insegesamt war nichts was man positiv sehen kann"
"Odalar sesi çok geçiriyor, onun dişinda güzel bir oteldi"
"Hôtel très agréable personnel à l écoute très sympathique et respectueux petit déjeuner très varié et rapport prix très correct hôtel bien situé en ville"

"Konakladığımız otel deneyimi harikaydı. Temiz ve ferah bir ortam, güler yüzlü ve yardımsever personel, lezzetli bir kahvaltı menüsü - tüm bunlar şehir merkezine de yakın olmasıyla birleşince beklentilerimizin çok ötesinde bir konaklama deneyimi yaşattı. Şehir merkezine sadece 20 dakikalık yürüme mesafesinde olması da büyük bir artı. Konaklamak için harika bir seçenek."

"Temiz odalar yeni tramvaya yakın markt Antalya’ya 500 metre şehir merkezi için kesinlikle tavsiye ederim sadece odada şampuan ve sabun yoktu istesem getirirlerdi sanırım. İhtiyaç duymadım. Ayrıca tek kötü yanı sabah kahvaltıdan önce çöküş yaptım. Normalde sandviç hazırlayıp vermeleri gerekiyordu bence sordum yapamayız dediler"

"Resimelrde görüldüğü gibi değil, çok daha iyi, gerçekten muhafazakar kafa dinlendirici denizede 1 dk yürüme mesafesi. Teşekkürler herşey için. one of the best experience’s we could have in a holiday trip, close to the sea,clean, organised, smiley staff. Definetly better than described at the app. Thank you all."
"Excellent once again Very professional Family friendly hotel"
"Die Mitarbeiter waren sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Gaben Informationen zu Busverbindungen und Taxiarrangements zum Flughafen. Es war sauber. Das Frühstück war gut."

"Beklediğimden çok daha kötü bir deneyimdi. Gayet güzel karşılandık, ama oda tam bir hayal kırıklığıydı. Birincisi internet berbattı asla çekmiyodu, ikincisi yatak gece boyunca gıcırdadığı için asla uyuyamadık, üçüncüsü lavaboda elinizi yıkadığınız an banyoya lavabonun arkasından su gelmeye başlıyordu. Bariz fiyasko bir oteldi."
"The property was exceptionally clean and comfortable. The walkability to old town was unmatched! The perfect stop in Antalya."
"Great location and lovely staff. The kids had a nice time there, very close to the park."
"조용한위치 도보로 올드타운 접근성이 좋다 친절한 서비스도 최고"
"주차 가능 (주차가 필요하면 미리 호텔에 연락바람) 깔끔하고 에어컨 빵빵 수압 굿 위치 굿 카라알리올루 바로 옆에 있음 방도 캐리어 2개 필 공간 있고 좋음 직원도 너무 친절하고 조식은 한상차림"
"Super, gerne wieder!"
"Her yönüyle çok memnun kaldık teşekkür ederiz."
"O hotel é legal e o sistema de meia pensão traz excelentes opções. Acredito que falta uma piscina no hotel, se houvesse poderiam cobrar ainda mais."
"The options was great"

"The pictures of the hotel and its description sounded great when we booked, however, arriving at the hotel was a different story. The rooms were extremely small without proper space of furnishings to open the 2 bags we had. We booked 3 rooms in total and all of our travelers were unhappy with the cleanliness of the room, finding hairs and stains on the bedding, as well as the furniture. The overall condition of the room was quite deteriorated and needed a lot of patching and repairing to get it to a decent standard. The hotel staff were all very kind and did what they could to try and make things better. Unfortunately, the overall state of the hotel didn’t leave them with many options. I would suggest the owner consider investing into the hotel to get the overall condition back to an acceptable standard. We were most disappointed to see the difference from what we thought we had booked and the reality of the actual rooms. Had we known in advance, we would have chosen another property."

"Comfortable bed, great location on Konyaalti area, beach and park is right across the street. You can book tours from the hotel. The rooms are a bit outdated and can use a refresh. But it was a comfortable stay and rooms were spacious."

"Unser Aufenthalt im PEARLY Hotel hat uns gut gefallen. Das Personal war sehr freundlich und aufmerksam, das Frühstück war wahnsinnig toll und das Zimmer mit kleinem Balkon in Richtung Meer war schön. Das einzigste das uns etwas gestört hat, war, dass die Sauberkeit nicht ganz perfekt war und die Bauarbeiten an Wand, Dusche, Whirlpool und Balkon nicht gerade schön oder sauber waren warum es deshalb etwas schäbig wirkte. Die Sitzmöglichkeit auf dem Balkon könnte man gemütlicher gestalten. Die Gegend ist jedoch sehr schön, belegt und voller Restaurants. Wir können das Restaurant direkt im Hotel mehr als nur empfehlen und ebenso das Valentino Coffee ein paar Meter weiter."
"Otel temiz ve güzeldi manzarası da hoş kahvaltısı çok iyiydi şehir içi konaklama için çok uygun ve güzel bir otel"

"Virkelig et hotel der ikke lever op til de standarder normale hoteller skal have, billederne på internettet er langt fra lig med virkeligheden og vi tjekkede ud efter 24 timer og fandt noget andet selv om vi skulle være der i 3 dage, forfærdeligt hotel."
"Full service"

"Ein sehr schönes Hotel. Wir hatten unser wunderschönes Zimmer in der 9.Etage mit Blick aufs Meer. Fantastisches Frühstücksbüffet. Das Personal ist sehr bemüht. Man könnte noch an der Freundlichkeit der Mitarbeiter im Frühstücksbereich arbeiten. Ansonsten hatten wir einen wunderschönen Aufenthalt."
"Unterkunft super macht weiter so"

"Çok güzel bi otel ve restoran. Temizlik çok iyi. Personelle ilgili en ufak bi sorun olmadı. Yemekler porsiyonlar fazla büyüktü hatta, lezzetleri de gayet iyiydi. Aile olarak kaldık. Deniz hemen karşıda. Konyaaltı plajı güzel ve keyifliydi. Dalgası çoktu ama çok iyi bilmeyenin de rahatça yüzebilecegı alan vardı. Kesinlikle tavsiye ediyoruz oteli"
"Het ontbijt trok op niks"
"This hotel is so nice and the workers are very helpful"

"Ne söyleyeceğimi bilmiyorum,"
"Great location. Nice and clean"
"Resepsiyon iki erkek görevli vardı karşılama berbat ilgi berbat herşey berbattı."
"Einige Stelle sind Reparatur bedürftig, das Essen wahr gut"
"Denize yürüme mesafesinde. Oldukca iyi kahvaltı ve restoranı var. Ücretsiz otopark mevcut"

"4 kattaki odada konakladık. Kısmideniz manzarası diye geçiyor fakat gayet güzel bir konumda. Odalar çok geniş değil fakat yeterli boyutta Fransız balkonu var kapıyı komple açıp içerisine havalandırmak için ideal. Yataklar rahat , odalar temiz ,, çalışanları gayet ilgili ve Güleryüzlu. Kahvaltısı da oldukça doyurucu,çeşit bol ve lezzetli. Konyaaltı civarındaki diğer otellerden oldukça iyi seviyede, tavsiye edilir."
"Otelin konumu çok güzel. Sigara içebilmek için balkonlu oda rezerve ettik. Çalışanları güler yüzlüydü. Kahvaltı güzeldi. Her şeyden memnun kaldık. Öneririz. 💖 Pearly Hotele teşekkürler."

"Otelci olarak ilk defa başka bi otelde konakladık.Açıkcası beklentimin üstünde çıktı.Kahvaltısı çeşitli ve çalışanlar ilgiliydi en önemlisi masa takibi vardı.servis oldukça başarılıydı.. Housekeeping den Fazilet hanım odamızı temizledi.Tunuslu bi hanımefendiymiş oldukça tatlı ve yardımsever.Kendisini çok sevdik.Teknikdeki amcada çok güler yüzlü ve canayakındı. Tuncay bey diye hatırlıyorum adını 🙏 ona da hizmetleri için teşekkür ederiz. Yalnızca ön büro tarafından check in olurken bize hiçbir bilgi verilmedi direk odaya yönlendirildik.Genel olarak her şey güzeldi bizim için keyifli bi konaklama oldu ."
"Great location, walking distance to beach and lots of restaurants"
"Veldig bra opplegg, maten var veldig god og nærme stranden :)"
"Freundlich, gute Ausstattung, sauber und gute Lage."

"Temizlik fena degildi benim kaldigim oda ust kattaydi banyo kucuktu lavobo önunde herhangi bir raf yada tezgah yoktu özel esyani koyacagin bir yer yoktu.Üst kattaki banyodan cok gürultu geliyordu .Ödedigim paraya göre bir oda degildi yataklar cok rahat degildi tek yastik vardi...Kahvaltisi iyiydi..Ben meslegim geregi Türkiye ve yurt disinda yuzlerce otelde kaldim...dolayisiyla degerlendirmeyi buna gore yaptim."
"Great place"
"Exactly what they promised. Very good hotel, good service, nice people, good location"
"Great location"
"Temiz ve düzenliydi. Tekrar tercih edilebilir"
"Wc lambası sürekli elektiriği gidiyordu"

"The rooms decorated nicely but the shower tray leaked all over the bathroom floor. Spa is nicely looked but I didn’t have time to use it . Food was not very special. Some staff is extremely rude with a big chip on the shoulder. Young man was clearly in the wrong job and had no appreciation to foreign guests. He actually told me to lean and speak Turkish . I’d avoid this hotel"
"It is in front of konyaalti beach ( my favorite in Antalya , so clean water) . Just you have to cross the road . Very beautiful location and nice breakfast. Also staff is friendly!"
"Sehr freundliches Personal, sehr gutes Essen und vielseitig. Vielfältige Getränkeauswahl."
"Bra läge, god frukost. Nöjd med boendet."
"All-around great"

"The hotel exceeded my expectations. The staff were very accommodating and helped us with any problems we had. The hotel restaurant was one of the best restaurants we tried while in Antalya. I would highly recommend it. In the perfect location in the middle of the strip on the beach and not too far from attractions."
"Absolutely Amazing"

"L’équipe à l’accueil du Pearly est Accueillant. L’hôtel est super bien placé, profitez de la plage et de tout ce qu’il y a autour. cependant, je me permets d’émettre une critique concernant le petit déjeuner à 8h du matin c’est bien trop tard surtout si vous prévoyez de faire des excursions vous devez oublier le petit déjeuner. Souvent. Les Excursion ont lieu à cette heure-ci lorsqu’il y a une prise en charge à l’hôtel la prochaine fois que je retournerai là-bas, je prendrai un hôtel avec une piscine, le restaurant de l’hôtel Et excellent, on y mange bien. "I had a 10 day stay with my wife. Positives: First, regarding the staff, they were all very nice. The room was good. The staff was helpful with our questions, and were pleasant to deal with. Negatives: There were 2 dead cockroaches on the balcony for 3 days, which prevented me and my wife for going out there and really enjoy the view. We also couldnt eat because of the disgust of it. I contacted the staff regarding that and they said they would clean it. Although, it took them 4 days to act, and I had to remind them twice. Furthermore, the cleaning in the hotel was not flexible. If we were at the hotel at 14.00, the cleaning lady would come and leave only to come back next day. So we HAD to be out there from 14.00. Asking for cleaning at 17.00 or 16.00 was not allowed since cleaning lady was gone. That was a pain to deal with at some days. With that being said, everything else was topnotch! Couple that with the amazing beach view and direct access to probably the best place in Antalya makes this hotel a top choice in my opinion. Overall? Would absolutely recommend."

"Absolutely beautiful entrance, surrounded by pink and purple flowers that give a luxurious first impression. The staff at the entrance were friendly and professional, and the same goes for the reception team – we felt truly welcomed right away. Since we arrived quite late (around 8:30 PM), we asked about food options and were recommended to visit the Urban Chic Lounge on the 10th floor. There we met a guy working at the buffet – incredibly friendly, helpful, and informative. It made a great impression. When we got to the room, we noticed one bed was missing, but the staff came immediately after we called and fixed it quickly and professionally. Excellent service! Just a few days ago, we stayed at Rixos Downtown Antalya, where the staff were cold, unfriendly, and barely spoke English. The hotel was overcrowded and still charged premium prices – around €2400 per night for our room. It was a disappointing experience. This hotel, on the other hand, cost less than half and offered a much better stay. The rooms were fresher, and the staff far more professional and welcoming. I can honestly say that this hotel exceeded our expectations. Highly recommended – we will definitely come back! 10 out of 10."

We opted for the all-inclusive package and were pleasantly surprised by the food. Far from being boring, the menu was frequently updated with a variety of fresh salads, delicious protein options, breads, and soups. The desserts were not only visually stunning but also absolutely delicious. I treated myself to a visit to the nail bar on the first day, where the staff were warm and friendly. We also enjoyed the spa, hammam, and pool facilities, all of which were very clean and inviting. One of the highlights was the jazz show, featuring excellent performers. We also spent some relaxing time at the beach. Since we’re not strong swimmers, we preferred lying on the rocks to enjoy the waves. Overall, I highly recommend this hotel and will definitely return on my next trip to Antalya. Well done, Akra keep up the great work!"

"Fantastic hotel, not in a prime location but if you are looking for an idyllic spot near the beach, dotted with restaurants and well equipped then you cant go wrong. Theres a taxi stop barely 250m away so if you need a ride just walk to the location and voila you can get wherever you need to. Theres a distinct smell of wet wood coming from the sewage which some may find horrible. Spa facilities are truly fantastic and the hotel all in all is economical, well managed and discreet. The cleaning staff would dilligently do their work when I was gone that not once did I have the chance to get acquainted. The tvs are not any good and have a propensity to release bombastic extraneous sounds. Balconies are spacious and so are the rooms. You will not be cramped for space. Three door cavernous wardrobes are installed so your stuff will never be just lying around unless you want it to be. All front facing staff speak adequate English, not sure what reviewers were complaining about. Yes staff at the spa don't for the most part but you can make do with linguistic barriers as Turkish terms are pretty much the same. Food at the ala carte restaurant is all right but contrary to claims made all personnel speak English."

"Check in was smooth and painless even though we were earlier than expected. Murat understood our requirements straightaway and was accommodating. Breakfast choice was basic ,but service was good. The hotel was clean and when room service was required, all toiletries and water bottles replaced. In general our family suite was very clean. Thank you all for making our stay so enjoyable! "I want to begin by saying that the hotel staff were truly wonderful. Hasan, Omer, Serve, and another receptionist whose name I regretfully forgot, were all incredibly kind and helpful. Their efforts to assist guests should be commended—they truly went above and beyond. However, my overall experience was ruined by what I consider blatantly false advertising. This hotel is not anywhere near the beach, and it most certainly does not have its own beach, as shown in the photos and described on Expedia. The misleading listing gave me the impression I’d be staying at a beachfront property—this was the main reason I booked it. Had I known the true location, I never would have chosen this hotel. I feel misled and disappointed, and I strongly believe I am entitled to a refund due to the false information. Travelers, please be warned: do not trust the photos and descriptions. I hope Expedia takes responsibility and removes or corrects this listing so others aren’t similarly misled."

"The rooms are spacious and clean. The decor is definitely an acquired taste, but it grows on you. I did see signs of wear and tear where i assume cases and bags had scuffed the skirting boards and parts of the walls. If you get a recently refreshed room which I was told happens to a set of rooms each year then you will get that sleek white aesthetic. My room was facing waterpark  but I could also see the mountains in background and aswell as the beach. I had no issue with noise from the waterpark but I was out most of the day and it closes by 5. I chose this hotel because I wanted to be close to the beach and nightlife and it certainly fits the bill. It felt very safe as a solo traveller around the hotel and along the promenade which i walked almost every night. The lobby is beautiful and spacious and nice to just chill when its too hot, the pool area is gorgeous and there is access to the beach in seconds. I echo everything that has been said about helpful staff and cleanliness. But The red hallways and dining room were a bold choice not my taste but not an issue for me either. Amenties are of a good standard. I didn't use the gym but could see several machines and weights. It's super easy to order from pool, all umbrellas have QR codes and food and drink comes directly to you. I also tried moonlight restaurant I went solo and was fine but it is a romantic restaurant so couples will definitely enjoy. I called guest services constantly with questions and request"

"2 night half-board short break at Hotel Su travelling from Dalyan. The hotel is unique (very white and very red in the restaurant). The staff are lovely and attentive, the outdoor pool area is very relaxing with plenty of space. We found the restaurant food plentiful with a wide choice. Restaurant staff were very good. Valet parking and guest reception were very helpful. There are two minor points I would raise. Firstly there are low level mattresses for lounging and sleeping on everywhere, your bed, your balcony, around the pool, even in the reception area. If you have back issues or arthritis this may not be for you. I did struggle with them at times. We did find some sunbeds away from the pool in the garden area which were more to our comfort. Maybe it is an age thing and young people like the 'mattress on the floor' style. Second we did request in advance a high up quiet room. Whilst the 9th floor was perfect for us we did have a noisy balcony from the air con units from their conferencing centre (we did decline their offer to move rooms as it was only a 2 night stay). If I were staying longer we would definitely have moved rooms. Overall a pleasurable stay but we still much prefer Dalyan."
