"From the moment we stepped off the elevator onto the dirty, stained, musty smelling carpet on the way to the room, hopes of a enjoyable experience were eliminated. The room reserved through expedia was not the room described. The room was very small, too small for 2 adults, no area for luggage, and an A/C system that turns off everytime the patio door is opened. The curtain rod was tied to the open clothes rack because it was pulled off the wall, dust webs in the corner of the room from not being cleaned, dirty laundry left hanging on the drying rods on the patio, & the bathroom door frame broken and rotting at the floor, & a light bulb needed replacement showing the room was not properly cleaned and inspected. The information Expedia had listed was not accurate. When I notified & showed the front desk the discrepancies, they told me the policies were old and they have not been revised in years (false advertising). Policies listed when I booked that the hotel did not honor: 1) Luxury Room - small, not large enough for 2 people 2) Swimming pool hours until 10 pm - changed to 7 pm 3) Breakfast buffet from 7:30 am to 10 am - changed to 8 am to 10 am, most of the food was not fresh & poor selection 4) No direct beach access or free cabanas-Transfer fee required to go to the beach 5) Airport shuttle is a taxi The hotel is outdated, the kitchen staff is not friendly, the reception staff is pleasant, but overall this hotel ruined the trip. Horrible end to a vacation."

"The property was in the safe area. We loved the nearby beach. Also, a lot of restaurants around the hotel. The only thing I did not like was how close to the main road.It was kind of loud at night time. The rooms were clean, but the carpet in the hallway must be cleaned. It looks nasty. Overall good experience."
"Very friendly and helpful staff and management! 5 Stars"
"Not a good experience"
"Dejligt lille hotel med charme. Ulempen er der er meget lydt og badebassin trængte til nyt vand, da der var meget klor i det Morgenmad var ikke specielt god. Lækre værelser"
"Özellikle çalışanların davranışları ve destekleri üst düzeydi. Diğer unsurlar, anlatılan ve beklenilenlere eş değerdi."

"Çok ama çok memnun kaldık. Güleryüzlü personel, yenilenmiş ve tertemiz odalar, kahvaltı olması ve odanın her gün temizlenmesi bir apart otel olması dolayisiyla kendimizi evimizde hissettik. Teşekkürler Ella."
"Veldig god verdi for pengene. Kjempebra service, og et rolig strøk ved hotellet. Anbefaler virkelig. Litt lite frokost bare, men ellers var det perfekt"
"it's a new hotel in the middle of everything but still needs lots of improvement to get 5 star evaluation. staff trying their best. buffet very small and basic. dining area only 7 tables."

"Notre séjour dure 6 nuits , je suis très satisfaite parce qu'il y a tout ce qu'il me faut : la piscine , le petit déjeuner , le bon personnel, bonne emplacement, le confort, calme, la sortie touristique, ... Mes enfants sont ravis d'ici car elles se sentent comme chez nous. Elles ont dormi très bien. Bonne continuation"

"Väldigt fin ny hotell. Det bästa av allt va Kamal som jobbade i receptionen. Väldig fin bemötande och han va hjälpsam samt väldig trevlig. Han hjälpte till med allt. Rekommenderar stark. Tack ännu en gång för allt Kamal. :)"
"We stayed one night and wished to stay more. Loved the aesthetics and the staff. All welcoming and friendly also speak English. Enjoyed my stay very much and will definitely be back!"

"Bästa hotellet jag har varit på. Mycket fint och bra bemötande av personalen speciellt av Kemal abe. Han var så snäll, lugn och mycket hjälpsam. Kemal var väldigt ödmjuk och jordnära person. Om jag åker tillbaka till Antalya kommer jag absolut att besöka detta hotell igen. Det bjöds på en enkel och god frukost på morgonen. Det fanns alltid te och kaffe på receptionen för gästerna. Även kallt vatten fanns hela tiden. Jätte rent och lyxigt hotell som jag rekommenderar starkt. En fin pool finns också för en liten avkoppling. Bästa hotellet i Antalya ❤️❤️❤️ Varma kramar till bästa Kemal❤️❤️❤️"
"Perfekt trevligt personal som en familj😊"
"Genel olarak çok memnun kaldık. Konum olarak güzel. Temizlik de bir kez problem yaşadık onun haricinde hersey çok güzeldi."

"Perge otelde yer kalmadığı için sadece 50 m uzaklıktakiş bu otelde konakladık. Perge otelin restoranını ve beach'ini kullandık. Her şey mükemmeldi. Görevli tüm personele, özellikle Lanthe restaurant şefine teşekkürü bir borç bilirim."
"Enjoyed my stay. Great location with a room overlooking the park. Very committed and polite staff. New rooms. And best of all, the beach area!"
"So wie beschrieben, waren nicht im Hauptgebäude. Ruhig gelegen, personal sehr aufmerksam. Lob an den Kellner im Haupthaus aus Ulm. Wir waren sehr zufrieden und das Essen super lecker."
"Otel çok güzel ve keyifli her şey orada, plajda en ince ayrıntısına kadar düşünülmüş. Kahvaltı çok lezzetliydi. Herkes çok güler yüzlü. Kesinlikle değerlendirilmeli."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "-1’inci katta bir oda verildi. Odanın sözde bir balkonu var. Sabah uyandığımızda perdeyi açtığımda 2 ilaçlama firması personeli bizim balkonda olan yapay çimi kaldırıp rögar kapağını açtılar. Afederseniz dışkı dolu lağımın içine ve etrafına ilaçlama yaptılar. Balkona çıktığınızda da yapay yeşil çimler bu lağım kapağı ve etrafında ıslaktı. Bu ıslaklık klima sularından da birikiyor. Balkona çıkan direkt bir kapı yok zaten, pencereden bacak atarak balkona iniyorsunuz. Yatak nevresimlerinde saç telleri vardı. Banyoda yerde ölü hamam böceği vardı. Kahvaltıda kullanılan süt bim markası zaten kaliteyi ordan biçin. Kullanılan kahvaltılık ürünleri de hiç beğenmedik. Meyve suyu diye toz içecek konulmuş gerçekten komikti. Sadece personel hizmeti kötü değildi, ellerinden geleni yapıyorlar. Kalan her şey kötüydü."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Fint hotell for enkel opphold. Jeg var der med familien fra onsdag til mandag-fordi det ble opplevd som sentralt. Trikk går rett utenfor og old bazaar er på gåavstand. Men fortsatt 20-25 min til Strand med bil. Frokostbuffeten var helt ok, helt ok mat, kunne vært litt bedre. Føler bildene samsvarer ikke helt med det du kommer til basseng og uteområde. Det er ekstrakostnader som strykejern. Men ellers renslig hotell med hyggelig personale."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Ailemle rahat bir konaklama güzel bir gece geçirdim."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "J'ai passé 5 nuits dans cette hôtel et j'en suis ravie. Les personnels est vraiment au top, l'hébergement est proche de tout et facilement accessible même en transport. J'ai apprécié mon séjour seul petit bémol le petit déjeuner qui je trouve manque de variété, beaucoup de nourriture salé et je préfère le sucré mais dans l'ensemble mon séjour dans cet hôtel était vraiment très bien"

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "NICE HOTEL - DON'T HAVE BREAKFAST HERE! Team at the front desk and hotel staff were very helpful. One thing that left a lasting yet unfortunately bad memory for us was the breakfast! We stayed here two nights and after the experience of the first breakfast we skipping the 2nd day as there's no air con in the serving area and everything had melted! The butter was oil and not spreadable and the watermelon was very hot. This is not a complaint about the staff but more about the experience. The hotel needs to either put cold goods on a bed of ice trays or install Air Con in the serving area! Plus what's with the salty cheeses? We've been to numerous hotels on our tour but they usually offer different types of cheeses including spreadable ones that come in triangles. I had just bread and jam and left. Not the experience you pay for when getting a hotel. Other than that the hotel and staff were nice."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Het is goed ontbijtbuffet rijkelijk Allen budcet accementatie wc en bad gezamenlijk gebruik dat is minder verder is goed bevalen"

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Location of the hotel was good, however my stay was substandard. I informed the staff on check-in that my flight is early morning and will retire early but was given a room (2nd floor) facing the pool. This is the worst possible room since its the closest to a popular pool -- it was very noisy. No soundproofing of rooms. I did get breakfast for the day before check-out since I wouldn't have been able to enjoy it for the morning of check-out due to early flight. This was good and above expectation which I appreciated."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Booked an economy room which was way too small but couzy and a great value for money in old town area for a solo traveller who has no issues in a shared bathroom. Attractions were nearby and easily accessible via public transport which was just a few steps away. Location is very quiet and safe. Hotel is comfortable in all aspects and very clean. Breakfast was the highlight. Loved every bit of it."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Staff were very kind, great price overall and good amenities."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Good"

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Personal war freundlich und nett. Leider die Fenster im Zimmern sind nicht dicht und hört man, was draußen alles abläuft. Wer keine Probleme mit Lärm hat, kann bestimmt gut schlafen. Past mehr für junge Leute, die viel auf Party stehen."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "The hotel manager was always upset and speaking so harshly the rooms are dark and spooky. When you arrive here they will help with luggage and be so kind however upon leaving they do not assist you at all. The washroom was very dark, the breakfast wasn’t the best."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "The facilities were limited and the breakfast selection was not very nice."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Herkese tavsiye edebilecegim bir hotel, hotel yeni oldugu icin eksikleri var, ama bunu bir kusur olarak gormedim.. gercekten personale ilgilenme superdi.."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Otel çok temiz ve konforluydu. Konumu da iyiydi. Genel olarak memnun kaldık tavsiye ediyorum."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Çok güzeldi herşey tertemiz gayet uygun fiyatlı ve harika bir oteldi"

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Nice hotel, nice reception specially Cihan he was very professional and very helping . A big thanks to him"

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Das Hotel ist wirklich sehr sauber und modern eingerichtet. Wie auf den Bildern. Personal freundlich. Hat uns sehr gut gefallen."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Empfehlenswert"

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "The people in the hotel were welcoming and they really help me in what ever request I was asking them. The maid for my room was amazing and welcoming and speaking very good English which is not very common in turkey overhaul I will say a 10/10 and highly recommended to anyone and the price is very affordable I paid €90 for 4 nights for an economy room with a decent breakfast can’t go wrong. I will definitely go back again."

hotel_name: Wolf Of The City Hotel & Spa
review_text: "Her bir personel çok iyi ve yardımseverdi. Aralarındaki uyum güzeldi. Odalar çok konforlu ve size rahat bir dinlenme alanı sunuyor. Check- in saatinden önce gelmeme rağmen hiçbir sorun yaşamadım. Keyifli bir süreç geçirdim. Konumundan bahsetmeme gerek bile yok. Mutlaka değerlendirmelisiniz."

"Bu kadar merkezi bir bölgede bu kadar sessiz ve konforlu bir otel olmasına şaşırdım.Konumu çok iyi.Temizlik çok iyi.Çalışanlar çok ilgili ve güleryüzlü.Kahvaltı yeterli.Kesinlikle tekrar tercih edicem.Teşekkür ediyorum."

"Ich war nur eine Nacht dort und habe mich sehr wohlgefühlt. Das Zimmer war sauber und bequem, das Hotel liegt in einer ruhigen Gegend und alles ist fußläufig erreichbar. Besonders gut gefallen haben mir das Frühstück und die freundliche Atmosphäre. Es gibt sogar einen kleinen Pool. Ein Ausblick hätte schön gewesen, aber das ist nicht weiter schlimm. Insgesamt sehr empfehlenswert. Ich würde jederzeit wiederkommen."

"Personelleri empati kurmak konusunda işletme sahibi kadar bilgisinin olması müşteri memnuniyeti konusunda vasat düzeyde fotoğrafları güncel değil iskele başka otele ait ve paralı çalışanların işi sahipleneceği memnuniyeti maddi manevi işletme sahibi tarafından sağlanmadığı için, çözüm odaklı olması adına benim bilgi deneyimimle orta yolu bulmak için fazlaca dil döktüm değer mi derseniz bu otel için değmez ki bunu aklı başında herkes farkeder. Üzgünüm açıkçası ekmek kazanmak icin bu kadar ticari düşünmemek gerektiğini isterdim"
"Værelserne var beskidte, blev ikke ordentlig rengjort . Håndklæder og sengesæt blev ikke udskiftet under opholdet . Meget ringe morgenmad. Eneste positive var deres pool som var god til børn."
"Hotel was clean but breakfast choice was quite limited"

"Service people were nice, particularly the lady named Aybuke and a young man whom we met at reception and they did their best to help us. But every corner of the hotel was the dirtiest I'd ever seen in my life - floor, bathroom, shelves. Looks like food bowls, containers and cups were washed by hand every day - there were spots on everything at breakfast buffet. When we arrived, the trash bins on our floor were literally stinking and were removed only the following day. We stayed here for 3 days and there was a bad smell of trash on our floor every day. This hotel needs to be properly cleaned."
"Great location, close to local buses and trams. Staff professional and pleasent. Room neat and tidy, daily maintained . Nice pool and quite neighborhood."
"Çok teşekkür ederiz. Hizmetleriniz çok mükemmel. Resepsiyon, restoran, ve temizlik elemanı hizmetleri profesyonel."
"Ren fin bra service stort sortiment frukost"
"Çalışanlar cana yakın ,güler yüzlü,fiyatına göre iyi bir hotel"

"Het was een heel fijn hotel. Er werd elke dag schoongemaakt. Het eten was zeer gevarieerd en heerlijk. Chef Mithat was erg attent. Het was op loopafstand van veel bezienswaardigheden. Ik kan dit hotel iedereen aanbevelen."
"Kötü bir yer"
"Clean property but high food prices in the hotel"

"I would suggest labelling the buffet foods with dish names and ingredients. There was no labelling on anything. So, I couldn't try most food as I didn't know what was what. Another funny one is there is no mirror in the rooms. One small mirror in the bathroom is not always enough. staff are great though. They help when help is requested. Rest of the times they can be seen chilling. All the men at the reception were great. The only one lady in the reception made me feel like I was wasting her time! This should not happen when in customer service role. The lady was NOT good"
"Breakfast and dinner both was terrible , my both kid got sick from the food"
"Old furniture smal air condition no ac in one room"
"The room was very clean. Food was good in dinning area. Pool a little to small."
"Leuke hotel dichtbij strand en stad"
"Wir fanden das Buffet mittelmäßig. Fü Familien gut geeignet. Personal sehr nett. Zum Strand ca 20 min Fußweg. 3x am Tag fährt ein Transfer hin und zurück."
"Nice place clean fresh comfy"
"Sehr angenehmes kleines „Familienhotel“. Es ist ruhig, sehr angenehm. Essen ist reichhaltig und abwechslungsreich und gut. Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Gerne wieder."
"Nettes freundliches Personal und nah am Strand."
"This was a nice place to stay for a few days transit. Tram and buses easily accessable."
"Dejligt rent og gode faciliteter"

"Hotel top! Lage Top! wir hatten kein frühstück nur zum übernachten und fürs Pool gebucht! Die Lage war besser als erwartet. Mitten in der Stadt. Bazar zu fuss erreichbar, Strand zu fuss erreichbar, die Clubs, Pubs und Bars und Kaleici welche bekannt ist für das Nachtleben auch zu fuss erreichbar. haben Kein taxi benötigt. taxi in antalya soll auch wohl sehr teuer sein, nicht vergleichbar mit istanbul."
"I would recommend this property to everyone. Just take it if you like to have a pleasant vacation. Thank you for this days Suit Laguna Hotel."

"Hotel is in a good location, 20 mins walk to the old town or jump a taxi right outside reception, plenty of small supermarkets, pharmacys and other shops close by for essentials. Its clean and looked after and being on my own, the area is safe at night, even at 3 in the morning!! They offer a free transfer to local beaches, didn't use it but its there if you want it. Room was good enough for the price, cleaned each day with fresh towels, coffee, tea, sugar and bottled water, buy some milk locally, aircon was good enough. The wifi was good, staff friendly, the pool although small was clean with comfy sun loungers. Breakfast was a little lacking, dont expect a full English, saying that you wont find one in resort either so its par for the course. Had a look at the evening meal and same goes so full board isnt worth it, there are loads of restaurants in the old town, didnt find them at first but when i did i had a ball, Dubh lin bar sells Guiness!! Roberts coffee is worth a visit for dinner, go to the end of the street towards the sea, cross the road and through the security barriers slightly to the right, modern and the foods good. Only downside is theres a Mineret very, very close to the hotel so 4.30am its full blast call to prayer, i was in direct line on the 6th floor overlooking the pool, you have been warned!! Happy travels"
"Location is very convenient"
"Den dårligst hotel nogensinde har vi oplevet. Dårligt morgenmad meget støj og uvenligt personale."
"Very good location. Close to everything you want"
"The property was exceptionally clean and comfortable. The walkability to old town was unmatched! The perfect stop in Antalya."
"Great location and lovely staff. The kids had a nice time there, very close to the park."
"조용한위치 도보로 올드타운 접근성이 좋다 친절한 서비스도 최고"
"주차 가능 (주차가 필요하면 미리 호텔에 연락바람) 깔끔하고 에어컨 빵빵 수압 굿 위치 굿 카라알리올루 바로 옆에 있음 방도 캐리어 2개 필 공간 있고 좋음 직원도 너무 친절하고 조식은 한상차림"

"This is the second time I have stayed at Prime Hotel and you truly can’t beat the value. It’s in a beautiful location close to waterfall with an outstanding view. There are so many nice restaurants and shops easily within walking distance and the train station is nearby. There is even small market right across the street. The hotel staff are all so nice and helpful, an absolute pleasure. The pool is clean and perfect for the summer heat. I will definitely be back to stay on my next trip to Antalya."

"Nous avons passé une nuit là bas est c’était tout simplement fantastique. La propreté des lieux, l’amabilité du personnelle, le petit déjeuner (buffet), la piscine tout étaient incroyable. J’y reviendrais les yeux fermés. Un grand merci :)"
"Magnifique comme hôtel"

"Otelin yeri son derece iyi hemen önünden tramvaya binilerek şehir merkezine 5 dakikada ulaşılıyor odaları çok büyük çok rahat manzarası çok güzel kahvaltısı son derece yeterli hepsini öğrenmesi çalışanlar son derece güler yüzlü ve yardımcı biz içeri girer girmez çekimimizi yaptıktan sonra çay kahve ikram etmek istediler kabul ettik keyifli güler yüzlü bir servis aldık Akşam odamıza çıkarken soğuk su ikram ettiler sularıımızı yanımıza aldık keyifli bir akşam geçirdik çok teşekkür ederiz"
"Great Hotel with view. Enjoyed our time here on vacations. Breakfast was lovely"
"Antalya için oldukça merkezi ve her yere ulaşımı kolay bir yerde.Otelin temizliği mükemmel.Ayrıca kahvaltıyı da çok beğendim .Tüm çalışanlara teşekkürler"
"편안하게 묶다 왔습니다."

"Albergo vecchio, poco curato in zona limitrofa al centro raggiungibile a piedi, ma abbastanza lontano. In camera la pulizia è scarsa, le lenzuola sporche che mi sono fatta cambiare subito, e il bagno è vecchio. La parziale vista mare è un piccolissimo spicchio e per il resto si vede il parcheggio! Anche la colazione non è un granché. Prezzo ingiustificato."
"Hôtel vraiment parfait rien n’a redire !"
"Personnel accueillant et répondant à plusieurs de nos besoins, petit déjeuner complet pour le prix et cadre agréable"

"Had a great stay at Prime Boutique hotel. The staff are very friendly particularly the gentleman who was there to great us when we arrived early hours of the morning…nothing was too much trouble and always helpful wil a smile. Rooms were spacious and very clean. Maids cleaned the room every day and was spotless 😊 we also had a sea view room which I highly recommend as the views over the sea and mountains was incredible. The hotel was conveniently located to access all the busy areas, such as the old town and beaches. The old town is easily walkable however we hired a moped so it was easy to get around to other beaches in Antalya. The hotel is in a quiet area which is nice to retreat from the busy town and has a beautiful park looking over the sea which is very busy at night. In addition there is a 24 hour 7 days a week cafe opposite which is hugely convenient and does lovely food. The pool area is perfect and quiet, plenty of sun beds. The breakfast is great and plenty of selection depending on what you want, from pastries to hot food. Also amazing view from the rooftop restaurant each morning. Thank you Prime and all the staff who made the stay so lovely, we will definitely return next time we are in Antalya 🤗"

"Although the sauna, steam room and spa are advertised they are out of use. The staff were excellent, but cleaning standards could have been better. Location is 10/10 and a taxi stand right outside, so convenient. Would stay there again but need to know it’s not as advertised."
"Otel temizdi , kahvaltı çeşidi ve kalitesi gayet yeterliydi. Kendine ait otopark olması ve lokasyonu bize çok uygundu. Kesinlikle her gelmemde kalabileceğim bir otel teşekkür ederim otel yönetimine"

"Great experience overall! The location is close to beach entrance with amazing views. Service was good and breakfast on terrace had an amazing variety of food. The room was clean and very spacious with an amazing sea view, it did not disappoint. The housekeeping lady was very sweet and did an amazing job. Thank you prime hotel!"

"The AC was not working in on entire floor upon arival. The fan was working but not the cooling. Control panel was inoperative. Asked to be moved to another room. Wood flooring bubling up in bath, entry. Base of shower black/moldy. Wonderful view of ocean from balcony. Nice pool. Friendly staff who tried to help next day. Stat turned out to be nice."
"Rooms are not clean. Very basic hotel. Breakfast was not good, only few things. This is more like a 2/3* hotel."

"My family and I enjoyed our four night stay at the Prime Hotel.The welcome at reception was professional and very friendly. The breakfast was good and there was good alternatives to the normal English breakfast, coffee was nice and Turkish tea was good. The view from the breakfast dining area is stunning and the staff are very friendly and accommodating. The rooms are large and have a beautiful bathroom with shower that has excellent water pressure with beautiful sea views and the beds are super comfortable. The rooms are cleaned daily by friendly staff. My teenage children enjoyed the gym and used it most days which was open 24 hours. The pool area is private and very nice the pool is kept clean and clean towels was always available. The staff at reception always helped with recommendations for beaches , directions , transfers shuttles and tourist activities. There is a beautiful beach deck across the road from the hotel which is well worth it, and we were lucky to get some passes one day from reception. The tram runs very 30 min pass the hotel and the stop is about 200 meters from the hotel, I was able to use my credit card for 5 passages and it cost about 20 TL per person. We used the tram to get to the others beaches and the Old city centre which has a wide variety of restaurants.The area is not that great, however it’s very well situated if you would like to get around with public transport and overall for me and my family we really enjoyed our stay at the Prime."

"Slidt og dårligt vedligeholdt. Poolen blev ikke rengjort i de 14 dage vi boede der. Der lå skrald og visne blade i bedene. Morgenmaden var frygtelig og frugten rådden, så vi spiste ude hver dag. A la carte restauranten var ikke åben overhovedet! Der blev kun fejet og vasket gulv på midten af værelset, ikke fyldt op af toiletpapir eller kaffe. Sæbe kommer i genfyldte beholdere, så vi købte vores egen. De øvrige gæster var helt uden manerer, råben, skrigen og boldspil i poolområdet og gjorde at man ikke havde lyst til at opholde sig på hotellets område. Det eneste gode ved dette hotel var at personalet var søde og hjælpsomme."
"Équipement trop vieux"
"Room as clean, nice , staff was very friendly and helpful. Sebastian, kult and Raz were very kind and helped me a lot. Hotel located away from the hustle and bustle, short walk down to shops"
"Nice family owned hotel. Not five star but clean and comfortable"
"Mindre bra"
"Very nice hotel"
"Good location to old town."

"Gayet güzel bir geceydi resepsiyondaki arkadaş çok yardımcı oldu gayet ilgiliydi oda temiz ve konforluydu sabah kahvaltı çeşidi fazla ve lezzeyliydi bence gayet güzel bir oteldi tavsiye edetim tekrardan gelicem"

"Hotel was booked last minute after initial hotel was unable to honor booking. Hotel staff were very friendly and helpful after a long travel day. Hotel was slightly outdated with marks the wall, door to fridge loose, bathroom with rust on undersink cabinet. Breakfast selection each morning was good and the view from the terrace was really nice. Staff always willing to help and really helpful throughout."
"Hôtel satisfaisant au vu du prix."
"War ok"
"Das Personal war uns immer eine Unterstützung. Sehr nett und hilfsbereit."

"Perfetto per soggiornare una sola notte ad Antalya. Subito fuori dal centro storico che si raggiunge comodamente a piedi così come l’antico porto romano.Il museo Archeologico si raggiunge sia a piedi che in soli 5 minuti di taxi (traffico permettendo). Personale gentilissimo e disponibile, camera spaziosa e dotata di tutti i comfort."
"Gut"

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "Room: bed was comfortable and good size. However, given that we were staying for a week there was very little storage for our clothes - space for a few items to be hung up, but no shelves or drawers which resulted in my husbands clothes being placed on backs of chairs, while mine remained in the suitcase. We were also told on check in that our room had a partial seaview - there was no seaview visible to us. Gym - very good, plenty of equipment and available 24 hours. Decent size as well- bigger than our en suite room. One strange point about the gym was a note forbidding the filling of water bottles! Pool - good size pool and nice setting, plenty of loungers. However, as a non smoker it could be quite uncomfortable. There was no designated (no) smoking areas (which could be very easily implemented) therefore no matter where we positioned ourselves, inevitably smokers would sit on either side and proceed to chain smoke. Private "Beach" - definitely private and plenty of loungers both in and out of the shade. However, there was a distinct lack of sand/shingle for it to be considered a beach. The sea is accessed via 30 steep steps, the sea was beautiful but youre not going for a walk along the beach here. Hotel bar- relatively very expensive, a (standard) bottle of Corona was £8; cheapest bottle of (local) wine was £40, (while you could a bottle for £20 in a restaurant up the road). Turkish beer was half the price in a (very nice) burger place across the road. Wont bother re"

review_text: "Personelin güler yüzlülüğü ,, odaların temizliği kahvaltı vs herşey çok güzeldi …"

review_text: "Her anlamda çok memnun kaldık. Çalışanların hepsi güler yüzlü ve ilgili fakat hijyen konusunu gerçekten arşa çıkarmışlar. Herkesin emeğine sağlık."

review_text: "Resepsiyon personeli kaba davrandı ve misafirlere yardımcı olmadı. Odam hazır değildi (uçuşum erken indiği için bunun farkındayım) fakat bana sadece valizimi bırakma izni verdiler ve 4 saat boyunca koltukta oturmamı söylediler; havuz veya plajı kullanmama izin vermediler. Ayrıca bar personeli çok yetersizdi, basit bir içecek (vodka Red Bull) bile hazırlayamadılar. Ancak Deniz ve Bushra her sorumda bana yardımcı oldular, çok güler yüzlü ve profesyoneldiler. review_text: "Super hôtel adult only . Propreté / calme et détente . L’accès à la crique est exceptionnel. Petit bémol pour les chambres sans balcon et un peu petites .. et pas assez de transats. Je vous le recommande quand même ! Super séjour pour nous dans un bon quartier !"

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "L'hotel gode di spiaggia privata che abbiamo particolarmente apprezzato. La stanza che abbiamo prenotato era un po piccola ma gradevole. Non siamo invece soddisfatti del ristorante e della colazione per mancanza di qualità del cibo. Abbiamo da ridire sulla pulizia delle parti esterne, visto che puliscono tutto con la canna dell'acqua, abbiamo avuto un incidente perché ci hanno lavato le scarpe mentre stavamo cenando. É comodo il servizio di parcheggio con parcheggiatore (si lasciano le chiavi dell'auto)"

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "Very nice hotel. Staff are all friendly. Amazing views. The access to the sea is great. Breakfast Buffett was amazing. The only complaint and it’s not a big one. The food outside of breakfast can be better with better options."

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "I recently stayed at the Delta Marriott in Antalya. The breakfast was exceptional, offering a wide variety of options to suit every taste. The beach area was beautiful and well-maintained, with a lifeguard always nearby. My room was comfortable, and the bed was excellent; however, I did notice dust in certain areas, which affected the overall impression of cleanliness. The spa was a highlight, with a wonderful Turkish hammam and outstanding massages from Mina and Sindy – both highly skilled and professional. Unfortunately, the atmosphere was disrupted by a group of male guests in the room next to ours. They were drunk, loud, and brought in unauthorized women. Several men were with one woman, and we could hear distressing screams late at night. When I called the reception, security removed the woman but took no action against the group’s behavior. Staff admitted they had been disturbing other guests all week, yet justified inaction because “they are guests.” As a woman, I expressed that I felt unsafe, but the only response was that the men would be leaving soon. We were not offered a room change, which was disappointing for this property. I have stayed at many high-standard, elegant hotels, but this experience made me question the hotel’s commitment to guest safety. If you are looking for a refined and secure environment, this is not the place – unless you are seeking a more chaotic, “trash” atmosphere."

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "Nice Adult only hotel."

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "Absolutely loved my stay at Delta Marriott, so much so that I extended for one more week! The property is beautiful, every corner of the hotel was breathtakingly picturesque. Everyone was so helpful and friendly! Such a pleasant stay"

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "Sehr freundliches Personal an allen Stellen, ein gepflegtes Hotel, sauber und zuvorkommend und ebenso die Gäste. Die Ruhe - bedingt durch die Tatsache, dass es ein Erwachsenenhotel ist - ist wunderbar! Ich habe mich wohl gefühlt und komme sicher bei Gelegenheit wieder. Der Zugang zum Meer war wunderbar und es wurde auf Sicherheit geachtet. Ich habe es geliebt direkt am/über dem Meer Zeit verbringen zu können. Auch die Möglichkeit direkt Getränke und Essen zur Liege zu bestellen, war wunderbar. Hätte ich hier einen Tipp, würde ich komfortablere Liegen mit Auflagen empfehlen, die aktuell vorhandenen sind okay, jedoch kein gehobenes Niveau. Was etwas ungewöhnlich ist, ist das gar keine Getränke ins Hotel mitgebracht werden dürfen. Ich verstehe die Vorgabe bei alkoholischen Getränken und Softdrinks, jedoch nicht bei Wasser. Wasser ist ein menschliches Grundbedürfnis und sollte daher immer in ausreichender Menge mit sich geführt werden dürfen. Hier sollte die Einschränkung überdacht werden."

review_text: "Nous avons passé un superbe séjour dans cet hôtel L’hôtel est propre et le personnel est vraiment très gentil. Cet hôtel est très bien situé La salle de sport est superbe avec du matériel nouvelle Generation. Le spa est aussi très bien et tarif abordable Le restaurant japonais. Quant à lui est vraiment délicieux et je le recommande. Vivement Cet hôtel a aussi un coucher de soleil magnifique."

hotel_name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Antalya Lara - Yetişkinlere Özel (+18)
review_text: "We recently enjoyed a two-night stay, and it was the perfect choice. The hotel, newly renovated, is situated in a prime location in Old Lara. Though the staff is currently undergoing training, they were always diligent and accommodating, greeting us with smiles and attentiveness. The hotel offers excellent amenities, including a spa area, fitness center, gaming/TV room, and a private beach accessible by elevator. The view from the hotel's rocky perch is stunning, especially at night when the moonlight reflects off the Mediterranean Sea. There are two pools to choose from: an outdoor pool and an indoor pool located near the spa. Nearby attractions include Düden Waterfall, TerraCity shopping mall, and numerous local eateries. For those who enjoy nightlife, there are also nightclubs close by. The only unexpected aspect was the recent increase in Turkish pricing, with everything being about three times more expensive this time. Thanks Delta Hotel by Marriot."

En revanche, j’ai été assez déçu par le confort de la literie. Les lits sont loin d’être adaptés si vous avez des problèmes de dos : j’ai eu du mal à dormir correctement durant mon séjour. Je m’interroge un peu sur la classification de l’établissement, car certains aspects ne semblent pas correspondre au niveau attendu pour un hôtel de ce standing. Le petit déjeuner était correct, mais sans plus. Je n’en attendais pas grand-chose, et cela s’est confirmé : pas de vraie surprise ni de grande variété. En résumé, l’emplacement est excellent, mais il y a des améliorations à faire sur le confort et la qualité des services proposés."

The only thing that was not working out well was the WiFi, so if you have to work or depend on the WiFi in your room, you will be disappointed. We were on the 7th floor and always had WiFi problems and I actually had to work while I was there. I had to go down the restaurant, which is very nice and has great WiFi signal, but if you have to take a meeting, it will be noisy with music and guests. Other than that, I can’t say enough about how great it was to stay there and so close to all the restaurants and the Beach Park in Konyaalti. The housekeepers were very nice too and even if we sometimes did not put the towels to be changed, they changed them anyways. We tried to be respectful of the washing every day since it is daily housekeeping service. Breakfast, however, was subpar, but at least it was included in the price."

"A Wonderful All-Inclusive Getaway! I recently returned from an amazing stay at this all-inclusive hotel, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with the experience. From the moment we arrived, the service was exceptional—every staff member we encountered was friendly, professional, and eager to help. One of the standout highlights of the trip was the food. The quality and variety exceeded all expectations. Whether it was the breakfast buffet, à la carte dinners, or the themed nights, every meal was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. There was something for every taste, and I truly looked forward to every dining experience. The nightly entertainment was another pleasant surprise. It was lively, well-organized, and offered something new each evening—great performances that added fun and energy to our nights without being over-the-top. The hotel itself was spotless, and cleanliness was clearly a priority throughout the property. Everything from the lobby to the pool areas and rooms was well maintained and inviting. Overall, this was a fantastic vacation experience. The combination of great service, delicious food, fun entertainment, and a clean, relaxing environment made it truly memorable. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a stress-free, all-inclusive escape!"

"We spent a few days in Istanbul – it was super fun and cozy. The hotel there was amazing, and so was the staff. Afterwards, we decided to spend a few more days in Antalya. While searching for a hotel, we came across Elips Royal Hotel in Antalya via UK.Hotel.com. Since we had to drive over 10 hours from Istanbul to Antalya, we specifically looked for a hotel that allowed late check-in at the end of the day. According to UK.Hotel.com, it was possible to check in at Elips Royal Hotel between 00:00 and 01:00. We left Istanbul at 11:00 in the morning and arrived just after midnight. At the reception, however, the receptionist immediately told us it was impossible to check in at that time. He said the hotel's policy was to check in and out between 12:00 and 13:00 during the day. He said we could check in for that night only if we paid extra, and after 12:00 we would get the room we had already paid for. The receptionist was extremely aggressive and shouted at us. We tried contacting UK.Hotel.com at that moment, but were only met with a chatbot repeating the same message: "We’re sorry to hear you’re unable to check in." That night, we ended up sleeping on the couch in the hotel lobby. The receptionist also mentioned something about "Maxi Rooms", saying that the hotel’s rooms are offered on different websites through that company, and that the mistake came from Maxi Rooms. When we asked for a phone number to contact them, he refused to provide it. We were unable to find any info"

Ayna ile yatak arasında yürüyecek kadar alan bile yoktu. Odada tv yoktu. Tek iyi şey klimasıydı. Yarım manzaralı diye tutmuştum ama yan cephe olmasına rağmen manzara sadece duvarlardı. Lo peor empezó al otro día cuando fuimos al desayuno que pagamos aparte… 3 fetas de fiambre, una ensalada de papas, algunos huevos (viejos), y jugos en botellas apretadas de plastico que se toma en viejos vasos de ..plástico… más algunas manzanas. Perdimos los 4 desayunos más porque era lo mismo. Cuando quisimos consultar por la heladera nos encontramos con una pareja durmiendo en el sillón. Cada vez que bajamos esa mañana. Y así todos los días el sillón del lobby lleno de gente (la familia de administradores) que estaban comiendo fumando y durmiendo… tampoco hicieron el servicio de limpieza ningún día, ni nos cambiaron las toallas, papel, sábanas. Insgesamt sehr sehr dreckig. Dazu kommt noch, dass es unter dem Hotel ein Pub gibt. In der ersten von insgesamt zwei Nächten lief hier bis 01:00 extrem laute Musik. Schlafen unmöglich. Zimmer wurde, auch nicht anders als erwartet, nicht gesäubert. Anscheinend ist der Room Service gekommen, da wir neue Wasserflaschen bekommen haben, nichts anderes wurde aber nicht mal angefasst. Das ist vielleicht die sinnloseste Ecke im ganzen schönen Antalya/Konyaalti."
"Nice room and big bed - 4 ring stove and cutlery and plates available- only fault was the very squeaky bed- staff were pleasant and helpful"
"ortalama bir deneyim"

"I had booked a 3 person room for 2 adults for one night. When my boyfriend and I arrived to the reception the lady at the front desk immediately switched to Turkish (I do not speak it, but my boyfriend does). She claimed I had only paid for one person, instead of how it actually goes (you pay for nights, not per person). My boyfriend pointed this out, I showed every single receipt I had of the transaction and the reservation and she kept insisting that the price was paid for one person and I needed to pay more. She also wanted to see a receipt in English, which I did not have, since I used the website in my native language. Finally she gave up, still murmuring about updating the price.They gave us (in my opinion) the worst room they had, with no windows and it was right next to the entrance to the entire hotel, on the ground floor. Granted, maybe it was my misunderstanding by the pictures provided, that the room would at least have some windows..."
"Odalar temizdi.klimalar iyi sogutuyordu odayi.Apart otel oldugu icin beklentilerimiz yuksek degildi. Temizlik iyi derece oldughndan Beklentimiz karsilandi"

"My husband and I recently had the pleasure of staying at Hayal Residence Apart Otel for a delightful 10-day vacation. Our accommodation consisted of a cozy one-bedroom flat with a living room, kitchenette, bathroom, and a charming small patio. Despite being on the lower ground floor, the flat was wonderfully bright and immaculate. The amenities provided were excellent and made our stay extremely convenient. We appreciated having a washing machine, kettle, large fridge with a freezer, and an oven at our disposal. Both of the room had an AC, as well the hotel had a wifi connection but we didn’t use it, as we user our mobile connection for the internet. The small patio was an added bonus where we could comfortably dry our clothes. The surrounding area was a true gem—quiet and serene, yet bustling with activity due to the proximity of numerous shops, restaurants, and a shopping center. It was perfect for both relaxation and exploring local attractions. Moreover, the staff at Hayal Residence Apart Otel were exceptional. They were always nice, helpful, and polite, ensuring our stay was as comfortable as possible. Considering the quality of the accommodation and the superb service, the value for money was excellent. Thank you, Hayal Residence Apart Otel, for an unforgettable stay. We look forward to our next visit!"
"Loved out stay and it was suprt convenient and quiet. The staff was super friendly. Highly recommend it."
"Ein gutes , ruhiges , Strand nah Apart hotel"
"Huzurlu temiz"

Für eine 5 Sterne Bewertung habe ich folgende Sachen vermisst: -eine weitere Karte, damit im Raum die Klimaanlage und der Strom auch ohne unsere Anwesenheit laufen kann, -normales Wasser beim Frühstück (ohne Zitrone, Minze oder Orangenscheiben), -Netflix oder Youtube."

"I stayed with young family for a week. Really clean with a nice breakfast which included some local dishes we enjoyed Staff are very friendly and helpful. "- Zimmer sind leider sehr hellhörig - Zimmer haben leider nicht die Sauberkeit die mann von anderen Hotels so kennt. - Badezimmer nicht sauber genug. "Wir sind Ende Juni dieses Jahr zwei Tage in dem Hotel geblieben und hatten zwei Zimmer gebucht. Die Mitarbeiter waren freundlich, die Räume waren sauber und die Ausstattungen waren auch sehr gut. Wir hatten einen Safe, einen kleinen Kühlschrank sowie einen Balkon. Einziges Manko war, dass in einem der Zimmer die Lüftungsanlage sowie die Klimaanlage recht laut gewesen sind. In dem anderen Zimmer gab es dieses Problem nicht. Zudem gibt es keinen Aufzug. Auch ein spätes Check in ist möglich. Da wir sehr spät erst in Antalya angekommen sind, haben wir um 2/3 Uhr Nachts eingecheckt. Zimmerreinigung gab es in diesen zwei Tagen nicht, was kein Problem für uns war. Allerdings weiß ich nicht, wie es bei längeren Aufenthalten geregelt wird. Erfreulich war, dass das Hotel und insbesondere die Zimmer, Handtücher, Laken etc. alle wirklich sehr sauber waren. Parken vor der Tür war nie ein Problem. Frühstück war auch ok für mich, wenn auch die Auswahl überschaubar war. Mit dem Auto war die Lage sehr gut. Wir waren in wenigen Minuten beim Konyaalti Beach. Fußläufig sind Turkcell und kleinere Supermärkte verfügbar. Mit dem Auto ist man in wenigen Minuten bei Migros. Alles in allem war ich zufrieden mit unserem Aufenthalt in dem Hotel und kann es weiterempfehlen."

"Tolles kleines sauberes Hotel mit sehr netten Mitarbeitern .Frühstücksbuffet völlig ausreichend immer wieder mit etwas Abwechslung im Angebot. Wir kommen gerne wieder uns hat es dort sehr gut gefallen."
"7inn küçük ama bir o kadar sıcak ve sempatik bir konaklama yerİ."

"gitmeden önce çok ön araştırma yapamamıştık ama zaten yeni olan bir otelmiş. çalışanlar çok güler yüzlü ve samimiydi. tüm ihtiyaçlarımızı isteklerimizi hızlıca karşıladılar. odalar temiz, bahçesi keyifli, mutfağı lezzetliydi. her şey gayet yeterliydi. konum olarak merkezi olması sebebiyle rahat hareket ettik."

"güzel bir deneyim oldu kahvaltısı inanılmaz güzeldi memnun kaldık."

"Je suis profondément surprise par le décalage entre les photos promotionnelles ve la réalité. L’accueil manquait de chaleur, ve la propreté laissait franchement à désirer. Nous étions trois dans une chambre minuscule, un gros doute sur la taille de la chambre, une chaleur étouffante qui a rendu le séjour pénible. La climatisation il faut l'activer un temps avant l'arrivée du client. 🔹 À notre arrivée, avec 1h de retard ve la chambre n’était pas préparée, un manque de professionnalizm flagrant. Deux petites bouteilles d’eau pour trois personnes ? Deux serviettes pour deux ? Cela démontre un souci évident d’organisation. On etait trois !!! 🍽️ Le petit déjeuner, censé être inclus, était un autre point noir : les bouteilles de jus ve de lait étaient vides, le buffet semblait composé de restes, ve notre table n’était ni dressée, ni propre. Manger dans ces conditions est inacceptable pour un établissement hôtelier. 👉 Un conseil constructif : le jeune homme en charge sur place semble compétent ve professional – laissez-le piloter l’hôtel, il pourrait réellement en améliorer la gestion ve l’image."

"Temiz ve konforlu bir otel. Kahvaltı çeşitliliği yeterli ve güzeldi. Memnun kaldık teşekkür ederiz"

"Konaklama yeri çölde bir vaha gibi. Kendinizi Italya'da gibi hissediyorsunuz. Konforlu ve temiz. Kahvaltısı güzel. Çok keyifli bir otel. Bir iki ufak negatif noktaya deginmek istiyorum kendilerini geliştirmek isterlerse diye. Yeni bir mekan olmasına ragmen TV lerde sorun var. Kanal değiştirmek pek mümkün olmuyor. Buna bir çözüm bulmadılar. Bu tarz bir otelde insan daha güleryüzlü ve yardımsever bir resepsiyon bekliyor. Fakat asıl başka bir işleri varmış da ek iş olarak size bakıyorlarmış gibi. Yanı sıra bu tarz bir otel Yetişkin oteli konseptinde olsa ciyak ciyak havuz kullanan çocuklar olmadan ortama uygun daha huzurlu bir tatil geçirilebilir. Daha iyiye odaklanirlarsa 100 puanlık bir otel haline gelir."

"A great find close to Antalya airport, no more than ten mins ride in the taxi that costs approx €10. The Ema houses is a home from home. The rooms are spacious. I had requested a double bed and not on the ground floor, my requested was granted. There is Tea and coffee facilities in the room along with a fridge and ample water supplies. Pool area lovely, like being in your back garden. Grass area for kids to play. Breakfast had good options, and I had dinner there too, which was great.there was no menu as such but the lady chef, ( not sure if she was manager or even owner) gave me options to choose from ( cheeseburger, pasta, etc ) there was about 6 options plus a local choice, which I opted for.this was great. Bar area could be stocked a bit better as they only had coke, but they did have juices, Beer and wine of course. The Antalya mall is minutes away from the hotel, but I choice to stay at the pool. I stayed 2 nights and will stay again, A great choice if flying in and out of Antalya."
"Great experience! Friendly and helpful personal! Beautiful and clean property! Thanks"

"This was a great hotel in a very convenient area. They had everything we needed and were very helpful and polite! We really enjoyed our stay and definitely plan to stay here again next time we’re in Antalya!"
"Arrived at 5am to quick check in and late checkout. Fantastic modern rooms with a shower that was more powerful than many of the 5 star establishments. Great breakfast thanks"

"Amazing hotel to stay in. 10 minute drive from the airport. Friendly staff. Clean and modern room with a great pool. Breakfast was lovely everyday. The Mall of Antalya is a 10 minute walk away but you’ll need taxis to get to anything further. Alternatively, the tram service is a 5 minute walk away and takes you to the old town. Overall it was a great hotel, would visit again :)"
"Güler yüzlü personeli,temizliği ve konforu bence kesinlikle gelip görülmeye değer…"
"Extremely disappointed in this hotel unwillingness to refund even partially because I was a few hours passed the deadline!"

"Very cosy, comfortable, new, super clean hotel not far from the airport, loved it. Only unfortunately, the hearing between the walls is very strong, you can only hope that there will be quiet neighbours. For one/two nights very comfortable option."
"Clean rooms"

"We really enjoyed our brief stay here. The grounds are pristine and the garden and pool area are beautiful. Breakfast had a large selection of tasty food. The bed was super comfy and the air conditioner works well. It is also a short walk to the Agora mall. The staff are very kind and helpful."
"It was nice and close to airport just there were mosquitoes in the room."
"nice and quite place. great and very friendly staff"

"Ema house is a beautiful hotel property with tasty designs for rooms, garden, pool, and breakfast decoration. This place has a great vibe. The breakfast is served outside next to garden and pool. Breakfast plates were wel decorated with interesting options. This is a great place to stay in the airport neighborhood and if you have a car to see around. The room was very clean and modern."
"Great hotel"
"İki günlük bir tatili için sectigimiz ve çok ama çok memnun kaldığımız bir otel odaları ve havuzu oldukça temiz kahvaltısı çok güzel tavsiye edeceğimiz bir otel"
"Çok güzel çok temiz kahvaltısı açık büfe ve güzel biz memnun kaldık."

"The place was completely new. Very nice pool and garden. Close to airport, but you don’t hear any airplanes. Outside is a little shop, also it’s close to two shopping malls. The tram stop is 10 minutes by foot which takes you to the city center. Room we had was smaller than it looks on the picture. The breakfast was all 7 days the same, for us it was very boring. Many items were missing all the time. I give the place a 8 out of 10 if you stay for a day. 7 out of 10 if you stay longer. Also in the hotel you cannot buy anything there is not even a wending machine or a coffee machine."
"Very lovely stay. Thanks"
"地點位置很好，房間也很舒服，環境更是漂亮，好停車，門口都有管理員，安全有保障，離機場很近，距離住的地方的十多分鐘步行距離內就有兩間賣場，如果晚一點玩回來還可以找吃的（我是比較推薦Deepo)，櫃檯人員很友善，會盡力解決問題"
"excellent 👌"

"Bu fiyata bu lokayonda kalmak gayet iyiydi.Kahvaltı gayet güzeldi.Nazik,ulaşılabilir bir pansiyon.Oda çok küçüktü,minik de olsa duş için bir sabun olabilirdi ama bu fiyata gene de çok iyi.Klima ve tv ve buzdolabı vardı ve çalışıyordu."
"Gayet konforlu, her odada klima var, kahvalti iyi, personel guler yuzlu ve yardimci, ve lokasyon mükkemmel heryer yurume mesafesi."
"einfache preiswerte Unterkunft in fantastischer Lage mit freundlich familiären Ambiente. Zimmer war klein aber mit eigenem Bad."
"Amazing staff and lovely room"
"Helt enkelt fantastiskt!"

"The hotel has a great location, just a short walk from many historical sites and attractions. The room was very clean and quiet, allowing for a restful stay. The bed was especially comfortable. Overall, a very pleasant experience — I would definitely recommend it for anyone visiting the area."
"Excellent établissement"

"Perfect location to discover Antalya's heritage site. The hotel itself has an incredible story with a rich architecture from 3 different civilizations, a cute patio that the host will take time to tell you about. There are great restaurants, pubs, café (SIDD, a gem!), hookah places just around the corner. However for families with under age kids (ours are 3 and 1), it's not friendly. The room we were in (1st room by the main entrance) had poor isolation from outside, the floors cracked a lot, we could hear anyone speaking in the lobby, people entering and exiting the hotel, kids in the upper apartment laughing. There were 2 staircases in our apartment (one leading to the bedroom, the other one to the bathroom (3 stairs), it was a pure nightmare with our 1 year baby climbing staircases up and down. The upper level is a mezzanine with bars wide enough for a baby to go through. I was very stressed out inside the room but spent a bit of time outside in the patio, super chill! The other star was removed because of the lights coming through the entrance door. Baby woke up at 6am like it was 8am. As a couple with no kids, i would definitely stay there to be at the heart of the city. As a mom of 2 small kids, I'd book ourselves into a "proper" hotel room for another 4 years. Arda and the rest of the staff are super nice, I really dont wish to bring their rate down so I'm only removing 1 star."

"The staff were very welcoming and super helpful. They provided additional services such as late check in and shuttle from the airport, laundry for a decent price, and maps and other valuable pieces of information. It is also centrally located making commuting around the old town very easy"
"Muy bien ubicado, muy amable la recepción"

"Great hotel in the old town with very friendly manager and staff. Staff helped ‘book’ a street park outside for us. The rooms have lots of character. We ate our takeaway coffees and pastries from a nearby cafe in the shady little patio each morning. Whilst we made it work for us, the room had a sofa bed for our two children. This was okay for 2 nights (just) but not ideal."

"It’s a beautiful old building, full of charm and lovingly decorated. We felt comfortable from the beginning, especially with the warmth and helpfulness of Arda at the reception and with all our questions. The location is great for visiting the beautiful old town of Kaleici. There are countless good restaurants nearby. We highly recommend this accommodation!"
"Casa molto rumorosa , si sentono le persone scendere dalle scale di legno perché scricchiola anche il soffitto . Non c’erano le lenzuola ma solo un copriletto e non credo che sua un usanza turca"

"It is a cute hotel located in a safe and convenient part of Lara. The restaurant and cleaning staff are very nice, but the reception people need a better training in hospitality. They don't bother much with greeting the guests and have an overall unpleasant attitude. They were presumption and not very professional. The hotel has an agreement with two different beaches for a shuttle service, free entry, long chairs and umbrellas but I was never informed of that upon the arrival and learned about it too late."
"Internet Sayfasi gercegi yansitmiyor. Otopark yok Ikinci resim olarak Sahil gercek disi. Otobüsle görürülebilirmisik Kahvalti acik büfe beklerdim, ama masledef degil"
"Kahvaltısı muhteşemdi odaya temizlik istedik sadece bu konuda bir şey yapmadılar havlu bırakmışlar sadece onun haricinde güzel"
"Cleaning subpar and manager is rude."

"Excellent séjour au M-Oda otel ! Très bonne situation de l'hôtel, a 20mn a pied du vieux centre et 30mn de la plage de Konyaalti en longeant le littoral. Chambre très propre, lit confortable. Yacub et sa femme sont tres gentils et accueillants. Un parking est situé juste en face et gratuit."

"Lovely stay in a family apartment at Minyon, Air con was excellent in very hot conditions , the apartment was everything we needed for our stay in Kaleici Ahmed gave us great service and made our family very welcome"

"The hotel is a jewel and so is its staff. Nothing is too good for the guests. We enjoyed the room, cooked breakfast, garden, swimming pool and the conversations with multi-lingual Ahmet. The only suggestion I have is: get rid of all the plastic bottles. Provide guests with carbon bottles and install a water fountain on each floor."
"Old and dirty rooms."
"아담하면서 깨끗하고 친절한 직원분들의 응대가 이번여행에서 가장 감동적이었던곳 여행을 편안하게 도와준 호텔직원분들께 감사를 드립니다 작지만 강한호텔이었어요"
"Temiz odalar. Muhteşem konum. Harika hizmet. 🌸"
"Otelden genel olarak memnun kaldim, konum olarak cok guzel kaleicinde her yere rahatlikla gidebilirsiniz. Temiz ve ilgililerdi. Sadece oda biraz kucuktu ama yine de tercih edilir."
"hiçbir sorun yaşamadık hizemt gayet güzel çalışanlar güler yüzlü ve çözüm odaklıydı her şey için teşekkür ederiz"
"Biraz eski bir otel. Ama personel yardımcı olmaya çalışıyor ve güler yüzlü. Temiz. Kendi seviyesinde iyi bir otel, tekrar işim düşse tekrar kalırım."
"Für ein paar Tage ganz in Ordnung, allerdings erwartet keinen Luxus"
"Hotellet ligger ca 30 min från flygplatsen. Nära till restauranger, parker och stranden. Trevlig personal."
"Städningen va dagligen det är jätte viktigt för mig Frukost enkelt men jättebra bra"

"Si la musique des restaurants voisins jusqu’à minuit ne vous dérange pas, choisissez cet hôtel très bien situé dans la vieille ville avec une piscine vraiment appréciable. Mention spéciale au jus d’orange pressé frais chaque matin délicieux !"

"Het personeel is echt super. Altijd bereid om te helpen en advies te geven. Het ontbijt is goed en het hotel wordt elke ochtend grondig gekuist. Het hotel heeft een leuk zwembad en ligt in het centrum, vlakbij de haven.De budget kamers zijn basic, niet veel meer dan een bed en kleine douche met nauwelijks water. Vraag naar een kamer aan het zwembad. Aan de straatkant is er s nachts lawaai van het café aan de overkant van de straat."
"Супер хозяин ! Хороший отель ! Местоположение ! Единственное на выходные будет играть громко музыка в соседнем баре !"
"This is a lovely hotel with beautiful rooms and friendly staff. The breakfast was also nice. I would stay here again and highly recommend it!"

"Remain a fan of Delight Deluxe. Warm, welcoming venue in the heart of Kaleici and great value for money. My only piece of constructive feedback would be done spend an additional £8 for breakfast. It's simply not worth it. Asked for an Americano and was told this would be extra £ on top. Directed to a jar of Nescafé. Disappointed."

"The location was great, but the room was disappointing. It was situated under the house, and the constant noise from the cleaner coming and going was quite disruptive. Although the room was booked for two, only amenities for one person were provided, as the cleaner seemed to assume there was no second guest. The check-in process and communication were okay. Laundry service was expensive, but breakfast was perfect."
"Sehr schon"

"This is an absolutely terrible property. Please don’t stay here. We booked the family room. Within an hour of arrival I found silverfish running around on one of the beds - in the middle of the afternoon. The room with the single beds reeked of mold. The shower was moldy. Many hairs in every bed. Dust bunnies and hair in every corner. I asked to be moved. They moved me and my 8 and 10 year old children into two non connecting rooms down the hall from each other which only unlock with an old fashioned key. That necessitated both doors had to be left unlocked all night, leaving us all vulnerable. The new rooms were also moldy and had many hairs on the sheets, including some that were clearly pubic. Disgusting. We were unable to find alternative accommodation for the first night but moved as soon as possible. DO NOT BOOK."

"Super tolles Hotel! Wunderschönes, altes Steinhaus mit einer bezaubernden Innenhof und kleinen garten+ kleinen Swimmingpool. Alles so unbeschreiblich geschmackvoll! Personal und Service ebenso nett, hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend! Wir können es nur mit gutem Gewissen allen weiterempfehlen."

"Such a cute property. It was quiet/quiet enough for a busy area full of night life and shopping. Walkable to everything in Old Town and the harbour. Staff were super helpful and friendly. Rooms were comfortable and clean. Foyer/courtyard/reception area was super cute and we lounged there after dinner and in the morning. Overall, would highly recommend this place for a stay in Antalya, Old Town."

"When you think of a boutique hotel, you’d expect some sort of a standard. I was honestly a bit disappointed by the overall experience, but then again, maybe i could’ve known by the fairly low rate they’re charging. -Room: outdated furniture, mould in the shower (i kept my flip flops on whilst showering), bed linen had a bit of a funky smell, half full of bottles shampoo, no showergel, had to let the shower run for approximately 2 mins before hot water came out. -Reception: depends on who’s on shift. On my day of arrival, the man behind the reception was really uninterested. He didn’t get up from behind his desk, didn’t offer to help me with my luggage, just gave me the roomkey and pointed to where my room is. Didn’t bother to walk me to the room, show me around or inform me about ANYTHING. When i asked him about the opening times of the bazaar i wanted to visit, he looked at me weirdly, saying it should be closed by now. Didn’t bother to ask if i wanted more information on sightseeing or anything about the city center itself. On my day of departure though, there was another male employee who was a bit more friendly. But overall, it lacked some sort of hospitality in my opinion. -Location: best thing about this hotel is the location. It’s a walking distance to basically all sights, with lots of restaurants and shops. This is the only strong pro i can mention. If you’re not looking to spend lots of time at the hotel and are ok with real basic stays, you could give it a go."

"The staff were friendly, helpful and constantly working hard. We really appreciated the assistance of our bags being taken to our rooms. Breakfast was absolutely lovely and a nice variety. The hotel was so unique, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would absolutely reccomend it to others."
"Bir gecelik bir konaklamaydi."
"Mycket bra service och fint hotal"
"Odalar daha geniş olabilirdi .bunun dışında bir sorun ile karsilasmadim"
"Alles gut"

"Room was on the main road. Was very noisy and couldnt sleep. Felt like the window was open it was that loud had to a few times that it was closed. Room needs sound proofing. Controlling the room temperature was difficult, room goes from being very cold when ac is on to very hot within 20-30 minutes of turning the AC off. Breakfast was disappointing with the lack of choices."

"Güvenlik görevlisi bir hanımefendinin tavrı hizmet sektörüne aykırıydı, saygısızcaydı. Kaldığım oda temizdi. Duş başlığı arızalıydı. Havuz temizdi. Kahvaltıda çeşit yeterliydi. Sadece kahvaltı alanı çok sıcaktı. Genel olarak memnun kaldım."

"Ya çok iyi otelleri tercih edin ya da butik olanları. Bu seviyedeki oteller hiçbir konuda profesyonel de değiller veya yardımcı da olmuyorlar. Garip bir soğukluk var genel olarak. Çalışanların geneli stajyer. Birkaç tane yaşı ileri kişi var onlar da önemli yerlerde. Otelden sıfır beklenti ile tatil yapıyorsanız burası uygun. Ama daha iyilerini gördüyseniz bunlar yerine daha butik ve samimi olan oteller tercih edebilirsiniz."
"Kahvalti salonunda ve lobide klima yasagi var otelde. Insanlar ter içinde ve klimalar süs olarak duruyor. Gece 01 e kadar otel disindan bir dans okulu gecesi. Muxikler harika ancak uyku sıfır"

"This hotel looks better than it is. Notice that this is close to the Main road and it’s very loud. Breakfast is really bad and very optionless. You have to ask for food because it’s empty. Room needs a renovation. They even charge you if you want to have guests, doesn’t matter sister or brother visit your hotel. They want 2000 lira for that. Or they threaten you with security. Not the personnel fault. Rule of hotel."
"Good service, friendly staff, clean."

"The photos on the website are so deceiving and misleading. The noise inside the room was so unbelievably loud. Expedia UK also done an unforgettable disappointment when they failed me not once nor twice but 3 times. In particular with this accommodation I was crying for help and requested their support for early checkout with an agreement to be partially refunded. Nonetheless they have offered to come back to me 3 days after which was 2 weeks ago and yet never happened."
"Temizlik konusunda biraz daha hassas olunabilir"
"Very nice"
"otel eski bir otel olup fiyatını haketmeyen bir otel diyebilirim"
"Wait a long time for service at the bar and limited food choices"

"We are a couple, it was a wonderful stay, a clean hotel, a wonderful view, excellent services, an excellent breakfast, close to all services. I thank Güslum for her cooperation with us, she was very nice to us, I recommend this hotel very much."
"Es ging, nähe Stadt und Strand. Zwischen 3 bis 4⭐️"
"Hôtel au bord de la route très bruyant. Menuserie Mal. Isolé. Le ménage ne seu fai pas tous les jours. Personne à l'accueil"

"While the food and room at this hotel were good, the service equally lacks. Few of the hotel staff could speak English and the reception was not welcoming or helpful. I waited about 10 minutes for someone to assist me when I arrived at the hotel."

"Es war alles so 3 bis 4 ⭐️ bis zu dem Typ der Tagsüber(frühschicht mit graue Haar) am Rezeption. Er war wie ein Wand oder Roboter,passt nicht zu dem Hotel muss schnell weg!!! Unsympathisch und Stur ist nie behilflich,schrecklich einfach!!!"
"Havuzu dışında ekstra bir özelliği yok . Spor salonu çok eski ve yetersiz. Kendi beachlerine 50 dk yürüme mesafesinde oysa ki odayı satarken 15 dk demişlerdi. Kahvaltı güzeldi."

"No English keep in mind this is a tourist hotel. Woman at front desk miserable Lobby very hot. Arrive at 330 in afternoon and still room was not ready. We left for early dinner and came back she gave us key to room 318 and the room was not ready. We are standing in hall as housekeeper did room. Hotel had no gift store and no outlet adapter in entire hotel to charge your phone . He wanted me to walk 3 miles to get one. Hotel should have them on hand for guests. They charged me 30 dollars for rice and chicken and not knowing it was buffet / no English / no greeting when my card did not work the woman was following me around the lobby asking me to pay even through I explained turkeys problem with credit cards. Apple Pay finally worked Then after I paid and went in lobby the staff wanted to charge me for tea as well"

"Nashira otel är väldigt rent både rum och basäng. För mig lagom stor otel jag gillar inte stora hoteller. Man ser havet från balkongen men ganska mycket promenad för mig vi tog hotellet taxi till deras strand utan att betala men stranden man betalar paraply för 200 tl lördag söndag under veckan grattis. Vi tog bara frukost det fans allt Turkisk pampig frukost. Hotellet var nära till köp center Migros där finns alla märkes kläder och massa restauranger. Promenad 6-7 min. Kale ici nära 6-7 min med taxi där finns man kan åka med båt och äta och massa små affärer. Personal är så vänlig Ayla hanim i restaurangen Ayse hanim hon som städade basäng toaletter väldigt vänligt hjälpsam. Alla andra personalen också väldig hjälpsam de springer för att hjälpa. Tack för allt Nashira otel det var lugn och skönt semseter jag har haft"
"The accommodation was amazing, the breakfast was delicious in addition to the service; the waiters were generous and treated us very well specially Mr. Ali he was so helpful ."
"Good hotel good people"
"Mükemmel bir konaklama deneyimi oldu kesinlikle. Şehrin göbeğinde olup, bu fiyata konaklanabilecek farklı bir opsiyon olduğunu sanmıyorum <3"

"平時不怎麼寫評價但是這間真的不太行 一開始訂房的時候描述是有洗衣機和廚具 到店之後發現房間與圖片完全不符 床位不一樣 既沒有洗衣機也沒有廚具 去問接待人員 對方理直氣壯地說 並不是所有房間都有洗衣機 在我一再要求下才不甘不願地給我換了跟圖片一樣的房間 但仍然只有洗衣機 所謂廚具只有熱水壺 連爐灶都沒有更別說其他餐具 另外房間裏除了廁所 沒有任何垃圾桶 也沒有垃圾袋 有洗衣機 但沒有洗衣粉 也沒有晾衣服的地方 洗臉盆與淋浴間下水都不太好 有五張床但只給了兩套毛巾 其餘用品一概沒有 在清潔人員來時找清潔人員要一個垃圾袋 被超兇地說 No 早餐也幾乎沒有什麼可吃的 有玉米片 但超吝嗇不肯給牛奶 用牛奶沖玉米片時 超兇地過來說那牛奶是給咖啡用的 那我想請問你家玉米片是當餅乾吃的嗎 總之不會再住這裡 除了門口就是電車站以外一無是處 但是本地計程車很方便且廉價 不住電車站門口也無所謂"
"Kahvalti saatinin cok erken olmasi bizi üzdü. Ancak mutfak personeli anlayisli davranip sureyi esnettiler tesekkur ederiz."

"Ich habe kurzfristig ein Zimmer für eine Nacht gebucht. In dieser Preiskategorie erwarte ich keinen Luxus, jedoch ist Sauberkeit eine Grundvoraussetzung. Das Zimmer war nicht gereinigt, und das Bad befand sich in einem unhygienischen Zustand. Offenbar wurde es nach den vorherigen Gästen nicht ordnungsgemäß gesäubert."

"Sokak arası bir otel. Girişi bulmak zor. Park sorunu var. Personel sanırım. Oda anahtarı çalışmıyordu. Bina eski bir Antalya evi, güzel. Şehrin ortasında kalmasına rağmen sessiz. Merkeze çok yakın olması avantajlı. Kısa süreli kalmak için uygun."

"Odamız gerek zemin kat olması gerek aydınlatmanın kötü olması kaynaklı gece gündüz karanlıktı bu da sizde ferah bir ortamdaymışsınız hissi vermiyor. Çarşaf, perde, banyo temizliğ daha iyi olabilirdi. Kahvaltısı resimdeki gibi değil tabakta servis edilir şekilde. Personel aşırı nazik, teşekkürler."
"Ruhige Gegend"

"Absolutely astonishing compared to any else hotels on area. Highly recommended! Everything was just perfect, clean facilities, the most wonderful and kind staff, amazing bed, plenty of room on wc and shower. Our trip on Turkey lasted 13 days, 7 hotels and this beats others by 110%. Room was just right size for us. Parking was easy, just front of the hotel, parking area isnt crowded. Shops and restaurants are nearby and city centre is easy to reach. We want to send our best wishes to everyone there, the kind lady on reception and Mehmet who was the best gentlemen."
"The owners really care about the property and clearly take great pride with it. The breakfast is comprehensive and tasty, and all the staff really put a lot of effort in."

"The room was very good, it had a very comfortable bed, air conditioning, TV and also a nice shower. The hotel staff were very nice. I loved the way me and my friend were treated by the workers, they were very polite and helpful."

"Fint hotell ligger väldigt bra centralt och nära till Mark Antalya centrum med knappt 10 min promenad. Trevliga personal som ler och hälsar. Rummet var fint, lite minus att det tog extra tid att kyla ner rummet i början men efter ett par minuter var rummet kyld och skön. En sak till att tänka på är att det finns ingen hiss på denna hotell och vi var på fjärde och högsta våning."

"Most of things was okay, some notes on the out-service elevator (maintenance) , good to recognize the city center near to Antalya mall , I like Friday fruit and vegetables market bazar in the morning."
"Everything is great and the staff are really nice!"
"Godt"
"Bad sound isolation, had to listen to my neighbours watching movie all night"

"This hotel was one of the worst experiences I’ve had. Please check the attached photos and videos—they speak louder than words. After insisting, I was moved to Room 1803—only to find it hotter, dirtier, and even less comfortable. The “new” mattress had clean sheets thrown over a visibly stained surface—see the video. The air conditioning blew warm air in the middle of summer. The walls were paper-thin, with constant noise, and the flickering lights felt like something out of a horror film. Internet? Prehistoric—barely usable. Despite all this, the staff treated me like I was the problem. I felt embarrassed having to raise issues a second time, but someone had to. The attitude lacked any compassion, especially for someone managing health issues. There was no visible effort to accommodate those with disabilities—no sensitivity, no accessibility support, no understanding. This place wasn’t just badly managed—it was dehumanising. When you’re unwell, travelling, or just hoping for rest, the last thing you should face is shame for speaking up. I wouldn’t wish this stay on anyone. "We recently stayed at the Ramada Plaza in Antalya, booked via Expedia, and found it to be a solid choice for our travel needs. The staff members at the hotel were helpful and friendly, willing to assist whenever needed. The hotel's location was convenient, with the Mediterranean Sea just a stone's throw away. The beach was equipped with ample free sun loungers, making our beach outings comfortable. The turquoise color of the sea was indeed a sight to behold. A brief 5-minute walk from the hotel led us to the old town of Antalya. We found several cafes and discos around, making it a nice spot for casual outings. The convenience of these local attractions was a plus. The breakfast buffet at the hotel was quite good. There was a diverse selection of dishes to choose from every morning, all of which were generally fresh and tasty. To summarize, our stay at Ramada Plaza Antalya was satisfactory. We booked through Expedia, which was a straightforward process. If you are looking for a stay in Antalya that offers a blend of beach and city life, consider this hotel. We would likely recommend it to friends, and might revisit in the future."

Fakat odanın elektrik fiş yeri bantla tutturulmuş ve bir gece düşünce korkuyla yataktan fırladık. Ertesi günde sigorta kutusunun kapağı düştü yani bunların müşteri girmeden değişmesi gerekiyordu. Hiç hoş olmadı. Personel yardımcı ama hepsi güler yüzlü değil. Housekeeping bizim odanın hemen yanında olduğu için oradaki tüm sohbetler(bitmeyen) bizim odanın içindeydi. Son 2 gece yan odada kalan müşterilerin sabaha karşı aşırı gürültülerinide 2 oda arasının ince bir duvarla kapatılması sonucu uyuyamıyarak deneyimledik. Otelin kahvaltısı için diğer çok yakındaki otellerine yönlendiriyorlar. Kahvaltı çok güzel, çok bol ve çeşitli ve çok temizdi. Oradaki kahvaltı personeli son derece güler yüzlü ve çalışkandı. Özellikle Nilüfere çok teşekkür ederiz. Bu kadar çalışkan, becerikli ve güler yüzlü bir elemanları olduğu için çok şanslılar. Bu arada park sorunu hiç yaşamadık. Kendilerini biraz toparlarlarsa daha iyi bir işletme olabilirler ve benim yine seçeneğim olabilir."

"Ich habe mich im Lara Beach Hotel sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Sauberkeit im gesamten Hotel war auf höchstem Niveau, überall roch es angenehm frisch. Das hat mir direkt beim Ankommen einen sehr guten Eindruck vermittelt. Ein großes Lob an Ferdi und Abdullah – beide waren immer freundlich, hilfsbereit und gut gelaunt. Man konnte sich jederzeit an sie wenden und bekam sofort Unterstützung. Das Frühstück war jeden Tag ein bisschen anders und sehr abwechslungsreich. Es gab reichlich Auswahl, sowohl warme als auch kalte Speisen, und alles war frisch zubereitet. Die zwei Swimmingpools waren sauber und schön angelegt. Besonders positiv fand ich, dass ein Bereich etwas abgegrenzt war, sodass Babys und Kleinkinder sicher planschen konnten. Auch das Hamam hat mir gut gefallen – gepflegt und professionell geführt. Was die Lage betrifft: Das Hotel liegt zentral in einer ruhigen Gegend. Der Lara Beach mit seinem wunderschönen Sandstrand ist nur etwa 3 Minuten mit dem Auto entfernt. Auch für Nichtschwimmer ist der Strand geeignet. Es gibt dort Liegen, eine Bar und Snacks – alles ab etwa 200 TL. Der Flughafen ist nur rund 14 Minuten mit dem Auto entfernt, was die An- und Abreise sehr unkompliziert macht. Der Hotelbesitzer war jederzeit präsent, professionell und zuvorkommend. Man merkt, dass hier alles gut organisiert ist. Insgesamt war mein Aufenthalt sehr angenehm, und ich würde das Hotel definitiv wieder buchen."

"Well, upon arrival, we thought the place looked beautiful and luxurious, but did find it a bit odd that it was in the middle of neighborhoods as a resort. Our check-in was smooth and the staff was helpful and kind. After checking into our room, we explored the property a little bit and enjoyed a dip in the pool and played some ping-pong. We ordered some food and decided to go ahead and eat in the room. We ordered a combination of room service, which is a little expensive but not too much and ordering some food in from outside. Then we decided to use the jacuzzi tub in the room. Unfortunately after about half an hour of use, while draining it, all the water went onto the floor instead of down the pipe resulting in our room flooding! Once again they were very accommodating and more worried about our items being damaged they were about the room being damaged, which was thoughtful. They took quick action and started vacuuming up the water and getting us a new accommodation. . This does lead, however, to my only real criticism of this hotel. Everything looks very glamorous on the outside, but has major design flaws and lack of follow through with execution of construction. Full kitchen but not one piece of dishware or silverware. There’s not one pot or pan to cook on a full stove. Final thoughts include the shower is very nice, the beds comfortable and the room extremely spacious for Turkey. Also in the morning breakfast was delicious."
