"It was great. The location suits the one who likes to stay at quiet and peaceful location. The rooms are just amazing from the comfortability,cleanliness etc. The Hotel has many thing to offer like Turkish hammam, Massage, Pool table and many more activities. The pool is great and there is also a poolbar avaiable, so perfect for the one who like to spend there day in the pool. The service is very good and the staff is very friendly and helpful. Now to the bad thing (and only bad thing) The breakfast. I was really disspointed in seeing the breakfast as it wasnt many variaty available.And which shock me the most was the bread, just 2 different bread and they were defintily not fresh. Scrambeld eggs which were almost always empty. I expected more. We saw peolpe walk in and walk straight out. So to say the least the only thing that need to be improved is the Breakfast other than that its definitly worth a visit and they will be seeing me again soon;)"

"Beautiful Hotel, just newly opened and all the furnishings are beautiful, hotel is located in a very quite area, easy to access pool loungers etc. Area around hotel is at the beginning stage of development and is bleak and semi derelict when you look out from your balcony but the hotel itself is superb. It is close to 9km from the old town centre where all the restaurants and shops are, so its a €10 taxi ride approx either way so factor that into your consideration . Not near a beach but it has a lovely pool to relax by. If you want to relax by the pool every day then this hotel is perfect for you, if you want to walk and explore the town maybe consider a hotel nearer town centre. It does reach over 40 degree heat in the summertime but there is a lovely breeze."
"No nice views mostly construction around"

"Bu otelde bir kaç gün konakladım, tam olarak fiyat performans oteli diyebiliriz. Otel araba ile merkeze 15 dk uzaklıkta bir mesafede. Apart Hotel tarzında. Odalar 1+1, Mutfağınız, çamaşır makinesi, buzdolabı, fırın hepsi mevcut. Ancak çatal bıçak tabak vs hiç biri yok. 2 bloktan oluşuyor. Açık Havuzu var. Kahvaltısı standart açık büfe kahvaltı. Her gün aynı değişen bir ürün yok. Sıcaklarda omlet, haşlanmış yumurta, ve biber kızartması her gün standart olarak çıkıyor başka bir şey yok. Tüm imkanlar otelin -1. Katında, yemek yeme, fitness, spa, masaj vs. Fiyatından dolayımıdır bilmem oteldeki misafirlerin büyük bir çoğunluğu Suriyeli, İranlı vs. Arap kökenli. Çalışanlarda keza öyle ve gençler. Olumsuz söyleyebileceğim giriş katından rezervasyon yaptırmayın, yabancı turistler hayvan gibi ses çıkardığı için gecenin yarısı uykunuzdan uyanıyorsunuz. Onun haricinde dışarda kendiniz gezip sadece konaklama amacıyla bir otel arıyorsanız fiyatına göre gayet makul bir seçenek. Odaların büyük olması ve havuzu olması güzeldi. Otel yöneticileri lütfen havuza bonesiz girmeyi yasaklayın havuzun dibinde her yerde saç kılları mevcut."

Men, totalt sett- vil du slappe av i ro og mak- i rolige omgivelser- kan jeg anbefale dette hotellet (som personalet selv omtalte som ett "flyplass-hotell" der gjester som regel kun overnattet på veg til/fra landet."

"The cleanliness of the room was disappointing for the price of the stay. The Junior Suite with a jetted bath had grime stains but thankfully did not smell when first turned on like some. Room service was fast but not particularly good. The ‘Elysium Chefs Special’ which boasted its presentation, sauce and used the word ‘feast’ was terrible. Overcooked meat, tiny portion of rice, some broccoli and what we think was a huge bowl of BBQ sauce (more sauce than rice!). It’s also worth noting that the prices on the bills when the food was delivered differed from the menu in the room. A burger (which was nice) was €7 in the menu but €15 on the receipt. Other reviews stated issues with the beach shuttle which we echo. 2 days we went to the beach but the return bus never came. The 2nd day staff told us there were no more shuttles even though there should’ve been another 2 that day. We had to pay for our own taxis back both times and the staff didn’t seem to care when mentioning it on arrival. The hotel taxis were much better than the regular ones. Clean with aircon and same price as yellow taxis. Spa staff were friendly and it was a nice experience but our session was cut short. Paid for the 2-hour package but as there were no clocks didn’t realise when getting back to the room that it lasted only about 1hr45m."

"We booked for a 6 day stay but ended up only staying 1 night. The hotel, staff and food were amazing. Really well presented and professional establishment.
